idea_spark.idea: 将解集参数化与机器学习结合，从实际博弈数据中学习成本函数的结构（如稀疏性或低秩性）。
idea_spark.risk: 算法依赖精确的模型和策略观测，实际中模型误差或噪声可能导致解集为空或不可靠。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受逆强化学习中“可行奖励集”概念的启发，将其扩展到多智能体微分博弈场景。

en.tldr: This paper studies the inverse problem for infinite-horizon linear-quadratic descriptor differential games, characterizing the set of all cost functions that rationalize a given feedback strategy profile as a Nash equilibrium, proving its convexity and rectangularity, and providing an algorithm to compute an admissible realization.
en.motivation: Existing inverse optimal control methods focus on single-agent systems; how to recover all possible cost functions from observed strategies in multi-agent differential games remains under-explored.
en.method: A model-based approach that treats the observed feedback strategy as a Nash equilibrium, derives linear matrix inequality conditions for cost functions, characterizes the solution set, and designs an algorithm.
en.result: The solution set is convex and rectangular; the algorithm yields an admissible cost realization; numerical examples validate the theory.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how to identify all possible cost functions from multi-agent game observations, useful for behavior modeling or reverse engineering.

idea_spark.idea: Combine solution set parameterization with machine learning to learn cost function structure (e.g., sparsity or low-rank) from real game data.
idea_spark.risk: The algorithm relies on exact model and strategy observations; model errors or noise may lead to empty or unreliable solution sets.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the 'feasible reward set' concept in inverse reinforcement learning, extended to multi-agent differential games.

papers.title: A Systematic Review of Recent Advancements in PINN Augmented Deep Learning and Mathematical Modeling for Efficient Portfolio Management
papers.summary: In finance, portfolio management is a traditional yet difficult problem that has drawn attention from practitioners and researchers for many years. However, there are still difficult technological problems that need to be solved. In the world of finance, managing a portfolio has never been easy. Selecting portfolios in a volatile market is made easier with the help of portfolio management. The goal of this review study is to present the concept of physics-informed neural networks because they provide a novel approach to directly incorporating physics and finance principles into the neural network's learning process. By doing so, physics-informed neural networks ensure that their forecasts are in line with established financial regulations and processes in addition to offering precise forecasts. Furthermore, this article provides an overview of the current state of research in portfolio optimization with the support of mathematical models, deep learning models and physics-informed neural networks. In addition, the advantages and disadvantages of various deep learning and mathematical modelling are discussed. Researchers and business professionals alike should find the data useful for advancing the field of investment management and trying out new portfolio management strategies. For this purpose, in this review work, emphasis is given to these factors. Finally, a few challenging issues and potential future directions are discussed, encouraging readers to consider fresh ideas in this field of study.

ai.tldr: 本文系统综述了物理信息神经网络（PINN）增强深度学习与数学模型在高效投资组合管理中的最新进展，讨论了其优势、劣势及未来方向。
ai.motivation: 投资组合管理是金融领域的传统难题，现有技术仍面临挑战，需要更符合金融规律的方法。
ai.method: 通过系统综述，介绍PINN如何将物理和金融原理直接融入神经网络学习过程，并与传统深度学习、数学模型进行对比分析。
ai.result: PINN能确保预测符合金融规则，同时提供精确预测；综述总结了各类方法的优缺点及未来研究方向。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助研究人员和从业者了解PINN在投资组合管理中的应用现状，为探索新策略提供参考。

idea_spark.idea: 设计一个混合模型，结合PINN的约束机制与强化学习，实现动态投资组合再平衡。
idea_spark.risk: 金融市场的非平稳性可能导致PINN的物理假设失效，需验证模型对市场突变的鲁棒性。

zh.tldr: 本文系统综述了物理信息神经网络（PINN）增强深度学习与数学模型在高效投资组合管理中的最新进展，讨论了其优势、劣势及未来方向。
zh.motivation: 投资组合管理是金融领域的传统难题，现有技术仍面临挑战，需要更符合金融规律的方法。
zh.method: 通过系统综述，介绍PINN如何将物理和金融原理直接融入神经网络学习过程，并与传统深度学习、数学模型进行对比分析。
zh.result: PINN能确保预测符合金融规则，同时提供精确预测；综述总结了各类方法的优缺点及未来研究方向。
zh.help_to_user: 帮助研究人员和从业者了解PINN在投资组合管理中的应用现状，为探索新策略提供参考。

en.tldr: This systematic review covers recent advances in PINN-augmented deep learning and mathematical modeling for efficient portfolio management, discussing pros, cons, and future directions.
en.motivation: Portfolio management remains a challenging problem in finance; existing techniques need better alignment with financial principles.
en.method: A systematic review introducing PINNs that embed physics and finance principles into neural network learning, compared with traditional deep learning and mathematical models.
en.result: PINNs ensure forecasts comply with financial rules while providing accuracy; the review summarizes strengths, weaknesses, and future research avenues.
en.help_to_user: Provides researchers and practitioners with an overview of PINN applications in portfolio management, aiding the exploration of new strategies.

idea_spark.idea: Design a hybrid model combining PINN constraints with reinforcement learning for dynamic portfolio rebalancing.
idea_spark.risk: Market non-stationarity may violate PINN's physical assumptions; robustness to sudden market shifts needs validation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by PINN's use of physical laws, consider incorporating economic theories (e.g., efficient market hypothesis) as soft constraints in deep learning.

papers.title: Physically-Informed Fuzzy Clustering of Vertical Sounding Ionograms
papers.summary: This paper presents a physically-informed fuzzy clustering of vertical sounding ionograms for automatically separating the ionogram into tracks suitable for further interpretation and determining their optimal number. The model is designed for use not only in conditions where the number of tracks is known, but also in disturbed ionospheric conditions where the number of tracks is preliminary unknown.   The method is based on an expectation-maximization algorithm, used for clustering, and on parametrically specified distributions of distances from points to parametrically specified curves. The curves used as track models are close to model tracks in the parabolic ionospheric layer model. The resulting model of each track has six parameters: three standard ones (the critical frequency, the lower boundary of the layer, and its half-width), and three additional ones to take into account possible underlying layer effects. By sequentially increasing the number of tracks and optimizing their parameters, the model finds the optimal number of tracks on the ionogram by minimizing the modified Bayesian information criterion. The Sequential Least Squares Quadratic Programming algorithm is used to find the parameters of a single track. The width of each single track is assumed to be unknown constant found during fitting process.   To improve the quality of ionogram clustering, automatic adaptive noise filtering is performed before clustering. This filtering is based on a combination of the DBSCAN and Gaussian Mixture algorithms. Also, to improve clustering quality on an ionosonde without hardware separation of the ordinary and extraordinary components, a preliminary approximate removal of points belonging to the extraordinary mode is performed.

ai.tldr: 提出一种物理信息引导的模糊聚类方法，自动将垂直探测电离图分割为适合进一步解释的轨迹，并确定其最优数量。
ai.motivation: 现有方法在电离层扰动条件下难以自动确定轨迹数量，且对硬件分离要求高。
ai.method: 基于期望最大化算法进行聚类，使用参数化曲线（接近抛物层模型）描述轨迹，通过序贯增加轨迹数并优化参数，利用修正贝叶斯信息准则确定最优轨迹数，结合DBSCAN和高斯混合算法进行自适应噪声滤波。
ai.result: 方法能在已知或未知轨迹数条件下工作，并自动处理异常分量，提高聚类质量。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户自动处理电离图数据，减少人工干预，尤其适用于扰动电离层环境。

idea_spark.idea: 将物理模型参数化曲线与模糊聚类结合，通过序贯优化自动确定类别数。
idea_spark.risk: 对物理模型的依赖可能限制其在非抛物层结构下的适用性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发将领域知识嵌入聚类目标函数，以提升无监督学习的可解释性和鲁棒性。

idea_spark.inspiration: 启发将领域知识嵌入聚类目标函数，以提升无监督学习的可解释性和鲁棒性。

en.tldr: A physically-informed fuzzy clustering method is proposed to automatically segment vertical sounding ionograms into tracks and determine their optimal number.
en.motivation: Existing methods struggle to automatically determine the number of tracks under disturbed ionospheric conditions and often require hardware separation of polarization components.
en.method: The method uses an expectation-maximization algorithm for clustering with parametrically specified curves based on a parabolic ionospheric layer model. It sequentially increases the number of tracks, optimizes parameters via Sequential Least Squares Quadratic Programming, and selects the optimal number using a modified Bayesian information criterion. Adaptive noise filtering combines DBSCAN and Gaussian Mixture algorithms, and a preliminary removal of extraordinary mode points is performed.
en.result: The method works under both known and unknown track numbers, handles disturbed conditions, and improves clustering quality by filtering noise and removing extraordinary mode points.
en.help_to_user: Automates ionogram analysis, reduces manual effort, and is robust to disturbed ionospheric conditions.

idea_spark.idea: Combine parametric physical curve models with fuzzy clustering and sequential optimization to automatically determine the number of clusters.
idea_spark.risk: Dependence on the parabolic layer model may limit applicability to non-parabolic structures.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires embedding domain knowledge into clustering objective functions to enhance interpretability and robustness in unsupervised learning.

papers.title: Revealing Strategic Interactions in Network Games Under Decaying Active Probing
papers.summary: Revealing the interaction topology underlying strategic behavior is fundamental to prediction, intervention, and policy design in networked systems. Yet the interaction matrix is often unobservable, and passive observation of repeated actions fails to provide sufficient excitation for reliable recovery. This paper studies topology recovery in repeated linear-quadratic network games under decaying active probing, where probing inputs are injected into a subset of players and the unknown interaction matrix is inferred from the resulting action trajectories. We first characterize a structural recoverability condition that determines when noiseless probing experiments can make the interaction matrix identifiable. We then show that, under suitable stability and controllability assumptions, a concrete decaying probing signal guarantees exact finite-step recovery while preserving convergence of the repeated-play process. To handle decision perturbations, we further develop a reweighted sparse estimator that achieves almost-sure consistency together with finite-time exact support recovery. These results clarify what can be recovered in both noiseless and perturbed settings.

ai.tldr: 研究在衰减主动探测下，如何从行动轨迹中恢复网络博弈的交互拓扑，并保证重复博弈过程的收敛性。
ai.motivation: 网络博弈中交互矩阵通常不可观测，被动观测无法提供足够激励，需要主动探测来可靠恢复拓扑。
ai.method: 向部分玩家注入衰减探测信号，利用行动轨迹推断交互矩阵；提出结构可恢复性条件、衰减探测信号设计以及重加权稀疏估计器。
ai.result: 在无噪声条件下实现精确有限步恢复并保持收敛；在有扰动时，重加权稀疏估计器达到几乎必然一致性和有限时间精确支持恢复。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解如何通过主动探测揭示网络博弈中的战略交互结构，为预测、干预和政策设计提供基础。

idea_spark.idea: 结合衰减探测与重加权稀疏估计，在保证系统收敛的同时实现精确拓扑恢复。
idea_spark.risk: 探测信号可能干扰原有博弈过程，需谨慎设计衰减速率以避免破坏收敛性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从系统辨识中的主动激励思想出发，将其应用于博弈论中的结构恢复问题。

idea_spark.risk: 探测信号可能干扰原有博弈过程，需谨慎设计衰减速率以避免破坏收敛性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从系统辨识中的主动激励思想出发，将其应用于博弈论中的结构恢复问题。

en.tldr: This paper studies how to recover the interaction topology of network games from action trajectories under decaying active probing, while preserving convergence of the repeated-play process.
en.motivation: The interaction matrix in network games is often unobservable, and passive observation lacks sufficient excitation for reliable recovery, necessitating active probing.
en.method: Inject decaying probing signals into a subset of players, infer the interaction matrix from action trajectories; characterize structural recoverability, design decaying probing signals, and develop a reweighted sparse estimator.
en.result: Exact finite-step recovery with convergence preservation in noiseless settings; almost-sure consistency and finite-time exact support recovery under perturbations.
en.help_to_user: Provides a principled approach to reveal strategic interaction structures in networked systems, enabling better prediction, intervention, and policy design.

idea_spark.idea: Combine decaying probing with reweighted sparse estimation to achieve exact topology recovery while maintaining system convergence.
idea_spark.risk: Probing signals may perturb the original game dynamics; careful design of decay rates is needed to avoid disrupting convergence.
idea_spark.inspiration: Draws inspiration from active excitation in system identification and applies it to structural recovery in game theory.

papers.title: Multifractional Stable Motion with Random Hurst Exponent
papers.summary: The fractional stable motion is a prototypical stochastic process exhibiting both heavy tails and long-range dependence, parameterized via a stability index $α$ and a Hurst exponent $H$. We consider a nonstationary extension where the Hurst exponent is a function of time, and potentially random. The construction admits the standard linear fractional stable motion as tangent process, and we exactly determine its local Hölder exponent in terms of the pointwise values of the Hurst function. This is in contrast to other definitions of multifractional processes, where the Hurst function needs to have additional regularity in time.

ai.tldr: 提出了一种Hurst指数随时间随机变化的多分形稳定运动模型，并精确确定了其局部Hölder指数。
ai.motivation: 标准分数稳定运动假设Hurst指数恒定，无法刻画时变的长程依赖和重尾特性。
ai.method: 将Hurst指数构造为时间的函数（可随机），以标准线性分数稳定运动作为切过程。
ai.result: 局部Hölder指数由Hurst函数的逐点值唯一决定，无需额外时间正则性。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解非平稳重尾过程在时变Hurst指数下的局部正则性。

idea_spark.idea: 将Hurst函数随机化，可建模金融或物理中突发性长程依赖变化。
idea_spark.risk: 随机Hurst函数可能引入不可观测性，参数估计困难。
idea_spark.inspiration: 局部Hölder指数与Hurst函数逐点对应的简洁性，启发设计更易估计的多分形模型。

zh.tldr: 提出了一种Hurst指数随时间随机变化的多分形稳定运动模型，并精确确定了其局部Hölder指数。
zh.motivation: 标准分数稳定运动假设Hurst指数恒定，无法刻画时变的长程依赖和重尾特性。

idea_spark.idea: 将Hurst函数随机化，可建模金融或物理中突发性长程依赖变化。

idea_spark.inspiration: 局部Hölder指数与Hurst函数逐点对应的简洁性，启发设计更易估计的多分形模型。

en.tldr: A multifractional stable motion with time-varying random Hurst exponent is constructed, and its local Hölder exponent is exactly determined by pointwise Hurst values.
en.motivation: Standard fractional stable motion assumes constant Hurst exponent, failing to capture time-varying long-range dependence and heavy tails.
en.method: The Hurst exponent is modeled as a function of time (possibly random), with the standard linear fractional stable motion as tangent process.
en.result: The local Hölder exponent is uniquely determined by pointwise values of the Hurst function, without requiring additional time regularity.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand local regularity of nonstationary heavy-tailed processes under time-varying Hurst exponent.

idea_spark.idea: Randomizing the Hurst function can model abrupt changes in long-range dependence in finance or physics.
idea_spark.risk: Random Hurst function may introduce unobservability, making parameter estimation difficult.
idea_spark.inspiration: The simplicity of pointwise correspondence between local Hölder exponent and Hurst function inspires easier-to-estimate multifractional models.

papers.title: Jump Itô-type formula with arbitrary regularity
papers.summary: We establish an Itô-type formula for finite $p$-variation paths with jumps for arbitrary $p\geq 1$. The formula is stated in a fully pathwise form and separates the reduced rough integral from explicit left- and right-jump correction terms. In the càdlàg case, only the left-jump correction remains, while in the continuous case, both jump correction terms vanish and the formula recovers the corresponding continuous arbitrary-regularity change-of-variable formula. The proof is based on the reduced rough path framework and a refinement Riemann-Stieltjes convergence criterion adapted to discontinuous paths. This approach allows us to handle the higher-order Taylor expansions required for large values of $p$ and to control the interaction between rough increments and discrete jumps.   As applications, we derive Itô-type formulas for stochastic processes whose sample paths have finite $p$-variation, including pure-jump models and mixed fractional Brownian-jump signals. The latter class includes cases with Hurst parameter $H\leq 1/3$, which fall outside the regime $2\leq p<3$. We also obtain chain-rule identities for nonlinear observables of càdlàg finite-$p$-variation solutions of random differential equations with jumps, together with a pathwise log-wealth decomposition.

ai.tldr: 建立了任意正则性下带跳跃的有限p变差路径的Itô型公式，并应用于纯跳跃模型和混合分数布朗-跳跃信号。
ai.motivation: 现有Itô公式对跳跃路径的正则性要求较高，需要推广到任意p≥1的有限p变差路径。
ai.method: 基于简化粗糙路径框架和适应不连续路径的Riemann-Stieltjes收敛准则，分离出左跳和右跳修正项。
ai.result: 得到了完全路径形式的Itô公式，在càdlàg情形仅剩左跳修正，连续情形退化为已知公式；并推导了随机微分方程的链式法则。
ai.help_to_user: 为处理含跳跃的粗糙路径（如混合分数布朗运动与跳跃信号）提供了统一的路径微积分工具。

idea_spark.idea: 将粗糙路径理论与跳跃修正项结合，可能用于金融中的跳跃扩散模型定价或风险度量。
idea_spark.risk: 实际应用中需要精确估计跳跃时刻和幅度，对数据频率要求高。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受粗糙路径理论中连续情形公式的启发，通过引入左右跳修正项自然推广到不连续路径。

idea_spark.risk: 实际应用中需要精确估计跳跃时刻和幅度，对数据频率要求高。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受粗糙路径理论中连续情形公式的启发，通过引入左右跳修正项自然推广到不连续路径。

en.tldr: Establishes an Itô-type formula for finite p-variation paths with jumps for arbitrary p≥1, with applications to pure-jump models and mixed fractional Brownian-jump signals.
en.motivation: Existing Itô formulas require higher regularity for jump paths; need to generalize to finite p-variation paths with arbitrary p≥1.
en.method: Based on reduced rough path framework and a refined Riemann-Stieltjes convergence criterion adapted to discontinuous paths, separating left- and right-jump correction terms.
en.result: Obtains a fully pathwise Itô formula; in the càdlàg case only left-jump correction remains, continuous case recovers known formula; derives chain rule for SDEs with jumps.
en.help_to_user: Provides a unified pathwise calculus for rough paths with jumps, e.g., mixed fractional Brownian motion and jump signals.

idea_spark.idea: Combining rough path theory with jump corrections may be used for pricing or risk measures in jump-diffusion models in finance.
idea_spark.risk: Practical application requires accurate estimation of jump times and sizes, demanding high-frequency data.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by continuous rough path formulas, naturally extended to discontinuous paths by introducing left- and right-jump correction terms.

papers.title: A Scaled Gradient Modified Non-monotone Line Search Method for Constrained Optimization Problems
papers.summary: In this paper, we propose a scaled gradient modified non-monotone line search method for solving constrained minimization problems, and explore several specific properties of this method, namely, its convergence analysis. We discuss the linear convergence rate of the sequence generated by the proposed algorithm to a solution of the constrained minimization problem where the objective function is strongly quasiconvex. We consider numerical examples of large-scale fractional programming and quadratic programming for the function of pseudo convex and strongly quasiconvex and compare the performance of the proposed algorithm with the existing ones for these examples.

ai.tldr: 提出一种带缩放梯度的非单调线搜索方法，用于求解约束极小化问题，并证明了强拟凸目标函数下的线性收敛率。
ai.motivation: 现有约束优化方法在处理大规模、非凸或拟凸问题时收敛速度慢或单调性要求过强，需要更高效的算法。
ai.method: 在非单调线搜索框架中引入缩放梯度，构造新迭代方向，并针对强拟凸函数建立线性收敛性分析。
ai.result: 数值实验表明，该方法在分数规划和二次规划问题上优于已有算法。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种可处理大规模约束优化且具有理论保证的实用算法。

idea_spark.idea: 将缩放梯度思想与自适应步长策略结合，进一步加速收敛。
idea_spark.risk: 缩放因子的选择可能影响稳定性，需谨慎调参。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从拟凸函数性质出发设计算法，启发我们利用函数结构简化优化过程。

zh.method: 在非单调线搜索框架中引入缩放梯度，构造新迭代方向，并针对强拟凸函数建立线性收敛性分析。
zh.result: 数值实验表明，该方法在分数规划和二次规划问题上优于已有算法。
zh.help_to_user: 提供一种可处理大规模约束优化且具有理论保证的实用算法。

idea_spark.idea: 将缩放梯度思想与自适应步长策略结合，进一步加速收敛。
idea_spark.risk: 缩放因子的选择可能影响稳定性，需谨慎调参。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从拟凸函数性质出发设计算法，启发我们利用函数结构简化优化过程。

en.tldr: Proposes a scaled gradient modified non-monotone line search method for constrained minimization, with linear convergence rate for strongly quasiconvex objectives.
en.motivation: Existing constrained optimization methods suffer from slow convergence or rigid monotonicity requirements, especially for large-scale or quasiconvex problems.
en.method: Incorporates a scaled gradient into a non-monotone line search framework, and establishes linear convergence analysis for strongly quasiconvex functions.
en.result: Numerical experiments on fractional and quadratic programming show superior performance over existing methods.
en.help_to_user: Provides a theoretically grounded, practical algorithm for large-scale constrained optimization.

idea_spark.idea: Combine scaled gradient with adaptive step size strategies to further accelerate convergence.
idea_spark.risk: Choice of scaling factor may affect stability; careful tuning required.
idea_spark.inspiration: Leveraging quasiconvex structure inspires simpler optimization algorithms tailored to function properties.

papers.title: TBA equations for $SU(r+1)$ quantum Seiberg-Witten curve: higher-order Mathieu equation
papers.summary: We develop the ODE/IM correspondence for the higher-order Mathieu equation arising from the quantum Seiberg-Witten curve of the pure $SU(r+1)$ ${\cal N}=2$ supersymmetric Yang-Mills theory. From the subdominant solutions, we construct the Q-/Y-systems and derive the corresponding TBA equations. The dependence of the moduli parameters is found to be encoded in the boundary conditions of the Y-functions at $θ\to -\infty$. From these boundary data, we derive an analytic expression for the effective central charge, which also governs the subleading contribution in the large-$θ$ expansion of the TBA equations. Finally, we compare the large-$θ$ expansion of the Q-function derived from the TBA equations with that obtained from the WKB method, which yields analytic agreement at subleading order and precise numerical agreement at the higher-order corrections.

ai.tldr: 针对纯SU(r+1) N=2超对称杨-米尔斯理论的高阶Mathieu方程，发展了ODE/IM对应，构造了TBA方程，并解析计算了有效中心荷。
ai.motivation: 将ODE/IM对应推广到高阶Mathieu方程，以理解量子Seiberg-Witten曲线中的可积结构。
ai.method: 从次优解构造Q-/Y-系统，推导TBA方程；通过边界条件提取有效中心荷；与WKB展开进行对比验证。
ai.result: TBA方程的大θ展开与WKB方法在次领头阶解析一致，高阶修正数值精确吻合。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了高阶Mathieu方程可积性的系统框架，可用于精确计算量子Seiberg-Witten曲线中的模参数依赖。

idea_spark.idea: 利用TBA方程的边界条件系统化提取有效中心荷，可能为其他超对称理论中的中心荷计算提供新途径。
idea_spark.risk: 高阶修正的数值验证依赖于具体模型，通用性需进一步检验。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将TBA方程与WKB方法结合，可交叉验证量子可积系统的解析结构。

en.tldr: For the higher-order Mathieu equation from pure SU(r+1) N=2 SYM, we develop the ODE/IM correspondence, construct TBA equations, and analytically compute the effective central charge.
en.motivation: Extend the ODE/IM correspondence to higher-order Mathieu equations to understand the integrable structure of quantum Seiberg-Witten curves.
en.method: Construct Q-/Y-systems from subdominant solutions, derive TBA equations; extract effective central charge from boundary conditions; compare with WKB expansion.
en.result: The large-θ expansion of TBA equations agrees analytically with WKB at subleading order and numerically at higher orders.
en.help_to_user: Provides a systematic integrability framework for higher-order Mathieu equations, enabling precise computation of moduli dependence in quantum Seiberg-Witten curves.

idea_spark.idea: Systematically extract effective central charge from TBA boundary conditions, potentially offering a new route for central charge calculations in other supersymmetric theories.
idea_spark.risk: Numerical verification of higher-order corrections is model-specific; generality requires further testing.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combining TBA equations with WKB methods provides cross-validation of analytic structures in quantum integrable systems.

papers.title: Nonsmooth Riemannian optimization with inexact manifold primitives via bundle methods
papers.summary: Optimization on Hadamard manifolds -- the natural Riemannian setting for globally geodesically convex problems -- relies on exponential maps to retract tangent vectors and parallel transport to connect tangent spaces across the manifold. These primitives are often computationally expensive, leading software packages to rely on approximations: first-order retractions and vector transports. However, existing results for optimization on Hadamard manifolds either require exact primitives or lack non-asymptotic rates. We bridge this gap by introducing a proximal bundle method for nonsmooth geodesically convex optimization and establishing the first oracle-complexity bounds that rely only on subgradients and inexact primitives. We obtain sublinear rates for general objectives and optimal linear convergence under sharp function growth.

ai.tldr: 提出了一种基于束方法的非光滑黎曼优化算法，仅需不精确的流形原语即可在Hadamard流形上实现次线性或线性收敛率。
ai.motivation: 现有Hadamard流形上的优化方法要么需要精确的指数映射和平行移动（计算昂贵），要么缺乏非渐近收敛保证。
ai.method: 引入近端束方法，利用次梯度和不精确的流形原语（一阶收缩和向量传输）进行非光滑测地凸优化。
ai.result: 首次建立了仅依赖不精确原语的oracle复杂度界：一般目标函数次线性收敛，在sharp增长条件下线性收敛。
ai.help_to_user: 为实际应用中无法负担精确流形计算的场景提供了理论保证和实用算法。

idea_spark.idea: 将束方法中的割平面模型与不精确收缩/传输结合，通过自适应步长控制误差累积。
idea_spark.risk: 不精确原语的误差界假设可能在实际中难以验证，影响收敛性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 借鉴了欧氏空间束方法的鲁棒性，将其扩展到非欧几何中处理近似计算。

en.tldr: Proposes a bundle method for nonsmooth Riemannian optimization that achieves sublinear or linear convergence using only inexact manifold primitives on Hadamard manifolds.
en.motivation: Existing methods on Hadamard manifolds either require exact exponential maps and parallel transport (computationally expensive) or lack non-asymptotic convergence guarantees.
en.method: Introduces a proximal bundle method that uses subgradients and inexact manifold primitives (first-order retractions and vector transports) for nonsmooth geodesically convex optimization.
en.result: Establishes the first oracle-complexity bounds relying only on inexact primitives: sublinear rates for general objectives and linear convergence under sharp function growth.
en.help_to_user: Provides theoretical guarantees and a practical algorithm for scenarios where exact manifold computations are infeasible.

idea_spark.idea: Combine cutting-plane models from bundle methods with inexact retractions/transports, controlling error accumulation via adaptive step sizes.
idea_spark.risk: Error bounds for inexact primitives may be hard to verify in practice, potentially affecting convergence.
idea_spark.inspiration: Draws on the robustness of Euclidean bundle methods, adapting them to non-Euclidean geometry with approximate computations.

papers.title: Generalizable Sparse-View 3D Reconstruction from Unconstrained Images
papers.summary: Reconstructing 3D scenes from sparse, unposed images remains challenging under real-world conditions with varying illumination and transient occlusions. Existing methods rely on scene-specific optimization using appearance embeddings or dynamic masks, which requires extensive per-scene training and fails under sparse views. Moreover, evaluations on limited scenes raise questions about generalization. We present GenWildSplat, a feed-forward framework for sparse-view outdoor reconstruction that requires no per-scene optimization. Given unposed internet images, GenWildSplat predicts depth, camera parameters, and 3D Gaussians in a canonical space using learned geometric priors. An appearance adapter modulates appearance for target lighting conditions, while semantic segmentation handles transient objects. Through curriculum learning on synthetic and real data, GenWildSplat generalizes across diverse illumination and occlusion patterns. Evaluations on PhotoTourism and MegaScenes benchmark demonstrate state-of-the-art feed-forward rendering quality, achieving real-time inference without test-time optimization

ai.tldr: 提出GenWildSplat，一种无需逐场景优化的前馈框架，能从无约束互联网图像中实现稀疏视角的3D重建。
ai.motivation: 现有方法依赖场景特定的外观嵌入或动态掩码，在稀疏视角下泛化能力差且需要大量逐场景训练。
ai.method: 利用学习到的几何先验预测深度、相机参数和规范空间中的3D高斯；外观适配器调节目标光照条件，语义分割处理瞬态物体；通过合成与真实数据的课程学习实现泛化。
ai.result: 在PhotoTourism和MegaScenes基准上达到最先进的前馈渲染质量，无需测试时优化即可实时推理。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户从少量无约束互联网图像快速重建高质量3D场景，适用于户外场景。

idea_spark.idea: 结合几何先验与外观调制，实现无需逐场景优化的稀疏视角重建。
idea_spark.risk: 对极端光照或严重遮挡场景的鲁棒性可能不足。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发将语义分割与外观调制结合，处理动态场景中的瞬态干扰。

en.tldr: Proposes GenWildSplat, a feed-forward framework for sparse-view 3D reconstruction from unconstrained internet images without per-scene optimization.
en.motivation: Existing methods rely on scene-specific appearance embeddings or dynamic masks, which generalize poorly under sparse views and require extensive per-scene training.
en.method: Predicts depth, camera parameters, and 3D Gaussians in canonical space using learned geometric priors; an appearance adapter modulates appearance for target lighting, and semantic segmentation handles transient objects; curriculum learning on synthetic and real data enables generalization.
en.result: Achieves state-of-the-art feed-forward rendering quality on PhotoTourism and MegaScenes benchmarks, with real-time inference and no test-time optimization.
en.help_to_user: Enables fast, high-quality 3D scene reconstruction from a few unconstrained internet images, suitable for outdoor scenes.

idea_spark.idea: Combines geometric priors with appearance modulation for sparse-view reconstruction without per-scene optimization.
idea_spark.risk: May struggle with extreme lighting or heavy occlusions.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires integrating semantic segmentation with appearance modulation to handle transient distractors in dynamic scenes.

papers.title: Hamilton--Jacobi theory for non-conservative field theories in the $k$-contact framework
papers.summary: This article develops a Hamilton--Jacobi theory for non-conservative classical field theories, with particular emphasis on dissipative systems, in the framework of co-oriented k-contact geometry. We introduce evolution k-contact k-vector fields, extending the contact evolution formalism to field theories, and analyse the corresponding Hamilton--De Donder--Weyl equations. Moreover, we develop two distinct families of Hamilton--Jacobi theories: a z-independent approach, based on the reconstruction of the dynamics from an integrable k-vector field defined on the base manifold of $(\bigoplus^kT^*Q)\times\mathbb{R}^k\to Q$, and a z-dependent approach, where the integrable k-vector field is defined on the base manifold of $(\bigoplus^kT^*Q)\times\mathbb{R}^k\to Q\times\mathbb{R}^k$. We develop in detail the important case of Hamiltonian functions with affine dependence on the dissipative variables, show how quadratic dependence on these variables can be used structurally to enlarge the range of applications, and recover the ordinary contact Hamilton--Jacobi theory as the particular case k=1, while removing some technical assumptions appearing in previous formulations. Our theory is illustrated through several representative examples, including the telegrapher/Klein--Gordon equation, a dissipative Hunter--Saxton equation, a simple dissipative non-regular first-order field model, and a relativistic thermodynamic model.

ai.tldr: 本文在共定向k-接触几何框架下，为非保守经典场论（特别是耗散系统）发展了Hamilton-Jacobi理论。
ai.motivation: 现有Hamilton-Jacobi理论主要针对保守系统，缺乏处理非保守场论（如耗散系统）的几何框架。
ai.method: 引入演化k-接触k-向量场，分析Hamilton-De Donder-Weyl方程，并发展z无关和z依赖两类Hamilton-Jacobi方法。
ai.result: 建立了非保守场论的Hamilton-Jacobi理论，涵盖耗散变量线性与二次依赖情形，推广了k=1时的接触Hamilton-Jacobi理论，并通过电报/Klein-Gordon方程、耗散Hunter-Saxton方程等实例验证。
ai.help_to_user: 为研究耗散场论（如阻尼波动、热力学）提供几何化求解工具，简化非保守系统的动力学分析。

idea_spark.idea: 将耗散变量视为额外维度，利用k-接触结构统一处理保守与耗散部分。
idea_spark.risk: 高维k-接触几何的数值实现可能复杂，且物理可解释性需进一步验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 借鉴接触几何在热力学中的应用，将耗散视为接触结构中的演化方向。

en.tldr: This paper develops a Hamilton-Jacobi theory for non-conservative classical field theories, especially dissipative systems, within the co-oriented k-contact geometric framework.
en.motivation: Existing Hamilton-Jacobi theory mainly addresses conservative systems, lacking a geometric framework for non-conservative field theories such as dissipative systems.
en.method: Introduces evolution k-contact k-vector fields, analyzes Hamilton-De Donder-Weyl equations, and develops two families of Hamilton-Jacobi approaches: z-independent and z-dependent.
en.result: Establishes a Hamilton-Jacobi theory for non-conservative field theories, covering linear and quadratic dependence on dissipative variables, generalizes the contact Hamilton-Jacobi theory for k=1, and validates with examples including the telegrapher/Klein-Gordon equation and dissipative Hunter-Saxton equation.
en.help_to_user: Provides a geometric tool for solving dissipative field theories (e.g., damped waves, thermodynamics), simplifying dynamics analysis of non-conservative systems.

idea_spark.idea: Treat dissipative variables as extra dimensions, using k-contact structure to unify conservative and dissipative parts.
idea_spark.risk: Numerical implementation of high-dimensional k-contact geometry may be complex, and physical interpretability requires further validation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by contact geometry in thermodynamics, treat dissipation as an evolution direction within the contact structure.

papers.title: Bound states of solitons in fiber lasers
papers.summary: This article presents a systematic review of theoretical and experimental findings for bound states of two and several dissipative solitons in fiber lasers. The theoretical basis underlying the formation and stabilization of soliton molecules in the fibers, which is provided by the complex Ginzburg-Landau equations and bound states of such equations, is presented in necessary detail, which is followed by a detailed presentation of experimental findings, including very recent ones. In particular, included are the results for the multi-soliton bound states in the fibers, as well as for the bound states in the temporal and frequency domains, single-component (scalar) and two-component (vector), two- and multi-soliton modes, as well as for bound states of spatiotemporal dissipative solitons in the lasers based on multimode fibers.

ai.tldr: 系统综述了光纤激光器中耗散孤子束缚态的理论与实验进展。
ai.motivation: 全面梳理孤子分子形成与稳定的理论基础及最新实验成果。
ai.method: 基于复Ginzburg-Landau方程及其束缚态理论，结合时域、频域、标量/矢量、双/多孤子及多模光纤中的时空耗散孤子束缚态实验。
ai.result: 涵盖双孤子及多孤子束缚态、时频域束缚态、单分量与双分量模式、以及多模光纤中的时空束缚态。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解光纤激光器中孤子束缚态的理论框架与实验现象。

idea_spark.inspiration: 借鉴分子物理中化学键概念，设计新型孤子分子结构。

en.tldr: A systematic review of theoretical and experimental findings on bound states of dissipative solitons in fiber lasers.
en.motivation: To comprehensively present the theoretical basis and latest experimental results on soliton molecule formation and stabilization.
en.method: Based on complex Ginzburg-Landau equations and their bound states, covering temporal/frequency domains, scalar/vector, two/multi-soliton modes, and spatiotemporal dissipative solitons in multimode fibers.
en.result: Includes bound states of two and several solitons, temporal and frequency domain bound states, single- and two-component modes, and spatiotemporal bound states in multimode fibers.
en.help_to_user: Provides a thorough understanding of the theory and experiments of soliton bound states in fiber lasers.

idea_spark.idea: Explore control and switching of spatiotemporal soliton bound states in multimode fibers.
idea_spark.risk: Experimental realization is complex, requiring precise laser parameter control.
idea_spark.inspiration: Draw inspiration from chemical bonds in molecular physics to design novel soliton molecule structures.

papers.title: A Regularized Hessian-Free Inexact Newton-Type Method with Global $\mathcal{O}(k^{-2})$ Convergence
papers.summary: We propose a regularized Hessian-free Newton-type method for minimizing smooth convex functions with Lipschitz continuous Hessians. The algorithm constructs an approximate Hessian by finite differences and selects the regularization parameter through an adaptive criterion that ensures sufficient decrease and gradient control. We prove that the method achieves a global $\mathcal{O}(k^{-2})$ convergence rate, matching the best known bound for second-order methods. A modified variant incorporating the exact Hessian when available enjoys local quadratic convergence under standard assumptions. Despite its simplicity, this variant is computationally faster than the \emph{Regularized Newton Method} of Mishchenko (2023) across several convex benchmark problems. Our analysis also provides explicit bounds on the regularization sequence and a worst-case iteration complexity of order $\mathcal{O}(\varepsilon^{-2})$. The proposed framework thus unifies regularized and Hessian-free Newton-type schemes, offering a theoretically sound and practically efficient alternative for smooth convex optimization.

ai.tldr: 提出一种正则化无海森牛顿型方法，通过有限差分近似海森矩阵并自适应选择正则化参数，实现全局 O(k^{-2}) 收敛率，并在精确海森可用时具有局部二次收敛。
ai.motivation: 现有正则化牛顿方法计算成本高，需要精确海森矩阵；而 Hessian-free 方法缺乏全局收敛保证。本文旨在结合两者优势，设计一种既理论可靠又计算高效的优化算法。
ai.method: 采用有限差分构造近似海森矩阵，通过自适应准则选择正则化参数以保证充分下降和梯度控制；当精确海森可用时，切换为修正变体以获得局部二次收敛。
ai.result: 全局收敛率达到 O(k^{-2})，与二阶方法的最佳已知界匹配；在多个凸基准问题上比 Mishchenko (2023) 的正则化牛顿方法计算更快；最坏情况迭代复杂度为 O(ε^{-2})。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种理论保证且实际高效的凸优化求解器，尤其适用于海森矩阵计算昂贵或不可得的大规模问题。

idea_spark.idea: 将有限差分步长与正则化参数联合优化，或引入拟牛顿更新以进一步降低每次迭代的计算成本。
idea_spark.risk: 有限差分近似可能引入数值误差，在病态问题或高精度要求下收敛可能退化；自适应准则的调参需要额外验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受正则化牛顿方法（Mishchenko 2023）和 Hessian-free 优化（如 Martens 2010）的启发，试图在理论收敛率与计算效率之间取得平衡。

en.tldr: Proposes a regularized Hessian-free Newton-type method that approximates the Hessian via finite differences and adaptively selects the regularization parameter, achieving global O(k^{-2}) convergence and local quadratic convergence when the exact Hessian is available.
en.motivation: Existing regularized Newton methods require exact Hessians and are computationally expensive, while Hessian-free methods lack global convergence guarantees. This work aims to combine the strengths of both to design a theoretically sound and practically efficient optimization algorithm.
en.method: Constructs an approximate Hessian via finite differences and selects the regularization parameter through an adaptive criterion ensuring sufficient decrease and gradient control; a modified variant uses the exact Hessian when available for local quadratic convergence.
en.result: Achieves a global O(k^{-2}) convergence rate, matching the best known bound for second-order methods; computationally faster than the Regularized Newton Method of Mishchenko (2023) on several convex benchmarks; worst-case iteration complexity of O(ε^{-2}).
en.help_to_user: Provides a theoretically guaranteed and practically efficient convex optimizer, especially useful for large-scale problems where Hessian computation is expensive or unavailable.

idea_spark.idea: Jointly optimize the finite-difference step size and regularization parameter, or incorporate quasi-Newton updates to further reduce per-iteration cost.
idea_spark.risk: Finite-difference approximation may introduce numerical errors, potentially degrading convergence on ill-conditioned problems or under high precision requirements; the adaptive criterion requires additional tuning validation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by regularized Newton methods (Mishchenko 2023) and Hessian-free optimization (e.g., Martens 2010), aiming to balance theoretical convergence rates and computational efficiency.

papers.title: Mean-Field Systems with Heterogeneous Subteams: Optimality of Cluster-Symmetric Independent Policies and Equivalence with Decentralized McKean-Vlasov Control of Cluster-Representative Agents
papers.summary: Across science and engineering, mean-field methods have been a powerful and versatile approach for the analysis of systems of many interacting elements. However, common arguments used to characterize an infinite population limit can be quite restrictive from a modeling perspective by requiring that all agents be identical (i.e. symmetric, or homogeneous). In this paper, we consider large interactive particle systems under agent heterogeneity for a class of discrete time teams composed of finitely many species of agents, grouped into symmetric subteams, called clusters. In particular, for the class of discounted, partially exchangeable cost criteria considered, we establish the optimality of centralized joint policies which are exchangeable within each cluster and depend on the agent ensemble only up to the state empirical distribution over each cluster. Following this, a generalization of De Finetti's theorem is used to demonstrate the subsequential convergence of these optimal policies to one which is decentralized (depending on only the local state and distribution over each cluster) and symmetric within each subteam as the population size approaches infinity. This solution is shown to induce a sequence of asymptotically optimal policies for the finite population problems which retain their structure and decentralization. Furthermore, our analysis justifies the optimality of a decentralized McKean-Vlasov team representation involving coupled representative agents for each of the clusters, and establishes a verification theorem/value iterations for the mean-field limit. In this way, we provide an avenue for analyzing complex, cooperative systems with finite heterogeneity and set the stage for further research on learning algorithms.

ai.tldr: 本文研究具有有限异质性的大规模交互粒子系统，证明在部分可交换代价准则下，集中式联合策略的最优性，并利用De Finetti定理推广得到去中心化、簇内对称的渐近最优策略，建立簇代表智能体的McKean-Vlasov团队控制等价表示。
ai.motivation: 现有平均场方法通常假设所有智能体同质，限制了建模灵活性。本文旨在处理有限种智能体（簇）构成的异质系统，并建立最优控制的理论基础。
ai.method: 考虑离散时间团队，智能体分为有限个对称子团队（簇），采用折扣部分可交换代价准则。首先证明集中式联合策略在簇内可交换且仅依赖各簇状态经验分布时最优；然后利用De Finetti定理的推广，证明当群体规模趋于无穷时，这些最优策略收敛到去中心化、簇内对称的策略，并诱导有限群体渐近最优策略序列。最后建立去中心化McKean-Vlasov团队表示及验证定理。
ai.result: 建立了异质多智能体系统平均场极限的最优性理论，包括簇对称独立策略的最优性、去中心化McKean-Vlasov控制等价表示，以及验证定理/值迭代。
ai.help_to_user: 为分析具有有限异质性的合作系统提供了严格的理论框架，可用于设计去中心化控制策略和后续学习算法。

idea_spark.idea: 将簇代表智能体的McKean-Vlasov控制与强化学习结合，设计可扩展的异质多智能体学习算法。
idea_spark.risk: 理论假设（部分可交换性、折扣代价）可能不适用于所有实际场景，且无穷极限近似在有限群体中的误差需进一步量化。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受De Finetti定理推广的启发，可探索其他对称性（如时间对称）在平均场控制中的应用。

en.tldr: This paper studies large interactive particle systems with finite heterogeneity, proving optimality of centralized joint policies under partially exchangeable cost criteria, and using a generalization of De Finetti's theorem to derive decentralized, cluster-symmetric asymptotically optimal policies, establishing an equivalent decentralized McKean-Vlasov team representation with cluster-representative agents.
en.motivation: Existing mean-field methods often assume agent homogeneity, limiting modeling flexibility. This work aims to handle systems with finitely many species of agents (clusters) and establish a theoretical foundation for optimal control.
en.method: Consider discrete-time teams with agents grouped into finitely many symmetric subteams (clusters) under discounted, partially exchangeable cost criteria. First, prove optimality of centralized joint policies that are exchangeable within each cluster and depend only on the state empirical distribution per cluster. Then, using a generalization of De Finetti's theorem, show that as population size goes to infinity, these optimal policies converge to decentralized, cluster-symmetric policies, inducing asymptotically optimal policies for finite populations. Finally, establish a decentralized McKean-Vlasov team representation and a verification theorem.
en.result: Established optimality theory for mean-field limits of heterogeneous multi-agent systems, including optimality of cluster-symmetric independent policies, decentralized McKean-Vlasov control equivalence, and verification theorem/value iterations.
en.help_to_user: Provides a rigorous theoretical framework for analyzing cooperative systems with finite heterogeneity, useful for designing decentralized control strategies and subsequent learning algorithms.

idea_spark.idea: Combine the cluster-representative McKean-Vlasov control with reinforcement learning to design scalable heterogeneous multi-agent learning algorithms.
idea_spark.risk: Theoretical assumptions (partial exchangeability, discounted cost) may not hold in all practical scenarios, and the approximation error of the infinite limit for finite populations needs further quantification.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the generalization of De Finetti's theorem, one could explore other symmetries (e.g., temporal symmetry) in mean-field control.

papers.title: Supercriticality of the SIRS on random networks
papers.summary: We study how long the SIRS process persists or how quickly it reaches extinction across various network topologies. Our results provide a three-part characterization of this process: In finite sparse graphs, we prove the existence of a regime where the process survives for an exponentially long time. In heavy-tailed networks with power-law-like exponents, we show that for all range of parameters, the survival time is exponential. Finally, for infinite trees, we find sufficient conditions for strong survival, showing the root is re-infected infinitely often even for light-tailed distributions like the Poisson distribution.

ai.tldr: 研究SIRS过程在随机网络上的持续或灭绝时间，给出三种网络拓扑下的特征刻画。
ai.motivation: 理解传染病模型在复杂网络中的持久性机制。
ai.method: 对有限稀疏图、重尾网络和无限树分别进行数学分析。
ai.result: 有限稀疏图中存在指数级存活时间区间；重尾网络中所有参数下存活时间均为指数级；无限树上找到强存活条件。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解不同网络结构对传染病持续性的影响。

idea_spark.idea: 利用网络拓扑的度分布特征预测系统存活概率。
idea_spark.risk: 理论结果可能对实际网络参数敏感。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发设计更鲁棒的流行病控制策略。

en.tldr: We characterize the survival time of the SIRS process on random networks, showing exponential survival in finite sparse graphs and heavy-tailed networks, and strong survival conditions on infinite trees.
en.motivation: To understand the persistence mechanisms of epidemic models on complex networks.
en.method: Mathematical analysis on finite sparse graphs, heavy-tailed networks, and infinite trees.
en.result: Exponential survival time exists in finite sparse graphs; all parameters yield exponential survival in heavy-tailed networks; sufficient conditions for strong survival on infinite trees.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how different network structures affect epidemic persistence.

idea_spark.idea: Use degree distribution features of network topology to predict system survival probability.
idea_spark.risk: Theoretical results may be sensitive to real-world network parameters.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires design of more robust epidemic control strategies.

papers.title: Expected hyperbolic volumes of random beta polytopes
papers.summary: Let $X_1,\ldots,X_n$ be independent random points in the closed unit ball of $\mathbb{R}^d$. Assume that each $X_i$ has a beta distribution with parameter $β_i \ge -1$: if $β_i>-1$, then $X_i$ has Lebesgue density proportional to $(1-\|x\|^2)^{β_i}$ on $\{\|x\|<1\}$, whereas the case $β_i=-1$ corresponds to the uniform distribution on the unit sphere $\{\|x\|=1\}$. Let $[X_1,\ldots,X_n]$ denote the convex hull of these points. Interpreting the unit ball as the Klein model of hyperbolic geometry, we derive closed-form formulas for the expected hyperbolic volume of the random hyperbolic polytope $[X_1,\ldots,X_n]$. As a special case, if $X_1,\ldots,X_n$ are independent and uniformly distributed on the unit sphere in $\mathbb{R}^3$, then for every $n\ge 4$, \[ \mathbb{E}\,\operatorname{Vol}_{3}^{\mathrm{hyp}}\!\bigl([X_1,\ldots,X_n]\bigr) = π\left(\frac{n}{2}-\sum_{j=1}^{n-1}\frac{1}{j}\right). \]

ai.tldr: 推导了随机beta多面体在Klein模型下期望双曲体积的闭式公式，包括球面上均匀分布的特例。
ai.motivation: 研究随机点集凸包在双曲几何中的体积期望，填补随机多面体理论在双曲空间中的空白。
ai.method: 利用Klein模型将单位球视为双曲空间，对独立服从beta分布的随机点凸包进行期望体积的解析计算。
ai.result: 得到了期望双曲体积的闭式表达式，特别地，在三维球面均匀分布下给出了简洁的调和数公式。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了随机双曲多面体体积的精确解析结果，可用于高维几何或概率论中的相关研究。

idea_spark.idea: 将beta分布参数与双曲体积的显式表达式结合，可能用于设计新的几何概率模型。
idea_spark.risk: 公式推导依赖于Klein模型的特殊性质，推广到其他双曲模型可能复杂。
idea_spark.inspiration: 调和数形式的简洁结果暗示与组合结构（如随机树）的潜在联系。

en.tldr: Derives closed-form formulas for the expected hyperbolic volume of random beta polytopes in the Klein model, including a special case for uniform points on the sphere in ℝ³.
en.motivation: To study the expected volume of convex hulls of random points in hyperbolic geometry, filling a gap in stochastic geometry.
en.method: Uses the Klein model to interpret the unit ball as hyperbolic space and analytically computes the expected volume of convex hulls of independent beta-distributed points.
en.result: Obtains closed-form expressions for the expected hyperbolic volume; notably, for uniform points on the 3-sphere, the formula involves a harmonic sum.
en.help_to_user: Provides exact analytic results for random hyperbolic polytope volumes, useful for research in high-dimensional geometry or probability.

idea_spark.idea: Combine beta distribution parameters with explicit hyperbolic volume expressions to design new geometric probability models.
idea_spark.risk: Derivation relies on specific properties of the Klein model; generalization to other hyperbolic models may be nontrivial.
idea_spark.inspiration: The harmonic number form suggests potential connections to combinatorial structures like random trees.

papers.title: h-Adaptive FV Subcell Shock-Capturing for DGSEM on Heterogeneous Curvilinear Meshes
papers.summary: High-order methods offer superior dispersion and dissipation properties compared to low-order schemes but require robust stabilization for discontinuities. To ensure stability, local artificial viscosity is common, but often degrades sub-element resolution. Conversely, subcell resolution preserving limiting strategies such as the finite volume subcell method are typically restricted to uniform topologies, such as purely hexahedral, or simplex meshes. This leaves a significant gap in treating the hybrid-element topologies necessary for complex engineering geometries. This paper presents a robust shock-capturing approach for the discontinuous Galerkin spectral element method on mixed curvilinear meshes containing hexahedral, prismatic, tetrahedral, and pyramid elements. Non-hexahedral elements are handled via collapsed coordinate transformations. The proposed method utilizes an h-adaptive finite volume subcell scheme with arbitrary subcell resolution; 2N + 1 in this work. The schemes essential properties, including conservation, spatial convergence, and the shock capturing capabilities are verified. Finally, the method's applicability to complex configurations is demonstrated through a simulation of the flow around a NACA 0012 airfoil.

ai.tldr: 提出一种针对混合曲网格的h自适应有限体积子单元激波捕捉方法，兼容六面体、棱柱、四面体和金字塔单元。
ai.motivation: 高阶方法在间断处需要稳定化，现有子单元保分辨率限制策略局限于均匀拓扑网格，无法处理工程复杂几何中的混合单元拓扑。
ai.method: 采用基于折叠坐标变换的非六面体单元处理，结合h自适应有限体积子单元方案，子单元分辨率设为2N+1。
ai.result: 验证了守恒性、空间收敛性和激波捕捉能力，并通过NACA 0012翼型绕流模拟展示了复杂构型的适用性。
ai.help_to_user: 为混合曲网格上的高阶DG方法提供了一种鲁棒的激波捕捉方案，适用于复杂工程几何。

idea_spark.idea: 将子单元分辨率与局部网格特征（如曲率、单元类型）动态关联，实现自适应精度控制。
idea_spark.risk: 折叠坐标变换可能引入额外数值误差，需验证对非六面体单元精度的影响。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受混合网格拓扑需求启发，可进一步探索各向异性子单元细化策略。

zh.motivation: 高阶方法在间断处需要稳定化，现有子单元保分辨率限制策略局限于均匀拓扑网格，无法处理工程复杂几何中的混合单元拓扑。

zh.result: 验证了守恒性、空间收敛性和激波捕捉能力，并通过NACA 0012翼型绕流模拟展示了复杂构型的适用性。
zh.help_to_user: 为混合曲网格上的高阶DG方法提供了一种鲁棒的激波捕捉方案，适用于复杂工程几何。

idea_spark.idea: 将子单元分辨率与局部网格特征（如曲率、单元类型）动态关联，实现自适应精度控制。
idea_spark.risk: 折叠坐标变换可能引入额外数值误差，需验证对非六面体单元精度的影响。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受混合网格拓扑需求启发，可进一步探索各向异性子单元细化策略。

en.tldr: An h-adaptive finite volume subcell shock-capturing method for mixed curvilinear meshes, supporting hexahedral, prismatic, tetrahedral, and pyramid elements.
en.motivation: High-order methods need robust stabilization at discontinuities; existing subcell resolution preserving limiters are restricted to uniform topologies, leaving a gap for hybrid-element meshes in complex engineering geometries.
en.method: Non-hexahedral elements are handled via collapsed coordinate transformations, combined with an h-adaptive finite volume subcell scheme with subcell resolution of 2N+1.
en.result: Conservation, spatial convergence, and shock-capturing capability are verified; applicability to complex configurations is demonstrated via NACA 0012 airfoil simulation.
en.help_to_user: Provides a robust shock-capturing approach for high-order DG methods on mixed curvilinear meshes, suitable for complex engineering geometries.

idea_spark.idea: Dynamically link subcell resolution to local mesh features (curvature, element type) for adaptive accuracy control.
idea_spark.risk: Collapsed coordinate transformations may introduce additional numerical errors; impact on accuracy for non-hexahedral elements needs verification.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the need for hybrid mesh topologies, further exploration of anisotropic subcell refinement strategies is possible.

papers.title: A Geometric Perspective on Polynomially Solvable Convex Maximization
papers.summary: Convex maximization encompasses a broad class of optimization problems and is generally NP-hard, even for low-rank objectives. This paper investigates structural conditions under which convex maximization becomes polynomially solvable. From a geometric perspective, we introduce comonotonicity, a structural property of the feasible region crucial for problem tractability, and establish mathematical characterizations of this property. Under comonotonicity and mild additional assumptions, we develop a unified enumerative framework showing that fixed-rank convex maximization is polynomially solvable. This viewpoint recovers several known tractability results that previously required separate analyses, such as fixed-rank convex matroid maximization and sparse principal component analysis (SPCA). Furthermore, for the more structured class of standard comonotone feasible regions, we refine the analysis via a lifting technique to achieve a square-root improvement in the complexity bound. Finally, applications to SPCA and its variants illustrate the broad applicability and effectiveness of the proposed framework.

ai.tldr: 从几何角度研究凸最大化问题的多项式可解性，引入共单调性这一结构性质，并建立统一枚举框架。
ai.motivation: 凸最大化通常NP难，但某些结构条件下可多项式求解，现有结果分散，缺乏统一视角。
ai.method: 提出共单调性概念并给出数学刻画，基于此构建统一枚举框架，对标准共单调可行域采用提升技术改进复杂度。
ai.result: 固定秩凸最大化在共单调性下多项式可解，恢复并统一了凸拟阵最大化、稀疏主成分分析等已知结果，复杂度界有平方根改进。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户识别凸最大化问题中可高效求解的结构条件，并提供统一分析工具。

idea_spark.idea: 将共单调性与提升技术结合，可能用于设计更高效的稀疏学习算法。
idea_spark.risk: 共单调性条件可能过于严格，实际应用中难以满足。
idea_spark.inspiration: 几何视角下的结构性质（如共单调性）为设计多项式算法提供了新思路。

idea_spark.inspiration: 几何视角下的结构性质（如共单调性）为设计多项式算法提供了新思路。

en.tldr: From a geometric perspective, this paper introduces comonotonicity as a structural property enabling polynomial solvability of convex maximization, and develops a unified enumerative framework.
en.motivation: Convex maximization is generally NP-hard, but known tractable cases lack a unified explanation.
en.method: Introduces comonotonicity with mathematical characterizations, builds a unified enumerative framework, and refines complexity via lifting for standard comonotone feasible regions.
en.result: Fixed-rank convex maximization under comonotonicity is polynomially solvable, recovering and unifying results like convex matroid maximization and SPCA, with a square-root improvement in complexity.
en.help_to_user: Helps identify structural conditions for efficient convex maximization and provides a unified analysis tool.

idea_spark.idea: Combining comonotonicity with lifting could lead to more efficient sparse learning algorithms.
idea_spark.risk: Comonotonicity may be too restrictive for many real-world problems.
idea_spark.inspiration: Geometric structural properties like comonotonicity offer new avenues for polynomial-time algorithms.

papers.title: Perturbative Coulomb branches on $\mathbb{R}^3\times S^1$: the global D-term potential
papers.summary: We find the perturbative potential on the 3d $\mathcal{N}\!=\!2$ Coulomb branch arising from a chiral 4d $\mathcal{N}\!=\!1$ gauge theory on $\mathbb{R}^3 \times S^1$, zeta-regularizing the D-term couplings generated by the Kaluza-Klein modes. This fills a significant gap in the literature on circle-compactified SUSY gauge theories. Unlike earlier indirect approaches to the circle reduction of chiral theories, our formula provides a global view of the Coulomb branch, necessary for capturing holonomy saddles and for systematic implementation. The zero locus of the potential identifies perturbative SUSY vacua, and we show how data-analysis techniques (such as RANSAC hyperplane detection) numerically extract the structure of the moduli space when this locus is extended. Our formula yields new results even in abelian theories, and offers a new perspective on several earlier observations in the context of the Cardy limit of the superconformal index. In particular, circle reductions (of interest in the SCFT/VOA correspondence) found earlier from limits of the index can now be reproduced on $\mathbb{R}^3 \times S^1$. An appendix shows how our 3d $\mathcal{N}\!=\!2$ potential is related to a function arising in the Cardy limit of the index analogously to how the 4d $\mathcal{N}\!=\!2$ prepotential arises in a limit of the Nekrasov partition function.

ai.tldr: 通过zeta正则化Kaluza-Klein模的D项耦合，找到了4d N=1手征规范理论在R^3×S^1上约化后的3d N=2库仑支上的微扰势，填补了圈紧化手征理论文献中的空白。
ai.motivation: 现有文献缺乏对圈紧化手征理论库仑支的全局描述，无法捕捉holonomy鞍点并系统实现。
ai.method: 采用zeta正则化处理Kaluza-Klein模产生的D项耦合，推导出微扰势的全局公式；利用RANSAC超平面检测等数据分析技术数值提取模空间结构。
ai.result: 得到了微扰势的显式公式，其零点确定微扰SUSY真空；在阿贝尔理论中产生新结果，并重现了超共形指标Cardy极限中的早期观察。
ai.help_to_user: 为圈紧化手征规范理论提供了库仑支的全局势能，有助于理解holonomy鞍点和模空间结构。

idea_spark.idea: 将数据分析技术（如RANSAC）应用于理论物理中模空间结构的数值提取。
idea_spark.risk: 数值方法可能依赖参数选择，且对高维模空间的可扩展性需验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从超共形指标Cardy极限的类比中，启发将指标计算与场论紧化势能直接关联。

en.tldr: We find the perturbative potential on the 3d N=2 Coulomb branch from a chiral 4d N=1 gauge theory on R^3×S^1, zeta-regularizing D-term couplings from Kaluza-Klein modes, filling a gap in circle-compactified SUSY gauge theories.
en.motivation: Previous indirect approaches lacked a global view of the Coulomb branch for chiral theories, necessary for capturing holonomy saddles and systematic implementation.
en.method: Zeta-regularization of D-term couplings from Kaluza-Klein modes yields a global formula for the perturbative potential; data-analysis techniques like RANSAC hyperplane detection numerically extract moduli space structure.
en.result: Explicit formula for the perturbative potential, whose zero locus identifies perturbative SUSY vacua; new results in abelian theories and reproduction of earlier observations from the Cardy limit of the superconformal index.
en.help_to_user: Provides a global potential on the Coulomb branch for circle-compactified chiral gauge theories, aiding understanding of holonomy saddles and moduli space structure.

idea_spark.idea: Use data-analysis techniques like RANSAC for numerical extraction of moduli space structure in theoretical physics.
idea_spark.risk: Numerical methods may depend on parameter choices; scalability to higher-dimensional moduli spaces needs verification.
idea_spark.inspiration: Analogy with the Cardy limit of the superconformal index inspires direct connection between index calculations and field theory compactification potentials.

papers.title: Learning to Reason: Targeted Knowledge Discovery and Fuzzy Logic Update for Robust Image Recognition
papers.summary: Integrating domain knowledge into deep neural networks is a promising way to improve generalization. Existing methods either encode prior knowledge in the loss function or apply post-processing modules, but both depend on identifying useful symbolic knowledge to integrate. Since such rules are often unavailable in real-world vision tasks, we propose a method for targeted knowledge discovery. We propose a Differentiable Knowledge Unit (DKU) that enables modulating the classifier logits, yielding refined class probabilities. The DKU uses implication rules to represent relationships between task classes and implicit concepts learned entirely from the main task supervision, without requiring concept labels. Concepts are identified by dedicated classifiers, whose probabilities are passed to DKU alongside the primary class probabilities. DKU computes a logic-based adjustment vector via fuzzy inference, which modulates the primary class logits to yield refined class probabilities. When concept classifiers represent concepts that do not support the logical rule structure, the resulting adjustments to the class probabilities do not directly minimize the supervision loss. Consequently, optimizing the supervision loss on these adjusted class probabilities implicitly trains the concept classifiers. We construct the rule base so that bidirectional logical relations connect concepts and classes. We enforce the concepts to be distinct from each other and with respect to the classes. This design enforces a clean supervision signal for concept learning. We evaluate our methods on the PASCAL-VOC, COCO, and MedMNIST datasets. We demonstrate improvement through our knowledge integration across these datasets. We conduct domain generalization and hard-sample ablation studies and find that our implicit knowledge discovery and integration outperforms the baseline.

ai.tldr: 提出一种可微知识单元（DKU），通过模糊推理和逻辑规则从主任务监督中隐式发现并整合领域知识，提升图像识别鲁棒性。
ai.motivation: 现有知识集成方法依赖预定义符号规则，而实际视觉任务中这类规则往往缺失。
ai.method: 设计可微知识单元（DKU），利用蕴含规则连接任务类别与隐式概念，通过模糊推理生成调整向量修正分类器logits，概念分类器由主任务损失隐式训练。
ai.result: 在PASCAL-VOC、COCO、MedMNIST上优于基线，领域泛化和困难样本消融实验验证有效性。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种无需概念标注即可自动发现并集成逻辑知识的方法，适用于鲁棒图像识别。

idea_spark.idea: 将模糊逻辑与可微推理结合，使网络在训练中自主构建概念-类别关系。
idea_spark.risk: 规则库设计可能引入偏差，复杂场景下概念可解释性需验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用逻辑约束引导隐式概念学习，避免人工标注成本。

en.tldr: Proposes a Differentiable Knowledge Unit (DKU) that discovers and integrates domain knowledge implicitly via fuzzy inference and logical rules, improving robust image recognition.
en.motivation: Existing knowledge integration methods rely on predefined symbolic rules, which are often unavailable in real-world vision tasks.
en.method: Designs a Differentiable Knowledge Unit (DKU) that uses implication rules to connect task classes with implicit concepts, generates an adjustment vector via fuzzy inference to modulate classifier logits, and trains concept classifiers implicitly through the main task loss.
en.result: Outperforms baselines on PASCAL-VOC, COCO, and MedMNIST; domain generalization and hard-sample ablation studies confirm effectiveness.
en.help_to_user: Provides a method to automatically discover and integrate logical knowledge without concept labels, enhancing robust image recognition.

idea_spark.idea: Combines fuzzy logic with differentiable reasoning, enabling the network to autonomously build concept-class relationships during training.
idea_spark.risk: Rule base design may introduce bias; concept interpretability in complex scenarios needs verification.
idea_spark.inspiration: Leverages logical constraints to guide implicit concept learning, avoiding manual annotation costs.

papers.title: 3D-ReGen: A Unified 3D Geometry Regeneration Framework
papers.summary: We consider the problem of regenerating 3D objects from 2D images and initial 3D shapes. Most 3D generators operate in a one-shot fashion, converting text or images to a 3D object with limited controllability. We introduce instead 3D-ReGen, a 3D regenerator that is conditioned on an initial 3D shape. This conceptually simple formulation allows us to support numerous useful tasks, including 3D enhancement, reconstruction, and editing. 3D-ReGen uses a new conditioning mechanism based on VecSet, which allows the regenerator to update or improve the input geometry with consistent fine-grained details. 3D-ReGen learns a widely applicable regeneration prior from off-the-shelf 3D datasets via self-supervised pretext tasks and augmentations, without additional annotations. We evaluate both the geometric consistency and fine-grained quality of 3D-ReGen, achieving state-of-the-art performance in controllable 3D generation across several tasks.

ai.tldr: 提出3D-ReGen框架，通过初始3D形状和2D图像进行统一的3D几何再生，支持增强、重建和编辑任务。
ai.motivation: 现有3D生成器多为一次性转换，缺乏对初始形状的控制和细粒度细节的保持。
ai.method: 基于VecSet的新条件机制，结合自监督预文本任务和数据增强，从现成3D数据集学习再生先验。
ai.result: 在多个可控3D生成任务上达到最先进性能，兼顾几何一致性和细粒度质量。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户从2D图像和粗糙3D形状生成高质量、可控的3D模型。

idea_spark.idea: 利用自监督预文本任务学习通用再生先验，无需额外标注。
idea_spark.risk: 对初始形状质量敏感，可能影响再生效果。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将再生问题形式化为条件生成，统一多种3D任务。

en.tldr: Proposes 3D-ReGen, a unified 3D geometry regeneration framework conditioned on an initial 3D shape and 2D images, supporting enhancement, reconstruction, and editing.
en.motivation: Existing 3D generators are mostly one-shot, lacking controllability and fine-grained detail preservation from initial shapes.
en.method: Uses a novel VecSet conditioning mechanism and learns a regeneration prior via self-supervised pretext tasks and augmentations on off-the-shelf 3D datasets.
en.result: Achieves state-of-the-art performance on multiple controllable 3D generation tasks with geometric consistency and fine-grained quality.
en.help_to_user: Helps users generate high-quality, controllable 3D models from 2D images and coarse 3D shapes.

idea_spark.idea: Leverages self-supervised pretext tasks to learn a general regeneration prior without extra annotations.
idea_spark.risk: Sensitive to initial shape quality, which may affect regeneration outcomes.
idea_spark.inspiration: Formulates regeneration as conditional generation to unify diverse 3D tasks.

papers.title: Multiphase quadrature domains (existence and uniqueness)
papers.summary: The primary goal of this paper is to give a precise definition and prove existence and uniqueness of multiphase quadrature domains for subharmonic functions, ensuring that the prescribed measures are supported in the interior of the resulting domains. The approach to prove existence is based on a variational framework, where we minimize an energy functional over so called segregated states. In this respect we refine earlier results in this direction. But we also show that this approach alone is not enough for two reasons. First of all it seems hard to get existence results which ensure that the interior support condition is satisfied. And second it may happen, as we show by an example, that a multiphase quadrature domain exists but is not a minimizer of the energy functional.   The main novelty of this work is the study of minimizers, if they exist, of the energy functional over a subset of the segregated states given by a natural constraint with respect to the given measures. From this approach we are able to prove uniqueness, and also give sufficient conditions for existence. We also give an example showing that, unlike the energy minimization and partial balayage approaches which are equivalent in the one-phase case, this equivalence breaks down already in the two-phase setting.

ai.tldr: 本文精确定义了多相求积域，并证明了其在次调和函数下的存在性与唯一性，同时揭示了能量最小化方法在多于一个相时的局限性。
ai.motivation: 现有单相求积域理论已成熟，但多相情形缺乏严格定义和存在唯一性结果，且能量最小化方法无法保证内部支撑条件。
ai.method: 采用变分框架，在受自然约束的隔离状态子集上最小化能量泛函，并结合反例分析方法的局限性。
ai.result: 证明了唯一性，给出了存在性的充分条件；发现两相情形下能量最小化与部分扫除方法不等价。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解多相求积域的数学基础，以及变分方法在自由边界问题中的适用边界。

idea_spark.idea: 将能量泛函的约束条件从全局隔离状态放松为局部支撑条件，可能催生新的数值算法。
idea_spark.risk: 约束子集的选择可能过于严格，导致某些物理上合理的多相配置被排除。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受单相求积域变分法启发，但发现多相时等价性失效，提示需要更精细的约束设计。

idea_spark.risk: 约束子集的选择可能过于严格，导致某些物理上合理的多相配置被排除。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受单相求积域变分法启发，但发现多相时等价性失效，提示需要更精细的约束设计。

en.tldr: This paper gives a precise definition of multiphase quadrature domains for subharmonic functions, proves existence and uniqueness, and reveals limitations of energy minimization beyond one phase.
en.motivation: Existing theory for single-phase quadrature domains is mature, but multiphase cases lack rigorous definition and existence/uniqueness results, and energy minimization fails to guarantee interior support conditions.
en.method: A variational framework is employed, minimizing an energy functional over a subset of segregated states subject to a natural constraint, supplemented by counterexamples to analyze method limitations.
en.result: Uniqueness is proved, sufficient conditions for existence are given, and it is shown that energy minimization and partial balayage are not equivalent already in the two-phase setting.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand the mathematical foundations of multiphase quadrature domains and the applicability boundaries of variational methods in free boundary problems.

idea_spark.idea: Relaxing the global segregated state constraint to a local support condition in the energy functional may lead to novel numerical algorithms.
idea_spark.risk: The constrained subset may be too restrictive, excluding physically plausible multiphase configurations.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by variational methods for single-phase quadrature domains, but the breakdown of equivalence in multiphase cases suggests the need for more refined constraint design.

papers.title: Rising GUE Eigenvalue Process from a Fixed Level
papers.summary: We construct the multilevel correlation kernel for the rising GUE eigenvalue process starting from a fixed initial configuration $x^{(m)}$, and show that it converges on short time scales (as quickly as $\text{polylog}(m)$) to the extended semi-discrete sine kernel. As an application, we show fixed-energy universality of bulk local statistics of complex Hermitian Wigner matrices matching the covariance structure of GUE and with a finite $4+\varepsilon$ moment for $\varepsilon>0$. This application demonstrates that it is possible to obtain universality of bulk local statistics under near-optimal moment assumptions without using a Dyson Brownian motion relaxation step, which was a key ingredient in many results on this topic.

ai.tldr: 构造了从固定初始构型出发的上升GUE特征值过程的多层关联核，并证明其在短时间尺度上收敛到扩展半离散正弦核；作为应用，在近最优矩条件下证明了复Hermitian Wigner矩阵的体局部统计量的固定能量普适性。
ai.motivation: 在近最优矩假设下获得体局部统计量的普适性，避免使用Dyson布朗运动松弛步骤。
ai.method: 构造多层关联核并分析其短时间收敛性。
ai.result: 上升GUE特征值过程的多层关联核在短时间尺度上收敛到扩展半离散正弦核，并由此导出固定能量普适性。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了在更弱矩条件下证明随机矩阵普适性的新途径。

idea_spark.idea: 利用上升GUE过程替代Dyson布朗运动作为普适性证明的工具。
idea_spark.risk: 扩展半离散正弦核的普适性可能依赖于GUE的协方差结构。
idea_spark.inspiration: 短时间收敛性可能为其他随机过程的普适性研究提供新思路。

zh.help_to_user: 提供了在更弱矩条件下证明随机矩阵普适性的新途径。

idea_spark.risk: 扩展半离散正弦核的普适性可能依赖于GUE的协方差结构。
idea_spark.inspiration: 短时间收敛性可能为其他随机过程的普适性研究提供新思路。

en.tldr: Constructs the multilevel correlation kernel for the rising GUE eigenvalue process from a fixed initial configuration and proves its convergence to the extended semi-discrete sine kernel on short time scales; as an application, obtains fixed-energy universality of bulk local statistics for complex Hermitian Wigner matrices under near-optimal moment assumptions.
en.motivation: To obtain universality of bulk local statistics under near-optimal moment assumptions without using a Dyson Brownian motion relaxation step.
en.method: Constructs the multilevel correlation kernel and analyzes its short-time convergence.
en.result: The multilevel correlation kernel converges to the extended semi-discrete sine kernel on short time scales, leading to fixed-energy universality.
en.help_to_user: Provides a new approach to proving universality in random matrix theory under weaker moment conditions.

idea_spark.idea: Use the rising GUE process as a tool for universality proofs instead of Dyson Brownian motion.
idea_spark.risk: The universality of the extended semi-discrete sine kernel may depend on the covariance structure of GUE.
idea_spark.inspiration: Short-time convergence may inspire new approaches to universality in other stochastic processes.

papers.title: RAY-TOLD: Ray-Based Latent Dynamics for Dense Dynamic Obstacle Avoidance with TDMPC
papers.summary: Dense, dynamic crowds pose a persistent challenge for autonomous mobile robots. Purely reactive planning methods, such as Model Predictive Path Integral (MPPI) control, often fail to escape local minima in complex scenarios due to their limited prediction horizon. To bridge this gap, we propose Ray-based Task-Oriented Latent Dynamics (RAY-TOLD), a hybrid control architecture that integrates obstacle information into latent dynamics and utilizes the robustness of physics-based MPPI with the long-horizon foresight of reinforcement learning. RAY-TOLD leverages a LiDAR-centric latent dynamics model to encode high-dimensional sensor data into a compact state representation, enabling the learning of a terminal value function and a policy prior. We introduce a policy mixture sampling strategy that augments the MPPI candidate population with trajectories derived from the learned policy, effectively guiding the planner towards the goal while maintaining kinematic feasibility. Extensive tests in a stochastic environment with high-density dynamic obstacles demonstrate that our method outperforms the MPPI baseline, reducing the collision rate. The results confirm that blending short-horizon physics-based rollouts with learned long-horizon intent significantly enhances navigation reliability and safety.

ai.tldr: 提出RAY-TOLD混合控制架构，结合MPPI的短视鲁棒性与强化学习的长视预见性，通过激光雷达潜动力学模型和策略混合采样，显著降低密集动态障碍环境中的碰撞率。
ai.motivation: 纯反应式规划方法（如MPPI）在密集动态人群中因预测视界有限而常陷入局部极小，需要融合长时程意图来提升导航可靠性。
ai.method: 构建基于激光雷达的潜动力学模型编码高维传感器数据，学习终端价值函数和策略先验；采用策略混合采样，用学习策略生成的轨迹扩充MPPI候选种群，引导规划器朝向目标并保持运动学可行性。
ai.result: 在高密度动态障碍随机环境中，RAY-TOLD相比MPPI基线降低了碰撞率，验证了短视物理滚动与学习长时程意图融合的有效性。
ai.help_to_user: 为自主移动机器人在密集动态人群中的安全导航提供了一种可落地的混合控制方案。

idea_spark.idea: 将激光雷达数据压缩为潜状态，并利用强化学习学习终端价值函数，再通过采样混合引导MPPI，实现短视与长视的平衡。
idea_spark.risk: 潜动力学模型的泛化性可能受限于训练环境分布；策略混合采样增加计算开销，需评估实时性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 借鉴了基于模型的强化学习中潜动力学模型（如TDMPC）的思想，将其与经典MPPI结合，形成混合架构。

zh.help_to_user: 为自主移动机器人在密集动态人群中的安全导航提供了一种可落地的混合控制方案。

idea_spark.idea: 将激光雷达数据压缩为潜状态，并利用强化学习学习终端价值函数，再通过采样混合引导MPPI，实现短视与长视的平衡。
idea_spark.risk: 潜动力学模型的泛化性可能受限于训练环境分布；策略混合采样增加计算开销，需评估实时性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 借鉴了基于模型的强化学习中潜动力学模型（如TDMPC）的思想，将其与经典MPPI结合，形成混合架构。

en.tldr: Proposes RAY-TOLD, a hybrid control architecture combining MPPI's short-horizon robustness with RL's long-horizon foresight, using LiDAR-centric latent dynamics and policy mixture sampling to significantly reduce collision rates in dense dynamic obstacle environments.
en.motivation: Purely reactive planners like MPPI often get stuck in local minima in dense crowds due to limited prediction horizon, necessitating integration of long-term intent for reliable navigation.
en.method: Builds a LiDAR-centric latent dynamics model to encode high-dimensional sensor data, learns a terminal value function and policy prior; employs policy mixture sampling to augment MPPI candidate trajectories with learned policy rollouts, guiding the planner toward the goal while maintaining kinematic feasibility.
en.result: In stochastic environments with high-density dynamic obstacles, RAY-TOLD reduces collision rate compared to MPPI baseline, confirming that blending short-horizon physics-based rollouts with learned long-horizon intent enhances navigation reliability and safety.
en.help_to_user: Provides a deployable hybrid control solution for safe autonomous navigation in dense dynamic crowds.

idea_spark.idea: Compress LiDAR data into latent states, learn a terminal value function via RL, and guide MPPI through mixture sampling to balance short- and long-horizon objectives.
idea_spark.risk: Generalization of the latent dynamics model may be limited by training distribution; policy mixture sampling adds computational overhead, requiring real-time feasibility assessment.
idea_spark.inspiration: Draws from model-based RL latent dynamics (e.g., TDMPC) and integrates it with classical MPPI to form a hybrid architecture.

papers.title: Exact formulations for rectangular-warehouse single-picker routing with scattered storage in single-block and two-block layouts
papers.summary: Order picking travel dominates much of warehouse effort, and exact routing is especially valuable when storage is scattered so pick locations are not fixed in advance. We address the single picker routing problem (SPRP) and its scattered-storage variant (SPRP-SS) in single-block and two-block rectangular warehouses. We propose two mixed-integer linear programming formulations that exploit structural properties of optimal tours to simplify connectivity modelling and remove redundant edge configurations: a Configuration Connectivity model tailored to single-block layouts and an Edge Connectivity model that extends to two-block layouts. In extensive computational experiments on large randomly generated benchmark sets for single-block and two-block rectangular layouts, we compare these formulations against established MILP and network-flow baselines for SPRP and SPRP-SS and report computational gains tied to the structural restrictions. The results support using compact, solver-based exact routing models in industrial settings where dynamic programming is cumbersome to integrate, particularly for SPRP-SS and for routing subproblems embedded in larger planning or warehouse-design optimizations.

ai.tldr: 针对单块和双块矩形仓库中的单拣选员路径问题及其散储变体，提出了两种混合整数线性规划模型，利用最优路径的结构特性简化连通性建模，并在大规模随机测试中展示了计算优势。
ai.motivation: 散储场景下拣选位置不固定，精确路径规划对降低仓库行走成本至关重要，而现有动态规划方法在工业集成中不便。
ai.method: 提出了配置连通性模型（适用于单块布局）和边连通性模型（可扩展至双块布局），通过消除冗余边配置和简化连通性约束来减少求解复杂度。
ai.result: 在单块和双块矩形仓库的大规模随机基准测试中，与已有的MILP和网络流基线相比，新模型取得了计算性能提升。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助仓库管理者在散储布局下快速获得精确的拣选路径，便于嵌入更大的规划或设计优化系统。

idea_spark.idea: 将路径的连通性约束转化为基于布局结构的紧凑模型，减少整数变量和约束数量。
idea_spark.risk: 模型对布局形状敏感，若仓库结构复杂（如不规则区域），结构特性可能不成立，导致模型失效。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从最优路径的几何结构出发，设计专用约束而非通用网络流，是提升求解效率的关键。

zh.tldr: 针对单块和双块矩形仓库中的单拣选员路径问题及其散储变体，提出了两种混合整数线性规划模型，利用最优路径的结构特性简化连通性建模，并在大规模随机测试中展示了计算优势。
