idea_spark.idea: 将路径的连通性约束转化为基于布局结构的紧凑模型，减少整数变量和约束数量。
idea_spark.risk: 模型对布局形状敏感，若仓库结构复杂（如不规则区域），结构特性可能不成立，导致模型失效。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从最优路径的几何结构出发，设计专用约束而非通用网络流，是提升求解效率的关键。

en.tldr: For single-block and two-block rectangular warehouses, two mixed-integer linear programming formulations are proposed for the single picker routing problem and its scattered-storage variant, leveraging structural properties of optimal tours to simplify connectivity modeling, and showing computational gains on large random benchmarks.
en.motivation: Scattered storage makes pick locations variable, so exact routing is critical to reduce travel cost, but dynamic programming is cumbersome to integrate in industrial systems.
en.method: Proposes a Configuration Connectivity model (for single-block) and an Edge Connectivity model (extendable to two-block), which eliminate redundant edge configurations and simplify connectivity constraints.
en.result: On large random benchmarks for single-block and two-block layouts, the new formulations outperform established MILP and network-flow baselines in computational performance.
en.help_to_user: Helps warehouse managers obtain exact picker routes under scattered storage, facilitating integration into larger planning or design optimization systems.

idea_spark.idea: Replace generic network-flow constraints with compact, layout-specific connectivity models to reduce integer variables and constraints.
idea_spark.risk: The model is sensitive to layout shape; for irregular or complex layouts, the assumed structural properties may not hold, causing model failure.
idea_spark.inspiration: Deriving specialized constraints from the geometry of optimal tours, rather than using universal network flow, is key to improving solver efficiency.

papers.title: Robust Lightweight Crack Classification for Real-Time UAV Bridge Inspection
papers.summary: With the widespread application of Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs) in bridge structural health monitoring, deep learning-based automatic crack detection has become a major research focus. However, practical UAV inspections still face four key challenges: weak crack features, degraded imaging conditions, severe class imbalance, and limited computational resources for practical UAV inspection workflows. To address these issues, this paper proposes a unified lightweight convolutional neural network framework composed of four synergistic components: a lightweight backbone network, a Convolutional Block Attention Module (CBAM) for channel and spatial enhancement, a directed robust augmentation strategy based on inspection-scene priors, and Focal Loss for hard-sample learning under class imbalance. Experiments on the SDNET2018 bridge deck dataset show that the proposed method achieves an inference speed of 825 FPS with only 11.21M parameters and 1.82G FLOPs. Compared with the baseline model, the complete framework improves the F1-score by 2.51% and recall by 3.95%. In addition, Grad-CAM visualizations indicate that the introduced attention module shifts the model's focus from scattered regions to precise tracking along crack trajectories. Overall, this study achieves a strong balance among accuracy, speed, and robustness, providing a practical solution for ground-station assisted real-time deployment in UAV bridge inspections. The source code is available at: https://github.com/skylynf/AttXNet .

ai.tldr: 提出一种轻量级CNN框架，结合注意力模块、鲁棒增强和Focal Loss，在无人机桥梁裂缝检测中实现高精度、高速推理与鲁棒性平衡。
ai.motivation: 无人机桥梁检测面临裂缝特征弱、成像退化、类别不平衡和计算资源有限四大挑战。
ai.method: 统一轻量级CNN框架，包含轻量骨干网络、CBAM注意力模块、基于场景先验的定向鲁棒增强和Focal Loss。
ai.result: 在SDNET2018上达到825 FPS，参数量11.21M，FLOPs 1.82G，F1提升2.51%，召回率提升3.95%。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种可直接部署于地面站的实时裂缝分类方案，平衡精度、速度和鲁棒性。

idea_spark.idea: 利用Grad-CAM可视化指导注意力模块设计，使模型聚焦裂缝轨迹而非散乱区域。
idea_spark.risk: 场景先验增强可能对未见过的退化类型泛化不足。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将检测场景先验显式编码为数据增强策略，提升模型在恶劣条件下的鲁棒性。

zh.help_to_user: 提供一种可直接部署于地面站的实时裂缝分类方案，平衡精度、速度和鲁棒性。

idea_spark.idea: 利用Grad-CAM可视化指导注意力模块设计，使模型聚焦裂缝轨迹而非散乱区域。
idea_spark.risk: 场景先验增强可能对未见过的退化类型泛化不足。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将检测场景先验显式编码为数据增强策略，提升模型在恶劣条件下的鲁棒性。

en.tldr: A lightweight CNN framework integrating attention, robust augmentation, and Focal Loss achieves high accuracy, speed, and robustness for UAV bridge crack classification.
en.motivation: UAV bridge inspection faces weak crack features, degraded imaging, class imbalance, and limited computational resources.
en.method: Unified lightweight CNN with a lightweight backbone, CBAM attention, directed robust augmentation based on inspection-scene priors, and Focal Loss.
en.result: On SDNET2018, achieves 825 FPS, 11.21M parameters, 1.82G FLOPs, with 2.51% F1 improvement and 3.95% recall improvement.
en.help_to_user: Provides a practical real-time crack classification solution for ground-station-assisted UAV deployment, balancing accuracy, speed, and robustness.

idea_spark.idea: Use Grad-CAM visualization to guide attention module design, making the model focus on crack trajectories rather than scattered regions.
idea_spark.risk: Scene-prior augmentation may generalize poorly to unseen degradation types.
idea_spark.inspiration: Explicitly encoding inspection-scene priors into data augmentation strategies improves model robustness under adverse conditions.

papers.title: On fractional critical problems with multi-polar Hardy potentials
papers.summary: We investigate the existence of positive solutions to fractional equations presenting a double criticality: a multi-polar Hardy-type potential and a Sobolev critical nonlinearity. The nonlocal nature of the operator and the absence of explicit ground states for the single-pole equation stand as major difficulties. We overcome these obstacles by passing to an extended formulation of the problem and by establishing sharp asymptotic estimates for the solutions in the case of a single pole. Then, through a concentration-compactness argument, we show that the existence of minimizers is dictated by the magnitude of the masses and the mutual distances between the corresponding poles.

ai.tldr: 研究具有多极Hardy势和Sobolev临界非线性的分数阶方程正解的存在性。
ai.motivation: 分数阶方程中同时存在多极Hardy势和临界非线性，导致解的存在性分析困难，且单极情形缺乏显式基态。
ai.method: 通过扩展公式化问题，建立单极情形解的渐近估计，再利用集中紧性论证。
ai.result: 证明了极小元的存在性由极点的质量和相互距离决定。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了处理多极奇异势和临界非线性分数阶方程的分析框架。

idea_spark.idea: 将多极问题分解为单极渐近分析，再通过距离参数控制相互作用。
idea_spark.risk: 多极间距离过近可能导致解消失或爆破，需精细估计。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用扩展公式化将非局部问题转化为局部问题，简化分析。

zh.motivation: 分数阶方程中同时存在多极Hardy势和临界非线性，导致解的存在性分析困难，且单极情形缺乏显式基态。
zh.method: 通过扩展公式化问题，建立单极情形解的渐近估计，再利用集中紧性论证。
zh.result: 证明了极小元的存在性由极点的质量和相互距离决定。
zh.help_to_user: 提供了处理多极奇异势和临界非线性分数阶方程的分析框架。

idea_spark.idea: 将多极问题分解为单极渐近分析，再通过距离参数控制相互作用。
idea_spark.risk: 多极间距离过近可能导致解消失或爆破，需精细估计。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用扩展公式化将非局部问题转化为局部问题，简化分析。

en.tldr: We study the existence of positive solutions for fractional equations with multi-polar Hardy potentials and Sobolev critical nonlinearity.
en.motivation: The simultaneous presence of multi-polar Hardy potentials and critical nonlinearity makes the existence analysis challenging, and explicit ground states for the single-pole case are unavailable.
en.method: We pass to an extended formulation, establish sharp asymptotic estimates for the single-pole case, and then apply a concentration-compactness argument.
en.result: We show that the existence of minimizers is dictated by the masses of the poles and their mutual distances.
en.help_to_user: Provides an analytical framework for handling multi-polar singular potentials and critical nonlinearities in fractional equations.

idea_spark.idea: Decompose the multi-polar problem into single-pole asymptotic analysis and control interactions via distance parameters.
idea_spark.risk: If poles are too close, solutions may vanish or blow up, requiring delicate estimates.
idea_spark.inspiration: Using an extended formulation to convert the nonlocal problem into a local one simplifies the analysis.

papers.title: Nonadiabatic Renormalization Group for Strongly Coupled Multiscale Quantum Systems
papers.summary: Complex quantum systems are often multiscale in nature with strong interactions between different scales. We present a novel idea: iteratively suppressing, rather than tracing out, the fast, high-energy degrees of freedom in strongly correlated quantum systems with multiple energy scales in a non-perturbative way, termed nonadiabatic renormalization group. This leads to a quantum geometric structure of a nested fiber bundle, in which each fiber of a layer is itself a fiber bundle of the next layer. The nonadiabatic renormalization group brings a new type of tensor network states that shares physical legs among ''sites'' and encodes quantum entanglement beyond conventional matrix product states. We demonstrate how to apply the nonadiabatic renormalization group to different types of problems, including an interacting boson model and ab initio quantum chemistry with interacting electrons.

ai.tldr: 提出非绝热重整化群方法，通过迭代抑制快自由度而非求迹，处理强耦合多尺度量子系统。
ai.motivation: 复杂量子系统常具有多尺度特性且尺度间强耦合，现有方法难以非微扰处理。
ai.method: 迭代抑制高能快自由度，构建嵌套纤维丛的量子几何结构，并引入新型张量网络态。
ai.result: 新张量网络态共享物理腿，编码超越传统矩阵乘积态的纠缠，适用于相互作用玻色子模型和从头算量子化学。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种非微扰处理强耦合多尺度量子系统的框架，可应用于量子化学和凝聚态物理。

idea_spark.idea: 将重整化群与纤维丛几何结合，可能启发新的数值算法或纠缠结构分类。
idea_spark.risk: 计算复杂度可能随层数增加而急剧增长，需验证实际可扩展性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从几何角度理解重整化群，可能连接量子信息与高能物理中的对偶性。

en.tldr: Proposes a nonadiabatic renormalization group that iteratively suppresses fast degrees of freedom to handle strongly coupled multiscale quantum systems non-perturbatively.
en.motivation: Complex quantum systems are often multiscale with strong inter-scale couplings, challenging existing perturbative methods.
en.method: Iteratively suppresses high-energy fast degrees of freedom, constructs a nested fiber bundle quantum geometry, and introduces a new type of tensor network states.
en.result: New tensor network states share physical legs among sites, encoding entanglement beyond conventional matrix product states, applicable to interacting boson models and ab initio quantum chemistry.
en.help_to_user: Provides a non-perturbative framework for strongly coupled multiscale quantum systems, useful in quantum chemistry and condensed matter physics.

idea_spark.idea: Combining renormalization group with fiber bundle geometry may inspire new numerical algorithms or classification of entanglement structures.
idea_spark.risk: Computational complexity may grow rapidly with layers; practical scalability needs verification.
idea_spark.inspiration: Geometric perspective on renormalization group may connect quantum information with dualities in high-energy physics.

papers.title: The proportion of permutations fixing a $k$-set
papers.summary: Denote by $p(k)$ the limit, as $n \rightarrow \infty$, of the probability that a random permutation on a set of size $n$ has an invariant set of size $k$. We give an asymptotic formula for $p(k)$, showing that it is asymptotically $f(\{\log_2 k\}) k^{-δ} (\log k)^{-3/2}$ where $δ= 1 - \frac{1 + \log \log 2}{\log 2} \approx 0.086$ and $f$ is a smooth, positive, function on $\mathbb{R}/\mathbb{Z}$, which we will describe explicitly. The function $f$ satisfies $\frac{\max f}{\min f} < 1 + 2 \times 10^{-7}$ and we conjecture that it is not constant.   Estimating $p(k)$ is a model for the more well-known question which asks for an estimation of $M(n)$, the number of distinct elements in the $n$-by-$n$ multiplication table. By elaborating on the techniques in this paper, we will give an asymptotic for $M(n)$ in forthcoming work.

ai.tldr: 研究了随机置换存在大小为k的不变集的极限概率p(k)，给出了渐近公式，并指出该问题与乘法表不同元素计数问题相关。
ai.motivation: 为乘法表不同元素计数问题提供模型，并精确刻画p(k)的渐近行为。
ai.method: 通过组合分析和解析数论技术推导p(k)的渐近展开，引入光滑周期函数f。
ai.result: p(k) ~ f({log₂ k}) k^{-δ} (log k)^{-3/2}，其中δ≈0.086，f非常接近常数但猜想非常数。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解随机置换中不变集出现的概率规律，以及相关渐近分析技巧。

idea_spark.idea: 利用类似技巧估计乘法表不同元素个数M(n)的渐近。
idea_spark.risk: 函数f的非常数性可能影响后续推导的精确性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将置换不变集问题与乘法表问题建立联系，启发跨领域渐近分析。

en.tldr: Studies the limiting probability p(k) that a random permutation has an invariant set of size k, providing an asymptotic formula and linking it to the multiplication table distinct entries problem.
en.motivation: To model the better-known multiplication table problem and precisely characterize the asymptotic behavior of p(k).
en.method: Uses combinatorial and analytic number theory techniques to derive the asymptotic expansion of p(k), introducing a smooth periodic function f.
en.result: p(k) ~ f({log₂ k}) k^{-δ} (log k)^{-3/2} with δ≈0.086, where f is nearly constant but conjectured non-constant.
en.help_to_user: Provides insight into the probability of invariant sets in random permutations and related asymptotic analysis methods.

idea_spark.idea: Apply similar techniques to estimate the number of distinct entries M(n) in the multiplication table.
idea_spark.risk: Non-constancy of f may affect precision in subsequent derivations.
idea_spark.inspiration: Connecting permutation invariant set problem to multiplication table problem inspires cross-domain asymptotic analysis.

papers.title: Dynamical delocalization in disordered 2D Chern insulators
papers.summary: We show the existence of energies exhibiting dynamical delocalization in discrete 2D Chern insulators perturbed by a random potential in a general setting. Our proof exploits two main features of the model: jumps in the integer value of the Chern character and continuity of averaged spectral projections in both energy and disorder parameters. This allows us to show robustness of the topological index in the presence of disorder, which, combined with existing methods to prove dynamical localization, allows us to provide detailed information on the phase diagram of the model. The novelty of our approach is that we are able to show dynamical delocalization in the disorder parameter, and not only in the energy parameter, which allows to prove Anderson metal-insulator transition even when spectral gaps close due to the strength of disorder.

ai.tldr: 证明了在随机势扰动的二维Chern绝缘体中存在动态离域能量，并展示了拓扑指数在无序下的鲁棒性。
ai.motivation: 探索无序对拓扑绝缘体电子局域化性质的影响，特别是动态离域的存在性。
ai.method: 利用Chern特征整数值跳跃和平均谱投影在能量与无序参数上的连续性，结合动态局域化证明方法。
ai.result: 在无序参数中证明了动态离域，从而在能隙因无序强度关闭时仍能证明安德森金属-绝缘体转变。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解无序拓扑系统中电子输运的相变机制，为设计新型拓扑电子器件提供理论指导。

idea_spark.idea: 利用拓扑不变量在无序下的连续性，结合动态局域化技术，可系统研究无序驱动的拓扑相变。
idea_spark.risk: 理论模型假设可能不适用于真实材料中的复杂无序类型。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发在实验上通过调控无序强度实现拓扑相变，例如在冷原子或光子晶格中模拟。

en.tldr: We prove the existence of dynamical delocalization in disordered 2D Chern insulators and show the robustness of the topological index under disorder.
en.motivation: To investigate the effect of disorder on electron localization in topological insulators, specifically the existence of dynamical delocalization.
en.method: Exploiting jumps in the Chern character and continuity of averaged spectral projections in energy and disorder, combined with existing dynamical localization methods.
en.result: Dynamical delocalization is shown in the disorder parameter, enabling proof of Anderson metal-insulator transition even when spectral gaps close due to disorder strength.
en.help_to_user: Provides insight into phase transitions of electronic transport in disordered topological systems, guiding the design of novel topological electronic devices.

idea_spark.idea: Leverage continuity of topological invariants under disorder combined with dynamical localization techniques to systematically study disorder-driven topological phase transitions.
idea_spark.risk: Theoretical model assumptions may not hold for complex disorder types in real materials.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires experimental realization of topological phase transitions by tuning disorder strength, e.g., in cold atoms or photonic lattices.

papers.title: A Nahm transform for rotating calorons
papers.summary: Rotating calorons were introduced in the context of rotating quark-gluon plasmas. They are anti-self-dual gauge fields on $\mathbb{R}^4$ that are invariant under a glide rotation. We formulate a Nahm transform which identifies rotating calorons with solutions of a delayed-differential equation. Using this transform, we prove existence of an eight-parameter family of charge 1 rotating calorons with nontrivial holonomy and rotational angle $π$, which we construct and visualise using a numerical implementation of the Nahm transform.

ai.tldr: 本文针对旋转卡洛龙（rotating calorons）提出了Nahm变换，将其转化为延迟微分方程的解，并利用该变换构造并可视化了一个八参数族的电荷1旋转卡洛龙。
ai.motivation: 旋转卡洛龙在旋转夸克-胶子等离子体背景下被引入，但缺乏系统的数学构造工具。
ai.method: 通过Nahm变换将旋转卡洛龙与延迟微分方程的解对应起来，并数值实现该变换。
ai.result: 证明了存在一个八参数族的电荷1旋转卡洛龙，具有非平凡和乐和旋转角π，并给出了可视化。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了旋转卡洛龙的显式构造和数值可视化方法，有助于理解旋转等离子体中的拓扑孤子。

idea_spark.idea: 利用延迟微分方程构造更多参数族的旋转卡洛龙，或研究其在高能物理中的散射行为。
idea_spark.risk: 数值实现可能面临高计算成本，且延迟微分方程的解的稳定性需进一步验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将对称性约化与积分变换结合，为构造复杂规范场解提供新思路。

en.tldr: This paper formulates a Nahm transform for rotating calorons, mapping them to solutions of a delayed-differential equation, and uses it to construct and visualize an eight-parameter family of charge 1 rotating calorons.
en.motivation: Rotating calorons were introduced in the context of rotating quark-gluon plasmas, but lacked a systematic mathematical construction tool.
en.method: The Nahm transform identifies rotating calorons with solutions of a delayed-differential equation, implemented numerically.
en.result: Existence of an eight-parameter family of charge 1 rotating calorons with nontrivial holonomy and rotational angle π is proven and visualized.
en.help_to_user: Provides explicit construction and numerical visualization of rotating calorons, aiding understanding of topological solitons in rotating plasmas.

idea_spark.idea: Construct more parameter families of rotating calorons using delayed-differential equations, or study their scattering behavior in high-energy physics.
idea_spark.risk: Numerical implementation may be computationally expensive, and stability of delayed-differential equation solutions needs further verification.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combining symmetry reduction with integral transforms offers a new approach to constructing complex gauge field solutions.

papers.title: Efficient Graph Partitioning under Resource Constraints: A Cutting-Plane Framework for Distribution Grids
papers.summary: This paper presents an optimal network topology control framework using cutting-plane methods for efficient network partitioning with controllable edges. The objective is to enable real-time reconfiguration of interconnected sub-networks while ensuring radial connectivity, resource feasibility, and structured leader allocation, which are essential for distributed control, stability, and coordination. The problem is formulated as a mixed-integer program that integrates graph-theoretic constraints, resource flow, and network structural properties to enforce an operational hierarchy. To address the combinatorial complexity of cycle elimination and leader assignment, we propose an iterative cutting-plane framework that ensures convergence to an optimal and feasible network topology. Theoretical guarantees on optimality preservation, feasibility, and convergence are established, ensuring systematic elimination of infeasible configurations while maintaining distributed controllability. Simulations on a modified Iowa 240-bus power distribution grid demonstrate the framework's effectiveness in network reconfiguration under resource constraints. The approach achieves median and best-case speedups of 57.5x and over 64x in a 46-switch configuration, highlighting its applicability to other networked control systems.

ai.tldr: 提出一种基于切割平面法的网络拓扑控制框架，用于在资源约束下高效划分配电网，实现实时重构并保证径向连通、资源可行和领导者分配。
ai.motivation: 分布式控制需要将电网划分为互联子网，但现有方法难以同时满足径向性、资源约束和领导者分配，且组合复杂度高。
ai.method: 将问题建模为混合整数规划，集成图论约束、资源流和网络结构属性，并设计迭代切割平面框架消除不可行配置。
ai.result: 在改进的Iowa 240节点配电网测试中，46开关配置下中位加速57.5倍，最佳加速超64倍，证明框架有效性。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种可扩展的电网分区优化方法，适用于资源受限的实时重构场景。

idea_spark.idea: 将领导者分配与资源流约束结合，通过迭代切割平面保证最优性和可行性。
idea_spark.risk: 大规模网络中切割平面生成可能成为瓶颈，需验证扩展性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用图论与优化结合，解决实际工程中的组合优化难题。

idea_spark.inspiration: 利用图论与优化结合，解决实际工程中的组合优化难题。

en.tldr: Proposes a cutting-plane-based network topology control framework for efficient partitioning of distribution grids under resource constraints, enabling real-time reconfiguration while ensuring radial connectivity, resource feasibility, and leader allocation.
en.motivation: Distributed control requires partitioning the grid into interconnected sub-networks, but existing methods struggle to simultaneously satisfy radiality, resource constraints, and leader allocation due to combinatorial complexity.
en.method: Formulates the problem as a mixed-integer program integrating graph-theoretic constraints, resource flow, and network structural properties, and designs an iterative cutting-plane framework to eliminate infeasible configurations.
en.result: On a modified Iowa 240-bus distribution grid with 46 switches, achieves median speedup of 57.5x and best-case speedup over 64x, demonstrating effectiveness.
en.help_to_user: Provides a scalable optimization method for grid partitioning under resource constraints, suitable for real-time reconfiguration.

idea_spark.idea: Combines leader allocation with resource flow constraints, using iterative cutting planes to guarantee optimality and feasibility.
idea_spark.risk: Cutting-plane generation may become a bottleneck in large-scale networks; scalability needs verification.
idea_spark.inspiration: Leverages graph theory and optimization to solve combinatorial engineering problems in practice.

papers.title: On three-dimensional flows of thermo-viscoelastic fluids of Giesekus type
papers.summary: Viscoelastic rate-type fluid models constitute a fundamental framework for the mathematical description of complex materials exhibiting coupled elastic and viscous effects, with a wide range of applications in engineering, biomaterials, and medicine. In realistic regimes, thermal effects are essential and lead to strongly coupled systems in which heat conduction and temperature-dependent constitutive laws play a decisive role.   In this paper, we develop a thermodynamically consistent model for heat-conducting viscoelastic rate-type fluids. We establish the existence of a global weak solution in the full three-dimensional setting. In contrast to the existing literature, no smallness, regularity, or structural restrictions on the initial data are imposed beyond natural energy and entropy bounds, and no additional regularising mechanisms such as artificial stress diffusion are required.   The analysis is based on a weak-strong framework combining energy and entropy balances with compactness tools, allowing us to treat the full nonlinear coupling between the fluid velocity, the temperature, and the elastic stress.

ai.tldr: 本文为Giesekus型热粘弹性流体建立了热力学一致的三维模型，证明了全局弱解的存在性，无需小量、正则性或结构限制。
ai.motivation: 现有粘弹性流体模型常忽略热效应或需要额外正则化，而实际工程和生物医学应用中热传导和温度依赖的本构关系至关重要。
ai.method: 采用弱-强框架，结合能量和熵平衡以及紧致性工具，处理速度、温度和弹性应力的完全非线性耦合。
ai.result: 在仅满足自然能量和熵界的初始条件下，证明了三维全局弱解的存在性，无需人工应力扩散等额外正则化机制。
ai.help_to_user: 为热粘弹性流体提供严格数学基础，可用于工程和生物材料中复杂流动的数值模拟与理论分析。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将本模型应用于聚合物加工或生物组织中的热-流-固耦合问题。
idea_spark.risk: 弱解的唯一性和长时间行为尚未建立，可能限制实际应用。
idea_spark.inspiration: 结合数值方法验证理论结果，并扩展至非等温粘弹性湍流研究。

en.tldr: This paper develops a thermodynamically consistent model for Giesekus-type thermo-viscoelastic fluids and proves the existence of global weak solutions in three dimensions without smallness or regularity restrictions.
en.motivation: Existing viscoelastic models often neglect thermal effects or require extra regularization, while heat conduction and temperature-dependent constitutive laws are crucial in engineering and biomedical applications.
en.method: A weak-strong framework combining energy and entropy balances with compactness tools is used to handle the full nonlinear coupling of velocity, temperature, and elastic stress.
en.result: Global weak solutions are established in 3D under only natural energy and entropy bounds, without artificial stress diffusion or other regularizing mechanisms.
en.help_to_user: Provides a rigorous mathematical foundation for thermo-viscoelastic fluids, enabling reliable numerical simulations and theoretical analysis in engineering and biomaterials.

idea_spark.idea: Explore applications of this model in polymer processing or thermal-fluid-structure interaction in biological tissues.
idea_spark.risk: Uniqueness and long-time behavior of weak solutions remain open, potentially limiting practical use.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combine with numerical methods to validate theoretical results and extend to non-isothermal viscoelastic turbulence.

papers.title: Rethinking Agentic Reinforcement Learning In Large Language Models
papers.summary: Reinforcement Learning (RL) has traditionally focused on training specialized agents to optimize predefined reward functions within narrowly defined environments. However, the advent of powerful Large Language Models (LLMs) and increasingly complex, open-ended tasks has catalyzed a paradigm shift towards agentic paradigms within RL. This emerging framework extends beyond traditional RL by emphasizing the development of autonomous agents capable of goal-setting, long-term planning, dynamic strategy adaptation, and interactive reasoning in uncertain, real-world environments. Unlike conventional approaches that rely heavily on static objectives and episodic interactions, LLM-based Agentic RL incorporates cognitive-like capabilities such as meta-reasoning, self-reflection, and multi-step decision-making directly into the learning loop. In this paper, we provide a deep insight for looking the conceptual foundations, methodological innovations, and effective designs underlying this trend. Furthermore, we identify critical challenges and outline promising future directions for building LLM-based Agentic RL.

ai.tldr: 本文探讨了基于大型语言模型的智能体强化学习范式，强调自主智能体在不确定环境中的目标设定、长期规划、动态策略调整和交互推理能力。
ai.motivation: 传统强化学习局限于预定义奖励和狭窄环境，难以应对开放复杂任务，因此需要引入LLM的认知能力来构建更自主的智能体。
ai.method: 将元推理、自我反思和多步决策等认知能力直接整合到强化学习循环中，形成LLM驱动的智能体强化学习框架。
ai.result: 系统梳理了概念基础、方法创新和有效设计，并指出了关键挑战和未来方向。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解LLM与强化学习结合的最新趋势，以及如何设计更自主、适应性更强的智能体系统。

idea_spark.idea: 设计一个基于LLM的智能体，在模拟环境中通过自我反思不断调整目标优先级，从而在动态任务中实现自适应学习。
idea_spark.risk: LLM的推理延迟和计算成本可能成为实时决策的瓶颈，且自我反思可能导致过度优化或陷入局部最优。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受人类认知中“计划-执行-反思”循环启发，将LLM作为智能体的“大脑”来模拟类似过程。

en.tldr: This paper explores the agentic reinforcement learning paradigm based on large language models, emphasizing autonomous agents' goal-setting, long-term planning, dynamic strategy adaptation, and interactive reasoning in uncertain environments.
en.motivation: Traditional RL is limited to predefined rewards and narrow environments, making it inadequate for open-ended complex tasks; thus, LLM cognitive capabilities are needed to build more autonomous agents.
en.method: Integrate cognitive capabilities such as meta-reasoning, self-reflection, and multi-step decision-making directly into the RL loop, forming an LLM-driven agentic RL framework.
en.result: Systematically reviews conceptual foundations, methodological innovations, and effective designs, and identifies key challenges and future directions.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand the latest trends in combining LLMs with RL, and how to design more autonomous and adaptive agent systems.

idea_spark.idea: Design an LLM-based agent that continuously adjusts goal priorities through self-reflection in a simulated environment, enabling adaptive learning in dynamic tasks.
idea_spark.risk: LLM inference latency and computational cost may become bottlenecks for real-time decision-making, and self-reflection could lead to over-optimization or local optima.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the human cognitive cycle of 'plan-execute-reflect', using LLM as the agent's 'brain' to simulate similar processes.

papers.title: Back to the Future: Rethinking Endorsement in Order-Execute Blockchains
papers.summary: Due to regulatory compliance and governance management, modern (permissioned) blockchains require flexible endorsement, which allows the endorsement policy for each contract or state object to be individually defined. To enable flexible endorsement, Hyperledger Fabric employs an execute-order-validate (EOV) paradigm, in which transactions first undergo speculative execution and endorsement, and are only then ordered and validated. Meanwhile, most blockchain systems, including the platform targeted in this work (i.e., ChainMaker), still follow a conflict-free order-execute framework. We argue that the EOV paradigm still faces several limitations, notably high abort rates in high-contention workloads such as those in Decentralized Finance (DeFi).   To avoid refactoring our system and better suit DeFi applications, we try to integrate flexible endorsement into the classical order-execute architecture and accordingly propose a new framework. The key challenge is to deterministically remove problematic transactions from an ordered list, while preserving censorship resistance and decentralization for the remaining ones. We instantiate this framework on top of Tendermint, a seminal Byzantine fault-tolerant (BFT) protocol adopted in our system, and thereby propose FlexTender. By elegantly embedding endorsements into consensus, FlexTender incurs no additional messaging overhead in the normal case. Empirical evaluation using an Ethereum USDT workload demonstrates that FlexTender achieves up to $10.6\times$ speedup in throughput over an EOV simulation on the same platform.

ai.tldr: 提出在经典顺序执行架构中集成灵活背书的新框架FlexTender，避免重构系统，并显著提升高竞争负载下的吞吐量。
ai.motivation: 现有执行-排序-验证范式在高竞争负载（如DeFi）下中止率高，且重构系统成本高。
ai.method: 将背书嵌入Tendermint共识过程，在正常情况下无额外消息开销，并确定性移除有问题的交易。
ai.result: 基于以太坊USDT负载的实验表明，FlexTender吞吐量比相同平台上的EOV模拟提升高达10.6倍。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解如何在经典顺序执行区块链中实现灵活背书，避免高中止率并提升性能。

idea_spark.idea: 利用共识阶段的确定性来安全移除问题交易，同时保持抗审查性。
idea_spark.risk: 可能增加共识协议的复杂度，且对恶意节点的处理需谨慎设计。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从DeFi高竞争场景出发，重新思考传统区块链架构的背书机制。

idea_spark.risk: 可能增加共识协议的复杂度，且对恶意节点的处理需谨慎设计。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从DeFi高竞争场景出发，重新思考传统区块链架构的背书机制。

en.tldr: Proposes FlexTender, a new framework integrating flexible endorsement into the classical order-execute architecture, avoiding system refactoring and significantly improving throughput under high-contention workloads.
en.motivation: The execute-order-validate paradigm suffers from high abort rates under high-contention workloads (e.g., DeFi), and refactoring the system is costly.
en.method: Embeds endorsement into the Tendermint consensus process with no additional messaging overhead in the normal case, and deterministically removes problematic transactions.
en.result: Experiments on an Ethereum USDT workload show FlexTender achieves up to 10.6x throughput speedup over an EOV simulation on the same platform.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand how to achieve flexible endorsement in classical order-execute blockchains, avoiding high abort rates and improving performance.

idea_spark.idea: Leverage the determinism of consensus to safely remove problematic transactions while preserving censorship resistance.
idea_spark.risk: May increase consensus protocol complexity and require careful design for handling malicious nodes.
idea_spark.inspiration: Reconsider endorsement mechanisms in traditional blockchain architectures from the perspective of high-contention DeFi scenarios.

papers.title: Context as Prior: Bayesian-Inspired Intent Inference for Non-Speaking Agents with a Household Cat Testbed
papers.summary: Many agents in real-world environments cannot reliably communicate their goals through language, including household pets, pre-verbal infants, and other non-speaking embodied agents. In such settings, intent must be inferred from incomplete behavioral observations in context-rich environments. This creates a core ambiguity: observable behavior is often noisy or underspecified, while context provides strong prior information but can also induce brittle shortcut predictions if used naively.   We present CatSignal, a Bayesian-inspired probabilistic framework for multimodal intent inference that models spatial context as a prior-like constraint and behavioral observations as evidence. Rather than treating context as an ordinary input feature, our method uses a context-gated Product-of-Experts formulation to compute posterior-like intent distributions from context, pose dynamics, and acoustic cues. We instantiate this formulation in a household cat setting as a focused proof-of-concept for intent inference in non-speaking agents.   Under Leave-One-Video-Out evaluation on a multimodal domestic cat dataset, the proposed prior-guided fusion achieves the best overall accuracy of 77.72%, outperforming feature concatenation (71.83%) and stronger late-fusion baselines. More importantly, it substantially reduces context-driven shortcut failures in ambiguous cases. While simpler fusion strategies remain competitive in Macro-F1 and selective prediction, the proposed model provides the strongest overall accuracy and the best suppression of context-based shortcut collapse.

ai.tldr: 提出CatSignal框架，将空间上下文作为先验约束，结合行为观测进行贝叶斯启发的多模态意图推断，在家庭猫数据集上达到77.72%准确率，有效抑制上下文捷径失败。
ai.motivation: 现实环境中许多非语言智能体（如宠物、婴儿）无法通过语言表达目标，其意图需从噪声且不完整的行为观测中推断，而上下文虽提供强先验但易导致脆弱的捷径预测。
ai.method: 采用贝叶斯启发的概率框架，将空间上下文建模为先验约束，行为观测作为证据，通过上下文门控的专家乘积公式融合上下文、姿态动态和声学线索，计算后验意图分布。
ai.result: 在家庭猫数据集上留一视频评估，先导融合准确率77.72%，优于特征拼接（71.83%）和强后融合基线，显著减少上下文驱动的捷径失败，但宏F1和选择性预测上简单融合仍有竞争力。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解如何利用上下文先验进行非语言智能体的意图推断，减少捷径学习，适用于宠物行为分析、婴儿意图理解等场景。

idea_spark.idea: 将上下文门控专家乘积与贝叶斯先验结合，可进一步扩展到在线学习或主动感知场景，动态调整先验权重。
idea_spark.risk: 上下文先验可能过强导致忽略新证据，需谨慎设计门控机制；数据集规模小可能限制泛化性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受贝叶斯推断启发，将环境上下文作为先验而非普通特征，为多模态融合提供了新视角，可启发其他领域（如自动驾驶）中上下文建模。

idea_spark.risk: Context priors may be too strong, ignoring new evidence; careful gating design needed; small dataset may limit generalization.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by Bayesian inference, treating environmental context as prior rather than ordinary feature offers a new perspective for multimodal fusion, potentially inspiring context modeling in other domains like autonomous driving.

papers.title: A Two Stage Pipeline for Left Atrial Wall Constrained Scar Segmentation and Localization from LGE-MR Images
papers.summary: Accurate segmentation and localization of left atrial (LA) ablation scars from Late gadolinium enhancement (LGE)-MRI is essential for assessing the lesion completeness and guiding ablation therapy. Incomplete or discontinuous lesions can increase the recurrence rate of the therapy and inaccurate localization can misguide treatment planning. However, reliable quantification and localization of scar in LGE-MRI is challenging. The severely class imbalanced scar voxels, thin structure of the LA wall, and weak tissue contrast often lead to unrealistic scar predictions. In this paper, we propose a two stage nnUNet based framework that takes LA anatomy into account to help with more precise scar localization and segmentation. In the first stage, an nnUNet model is trained to segment the LA cavity. In the second stage, patient specific cavity and wall signed distance maps (SDMs) are derived from the predicted anatomy to use as geometry aware inputs, and explicitly encode each voxel's signed spatial relationship to the atrial cavity and wall. This approach transforms scar segmentation from a solely intensity-based classification into anatomy-conditioned localization task, providing a continuous spatial prior that stabilizes learning for the thin atrial wall and suppresses topologically invalid predictions. To further address boundary ambiguity, we introduce a wall ROI-masked weighted loss combined with boundary uncertainty-aware supervision strategy that restricts learning to the atrial wall, while accounting for severe class imbalance. We evaluated our approach on the LAScarQS 2022 dataset and achieved a Dice of 61.1% and ASSD of 1.711mm. Our reliable and effective framework improves scar segmentation and localization accuracy by enforcing anatomical validity through geometry-aware supervision, and lowering the false positive detections far away from the atrial wall.

ai.tldr: 提出一个两阶段nnUNet框架，利用左心房解剖先验实现LGE-MRI中疤痕的精确分割与定位。
ai.motivation: LGE-MRI中疤痕体素严重类别不平衡、心房壁薄、组织对比弱，导致预测不准确，影响消融治疗评估。
ai.method: 第一阶段分割左心房腔；第二阶段从预测解剖生成患者特异性符号距离图作为几何感知输入，并引入壁ROI掩码加权损失与边界不确定性感知监督。
ai.result: 在LAScarQS 2022数据集上达到Dice 61.1%、ASSD 1.711mm，有效降低远离心房壁的假阳性。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种解剖约束的疤痕分割方法，可提高消融术后评估的可靠性。

idea_spark.idea: 将疤痕分割转化为解剖条件定位任务，利用连续空间先验稳定学习。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖第一阶段腔体分割质量，若分割不佳可能影响后续性能。
idea_spark.inspiration: 结合几何感知输入与边界不确定性监督，可启发其他弱对比度医学图像分割方法。

zh.help_to_user: 提供一种解剖约束的疤痕分割方法，可提高消融术后评估的可靠性。

idea_spark.risk: 依赖第一阶段腔体分割质量，若分割不佳可能影响后续性能。
idea_spark.inspiration: 结合几何感知输入与边界不确定性监督，可启发其他弱对比度医学图像分割方法。

en.tldr: A two-stage nnUNet framework leveraging left atrial anatomy priors for accurate scar segmentation and localization from LGE-MRI.
en.motivation: Severe class imbalance, thin atrial wall, and weak tissue contrast in LGE-MRI lead to inaccurate scar predictions, hindering ablation therapy assessment.
en.method: First stage segments the LA cavity; second stage derives patient-specific signed distance maps from predicted anatomy as geometry-aware inputs, with a wall ROI-masked weighted loss and boundary uncertainty-aware supervision.
en.result: Achieves Dice 61.1% and ASSD 1.711mm on LAScarQS 2022, effectively reducing false positives far from the atrial wall.
en.help_to_user: Provides an anatomy-constrained scar segmentation method to improve reliability of post-ablation assessment.

idea_spark.idea: Transforms scar segmentation into an anatomy-conditioned localization task using continuous spatial priors to stabilize learning.
idea_spark.risk: Relies on first-stage cavity segmentation quality; poor segmentation may degrade downstream performance.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combining geometry-aware inputs with boundary uncertainty supervision may inspire other weak-contrast medical image segmentation methods.

papers.title: FUN: A Focal U-Net Combining Reconstruction and Object Detection for Snapshot Spectral Imaging
papers.summary: Conventional push-broom hyperspectral imaging suffers from slow acquisition speeds, precluding real-time object detection; in contrast, snapshot spectral imaging enables instantaneous hyperspectral images (HSIs) capture, making real-time object detection feasible, yet its potential is often compromised by time-consuming post-capture reconstruction. To address this issue, we propose the Focal U-shaped Network (FUN), a novel end-to-end framework that jointly performs HSI reconstruction and object detection via multi-task learning. FUN employs a shared U-shaped backbone, where reconstruction provides underlying spectral information while detection guides semantic-aware priors learning, facilitating mutually beneficial task interaction. Crucially, we introduce focal modulation, an efficient alternative to self-attention that modulates spatial and spectral features while reducing quadratic computational complexity, enabling a self-attention-free architecture for joint reconstruction and detection. Furthermore, we contribute a new HSI object detection dataset with 8712 annotated objects across 363 HSIs to facilitate evaluation of the proposed method. Experiments demonstrate that FUN achieves state-of-the-art performance on both tasks, using 40% fewer parameters and 30% less computation than recent alternatives, making it promising for future real-time edge deployment. The code and datasets are available: https://github.com/ShawnDong98/FUN.

ai.tldr: 提出FUN网络，联合快照光谱图像重建与目标检测，通过焦点调制替代自注意力，实现高效多任务学习。
ai.motivation: 传统推扫式高光谱成像速度慢，无法实时目标检测；快照光谱成像虽能瞬时捕获，但后处理重建耗时，影响实时性。
ai.method: 设计Focal U-Net（FUN），共享U形骨干网络，重建任务提供光谱信息，检测任务引导语义先验，并引入焦点调制模块降低计算复杂度。
ai.result: 在重建和检测任务上均达最优，参数量减少40%，计算量降低30%，适合边缘端实时部署。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种轻量级端到端框架，可同时完成高光谱重建和目标检测，适合资源受限的实时应用场景。

idea_spark.idea: 将焦点调制与知识蒸馏结合，进一步压缩模型以适应更极端的边缘设备。
idea_spark.risk: 焦点调制在极端低分辨率或高噪声场景下可能丢失细节，需验证鲁棒性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受自注意力计算瓶颈启发，探索更高效的注意力替代方案用于多任务联合学习。

en.tldr: Proposes FUN, a Focal U-Net that jointly performs snapshot spectral image reconstruction and object detection via multi-task learning, using focal modulation to replace self-attention for efficiency.
en.motivation: Conventional push-broom hyperspectral imaging is slow for real-time detection; snapshot imaging captures instantly but requires time-consuming reconstruction.
en.method: FUN uses a shared U-shaped backbone with reconstruction providing spectral information and detection guiding semantic priors, plus focal modulation to reduce quadratic complexity.
en.result: Achieves state-of-the-art on both tasks with 40% fewer parameters and 30% less computation, suitable for real-time edge deployment.
en.help_to_user: Offers a lightweight end-to-end framework for simultaneous HSI reconstruction and object detection, ideal for resource-constrained real-time applications.

idea_spark.idea: Combine focal modulation with knowledge distillation to further compress the model for extreme edge devices.
idea_spark.risk: Focal modulation may lose details in extremely low-resolution or high-noise scenarios; robustness needs verification.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the computational bottleneck of self-attention, exploring efficient alternatives for joint multi-task learning.

papers.title: Fitting Horn DL Ontologies to ABox and Query Examples: A Tale of Simulation Quantifiers and Finite Models
papers.summary: We study the problem of fitting a description logic (DL) ontology to a given set of positive and negative examples that take the form of an ABox and a Boolean query. While previous work has investigated this problem for the expressive DLs ALC and ALCI, we here focus on the Horn DLs EL and ELI, as well as their extensions with the bottom concept. As the query language, we consider atomic queries (AQs), conjunctive queries (rooted CQs), and unions thereof (rooted UCQs). We provide characterization of the existence of a fitting ontology based on simulations, use them to develop decision procedures, and clarify the exact computational complexity. For AQs, the problem is in PTime for both EL and ELI. For rooted CQs and UCQ, it is Sigma_P^2-complete for EL and ExpTime-complete for ELI. Adding the bottom concept does not change any of these complexities. Interestingly, moving from ALC and ALCI to EL and ELI introduces additional technical challenges rather than simplifying the matter.

ai.tldr: 研究如何从正负示例（ABox和布尔查询）拟合Horn描述逻辑本体，聚焦EL和ELI，给出基于模拟的存在性刻画、决策过程及复杂度结果。
ai.motivation: 先前工作针对ALC和ALCI，但Horn DL（EL/ELI）在应用中更常见且具有不同挑战，需要专门研究。
ai.method: 利用模拟关系刻画拟合本体的存在性，据此设计决策算法，并分析计算复杂度（PTime、Sigma_P^2-complete、ExpTime）。
ai.result: 对于原子查询，EL和ELI均在PTime内；对于根CQ和UCQ，EL为Sigma_P^2-complete，ELI为ExpTime-complete；添加底概念不改变复杂度。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解Horn DL本体拟合问题的理论边界和算法可行性，指导实际本体学习系统的设计。

idea_spark.idea: 利用模拟关系设计近似拟合算法，或扩展至含否定或角色层次的本体。
idea_spark.risk: 复杂度结果可能限制在大规模数据上的直接应用，需启发式优化。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从模拟刻画出发，可探索基于图神经网络的本体拟合方法。

en.tldr: Studies fitting Horn DL ontologies from positive/negative examples (ABox and Boolean queries), focusing on EL and ELI, providing simulation-based characterizations, decision procedures, and complexity results.
en.motivation: Previous work addressed ALC and ALCI, but Horn DLs (EL/ELI) are more common in applications and pose distinct challenges requiring dedicated study.
en.method: Uses simulation relations to characterize existence of fitting ontologies, designs decision algorithms, and analyzes computational complexity (PTime, Sigma_P^2-complete, ExpTime).
en.result: For atomic queries, both EL and ELI are in PTime; for rooted CQs and UCQs, EL is Sigma_P^2-complete and ELI is ExpTime-complete; adding bottom concept does not change complexities.
en.help_to_user: Provides theoretical understanding of the feasibility and algorithmic boundaries for fitting Horn DL ontologies, guiding practical ontology learning systems.

idea_spark.idea: Design approximate fitting algorithms using simulations, or extend to ontologies with negation or role hierarchies.
idea_spark.risk: Complexity results may limit direct application on large-scale data, requiring heuristic optimizations.
idea_spark.inspiration: From simulation characterizations, explore graph neural network-based methods for ontology fitting.

papers.title: Stationary Distribution of Brownian Motion in the Half-Plane with Two-sided Reflections
papers.summary: We investigate the unique stationary measure of a positive recurrent reflecting Brownian motion in the upper half-plane, where the direction of reflection is constant on each half-axis. The Laplace transform of the stationary distribution is characterized by a functional equation, whose resolution is reduced to solving a discontinuous Riemann boundary value problem. By applying the Sokhotski-Plemelj formulas, we derive an explicit expression for the Laplace transform. Finally, we establish the local behavior of the stationary density at the origin and its asymptotics along the boundary axes using Tauberian theorems and asymptotic analysis.

ai.tldr: 研究了上半平面中具有双侧反射的布朗运动的平稳分布，通过求解不连续黎曼边值问题得到了拉普拉斯变换的显式表达式。
ai.motivation: 理解具有恒定反射方向的布朗运动在边界上的长期行为，为随机过程和数学物理中的相关模型提供理论基础。
ai.method: 将平稳分布的拉普拉斯变换转化为不连续黎曼边值问题，利用Sokhotski-Plemelj公式求解，并结合Tauber定理分析渐近行为。
ai.result: 得到了拉普拉斯变换的显式表达式，并揭示了平稳密度在原点的局部行为及沿边界轴的渐近性质。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户掌握反射布朗运动平稳分布的分析方法，特别是通过边值问题求解拉普拉斯变换的技巧。

idea_spark.idea: 考虑将反射方向推广为依赖于位置或时间的函数，研究其对平稳分布的影响。
idea_spark.risk: 推广后可能无法得到显式解，需要数值方法或近似分析。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从边界反射的对称性出发，探索更复杂几何区域（如楔形或圆盘）中的类似问题。

en.tldr: We study the unique stationary measure of a reflecting Brownian motion in the upper half-plane with constant reflection directions on each half-axis, obtaining an explicit Laplace transform via a discontinuous Riemann boundary value problem. The local behavior at the origin and asymptotics along the axes are derived using Tauberian theorems.
en.motivation: To understand the long-term behavior of Brownian motion with constant reflection directions on the boundary, providing a theoretical foundation for related models in stochastic processes and mathematical physics.
en.method: The Laplace transform of the stationary distribution is characterized by a functional equation, reduced to a discontinuous Riemann boundary value problem, solved via Sokhotski-Plemelj formulas. Asymptotic analysis uses Tauberian theorems.
en.result: An explicit expression for the Laplace transform is obtained, along with the local behavior of the stationary density at the origin and its asymptotics along the boundary axes.
en.help_to_user: This work helps users master the analytical method for stationary distributions of reflecting Brownian motion, particularly the technique of solving Laplace transforms via boundary value problems.

idea_spark.idea: Consider generalizing the reflection direction to be position-dependent or time-dependent, and study its impact on the stationary distribution.
idea_spark.risk: Generalization may preclude explicit solutions, requiring numerical methods or approximate analysis.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the symmetry of boundary reflections, explore similar problems in more complex geometries, such as wedges or disks.

papers.title: Gårding Polynomials
papers.summary: We introduce Gårding polynomials, a class of real multivariate polynomials defined via positivity regions invariant under translation by positive directions and closed under strictly positive affine transformations. We establish a structural theorem providing two complementary characterizations of this class: one via reduction to the multi-affine case through polarization, and another via a recursive condition involving partial derivatives. The class of Gårding polynomials strictly extends that of real stable polynomials while retaining many of their structural properties. In particular, multi-affine Gårding polynomials with nonnegative coefficients satisfy the Rayleigh property, and their positive univariate specializations yield ultra log-concave coefficient sequences. Moreover, the Gårding property for several matroid generating functions is preserved under natural matroid operations. As applications, we obtain new negative dependence results for generating functions associated with various classes of matroids and graphs--many of which lie beyond the reach of real stability or Lorentzian methods--as well as for characteristic polynomials of certain matrix classes.

ai.tldr: 引入Gårding多项式类，通过平移不变性和仿射变换封闭性定义，严格扩展了实稳定多项式，并应用于拟阵和图论中的负依赖结果。
ai.motivation: 实稳定多项式和Lorentzian方法在负依赖研究中存在局限，需要更广泛的多项式类来覆盖更多拟阵和图的生成函数。
ai.method: 通过极化约化为多仿射情形，以及基于偏导数的递归条件，给出Gårding多项式的两种互补刻画。
ai.result: 多仿射非负系数Gårding多项式满足Rayleigh性质，其单变量特化产生超对数凹序列；拟阵生成函数的Gårding性质在自然拟阵运算下保持。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种新的多项式框架，可用于分析组合结构中的负依赖性质，超越现有方法。

idea_spark.idea: 探索Gårding多项式在统计力学模型（如Ising模型）配分函数中的应用，验证其负依赖性质。
idea_spark.risk: 实际应用中可能遇到非Gårding多项式，需要进一步扩展理论或寻找替代刻画。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受实稳定多项式与拟阵理论的联系启发，将代数性质与组合结构结合，开辟新研究路径。

zh.tldr: 引入Gårding多项式类，通过平移不变性和仿射变换封闭性定义，严格扩展了实稳定多项式，并应用于拟阵和图论中的负依赖结果。

idea_spark.idea: 探索Gårding多项式在统计力学模型（如Ising模型）配分函数中的应用，验证其负依赖性质。
idea_spark.risk: 实际应用中可能遇到非Gårding多项式，需要进一步扩展理论或寻找替代刻画。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受实稳定多项式与拟阵理论的联系启发，将代数性质与组合结构结合，开辟新研究路径。

en.tldr: Introduces Gårding polynomials, a class strictly extending real stable polynomials, with applications to negative dependence in matroids and graphs.
en.motivation: Real stable polynomials and Lorentzian methods have limitations; a broader polynomial class is needed to cover more matroid and graph generating functions.
en.method: Provides two characterizations: reduction to multi-affine case via polarization, and a recursive condition using partial derivatives.
en.result: Multi-affine Gårding polynomials with nonnegative coefficients satisfy the Rayleigh property; their univariate specializations yield ultra log-concave sequences. The Gårding property is preserved under natural matroid operations.
en.help_to_user: Offers a new polynomial framework for analyzing negative dependence in combinatorial structures, beyond existing methods.

idea_spark.idea: Explore applications of Gårding polynomials to partition functions in statistical mechanics (e.g., Ising model) to verify negative dependence properties.
idea_spark.risk: Practical applications may encounter non-Gårding polynomials, requiring further theoretical extensions or alternative characterizations.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the connection between real stable polynomials and matroid theory, combining algebraic properties with combinatorial structures opens new research directions.

papers.title: Crab: A Semantics-Aware Checkpoint/Restore Runtime for Agent Sandboxes
papers.summary: Autonomous agents act through sandboxed containers and microVMs whose state spans filesystems, processes, and runtime artifacts. Checkpoint and restore (C/R) of this state is needed for fault tolerance, spot execution, RL rollout branching, and safe rollback-yet existing approaches fall into two extremes: application-level recovery preserves chat history but misses OS-side effects, while full per-turn checkpointing is correct but too expensive under dense co-location. The root cause is an agent-OS semantic gap: agent frameworks see tool calls but not their OS effects; the OS sees state changes but lacks turn-level context to judge recovery relevance. This gap hides massive sparsity: over 75% of agent turns produce no recovery-relevant state, so most checkpoints are unnecessary. Crab (Checkpoint-and-Restore for Agent SandBoxes) is a transparent host-side runtime that bridges this gap without modifying agents or C/R backends. An eBPF-based inspector classifies each turn's OS-visible effects to decide checkpoint granularity; a coordinator aligns checkpoints with turn boundaries and overlaps C/R with LLM wait time; and a host-scoped engine schedules checkpoint traffic across co-located sandboxes. On shell-intensive and code-repair workloads, Crab raises recovery correctness from 8% (chat-only) to 100%, cuts checkpoint traffic by up to 87%, and stays within 1.9% of fault-free execution time.

ai.tldr: 提出Crab运行时，通过eBPF检测代理回合的OS状态变化，实现语义感知的检查点/恢复，在保证正确性的同时大幅降低开销。
ai.motivation: 现有方法要么只恢复聊天历史而丢失OS状态，要么全量检查点开销过大，根源在于代理框架与OS之间存在语义鸿沟。
ai.method: Crab包含三个组件：eBPF检测器分类回合的OS效应、协调器对齐检查点与回合边界、主机级引擎调度检查点流量。
ai.result: 在shell密集型与代码修复任务上，恢复正确率从8%提升至100%，检查点流量降低87%，执行时间开销仅1.9%。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何在不修改代理或C/R后端的情况下，高效实现代理沙箱的容错与回滚。

idea_spark.idea: 利用eBPF实时监测系统调用，结合代理回合上下文动态决定检查点粒度，避免不必要的全量快照。
idea_spark.risk: eBPF检测可能引入额外开销，且对非标准系统调用或内核版本兼容性存在风险。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从代理与OS的语义鸿沟出发，利用操作系统底层机制（eBPF）来桥接高层应用语义，启发类似跨层优化方案。

zh.motivation: 现有方法要么只恢复聊天历史而丢失OS状态，要么全量检查点开销过大，根源在于代理框架与OS之间存在语义鸿沟。

zh.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何在不修改代理或C/R后端的情况下，高效实现代理沙箱的容错与回滚。

idea_spark.idea: 利用eBPF实时监测系统调用，结合代理回合上下文动态决定检查点粒度，避免不必要的全量快照。
idea_spark.risk: eBPF检测可能引入额外开销，且对非标准系统调用或内核版本兼容性存在风险。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从代理与OS的语义鸿沟出发，利用操作系统底层机制（eBPF）来桥接高层应用语义，启发类似跨层优化方案。

en.tldr: Crab is a semantics-aware checkpoint/restore runtime for agent sandboxes that uses eBPF to classify OS effects per turn, achieving 100% recovery correctness while reducing checkpoint traffic by up to 87%.
en.motivation: Existing approaches either lose OS state or incur high overhead due to the semantic gap between agent frameworks and the OS.
en.method: Crab consists of an eBPF-based inspector, a coordinator aligning checkpoints with turn boundaries, and a host-scoped engine for scheduling checkpoint traffic.
en.result: On shell-intensive and code-repair workloads, recovery correctness improves from 8% to 100%, checkpoint traffic drops by up to 87%, and overhead is only 1.9% of fault-free execution.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how to achieve efficient fault tolerance and rollback for agent sandboxes without modifying agents or C/R backends.

idea_spark.idea: Use eBPF to monitor system calls in real time and dynamically decide checkpoint granularity based on agent turn context, avoiding unnecessary full snapshots.
idea_spark.risk: eBPF monitoring may introduce overhead and compatibility issues with non-standard system calls or kernel versions.
idea_spark.inspiration: Bridging the semantic gap between high-level application logic and low-level OS mechanisms via eBPF inspires similar cross-layer optimization approaches.

papers.title: Softmax-GS: Generalized Gaussians Learning When to Blend or Bound
papers.summary: 3D Gaussian Splatting (3D GS) is widely adopted for novel view synthesis due to its high training and rendering efficiency. However, its efficiency relies on the key assumption that Gaussians do not overlap in the 3D space, which leads to noticeable artifacts and view inconsistencies. In addition, the inherently diffuse boundaries of Gaussians hinder accurate reconstruction of sharp object edges. We propose Softmax-GS, a unified solution that addresses both the view-inconsistency and the diffuse-boundary problem by enforcing a softmax-based competition in overlapping regions between two Gaussians. With learnable parameters controlling the strength of the competition, it enables a continuous spectrum from smooth color blending to crisp, well-defined boundaries. Our formulation explicitly preserves order invariance for any two overlapping Gaussians and ensures that the output transmittance remains unchanged irrespective of the extent of overlapping, preventing undesirable discontinuities in the rendered output. Ablation experiments on simple geometries demonstrate the effectiveness of each component of Softmax-GS, and evaluations on real-world benchmarks show that it achieves state-of-the-art performance, improving both reconstruction quality and parameter efficiency.

ai.tldr: 提出Softmax-GS，通过可学习的softmax竞争机制统一解决3D高斯溅射中的视图不一致和边缘模糊问题。
ai.motivation: 3D GS假设高斯在3D空间不重叠，导致视图伪影和边缘模糊。
ai.method: 在重叠区域引入softmax竞争，用可学习参数控制从平滑混合到清晰边界的连续谱，保持顺序不变性和透射率不变。
ai.result: 在简单几何和真实基准上达到SOTA，提升重建质量和参数效率。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何通过竞争机制改进高斯溅射的渲染质量。

idea_spark.idea: 将竞争强度作为可学习参数，实现混合与边界的自适应切换。
idea_spark.risk: 竞争机制可能增加训练不稳定性和计算开销。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从神经渲染中的注意力机制获得灵感，将重叠区域视为竞争资源。

en.tldr: Proposes Softmax-GS, a unified solution that addresses view inconsistency and diffuse boundaries in 3D Gaussian Splatting via learnable softmax competition.
en.motivation: 3D GS assumes non-overlapping Gaussians, causing artifacts and blurry edges.
en.method: Introduces softmax competition in overlapping regions with learnable parameters to control blending vs. sharp boundaries, preserving order invariance and transmittance.
en.result: Achieves state-of-the-art performance on simple geometries and real-world benchmarks, improving reconstruction quality and parameter efficiency.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how competition mechanisms can improve rendering quality in Gaussian Splatting.

idea_spark.idea: Make competition strength learnable to adaptively switch between blending and boundary sharpening.
idea_spark.risk: Competition may increase training instability and computational cost.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by attention mechanisms in neural rendering, treating overlapping regions as competing resources.

papers.title: lpviz: Interactive Linear Programming Visualization
papers.summary: This paper presents lpviz, a browser-based visualization tool for linear programming. lpviz is deeply interactive, offering an intuitive interface where users can directly draw and edit the feasible region and objective vector, without requiring cumbersome manipulation of raw numerical coefficients. lpviz lets users compare the behavior of several classes of linear programming algorithms, namely Simplex, Interior-Point, Primal-Dual Hybrid Gradient, and Central Path. In the 3D mode, lpviz places iterates at heights corresponding to important solver metadata such as complementarity gap or KKT residual, helping users gain further insight into algorithm behavior beyond the primal iterates alone. lpviz has been used in both research and classroom settings, to help develop intuition for the strengths and weaknesses of different solvers and the impact of solver settings on convergence behavior. lpviz is open-source, permissively licensed, and freely available on any device with a web browser at https://lpviz.net .

ai.tldr: 本文介绍lpviz，一个基于浏览器的线性规划交互可视化工具，支持用户直接绘制和编辑可行域与目标向量，并比较多种算法行为。
ai.motivation: 现有线性规划工具需要手动输入数值系数，缺乏直观交互，难以帮助用户理解算法行为。
ai.method: 开发了浏览器端可视化工具，支持2D/3D模式，在3D中通过高度映射互补间隙或KKT残差等元数据，展示算法迭代过程。
ai.result: 工具已用于研究和教学，帮助用户直观理解不同求解器的优缺点及参数影响。
ai.help_to_user: 用户可通过拖拽编辑可行域和目标向量，实时观察算法迭代路径和收敛行为。

idea_spark.idea: 设计一个通用框架，允许用户自定义元数据映射到空间维度，用于比较不同优化器的收敛轨迹。
idea_spark.risk: 3D可视化可能增加认知负荷，需确保交互直观且不分散对核心算法行为的注意力。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受交互式几何教学工具启发，将抽象优化概念转化为可操作的视觉元素。

en.tldr: This paper presents lpviz, a browser-based interactive visualization tool for linear programming, allowing users to directly draw and edit the feasible region and objective vector, and compare multiple algorithms.
en.motivation: Existing linear programming tools require cumbersome numerical coefficient manipulation, lacking intuitive interaction to understand algorithm behavior.
en.method: Developed a browser-based visualization tool with 2D/3D modes, mapping solver metadata like complementarity gap or KKT residual to heights in 3D to show algorithm iterations.
en.result: The tool has been used in research and classroom settings to help develop intuition for solver strengths, weaknesses, and parameter effects.
en.help_to_user: Users can drag to edit the feasible region and objective vector, observing algorithm iteration paths and convergence behavior in real time.

idea_spark.idea: Design a general framework allowing users to customize metadata-to-dimension mappings for comparing convergence trajectories of different optimizers.
idea_spark.risk: 3D visualization may increase cognitive load; interactions must remain intuitive and not distract from core algorithm behavior.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by interactive geometry teaching tools, transforming abstract optimization concepts into manipulable visual elements.

papers.title: From Unstructured to Structured: LLM-Guided Attribute Graphs for Entity Search and Ranking
papers.summary: Entity search, i.e., finding the most similar entities to a query entity, faces unique challenges in e-commerce, where product similarity varies across categories and contexts. Traditional embedding-based approaches often struggle to capture nuanced context-specific attribute relevance. In this paper, we present a two-stage approach combining Large Language Model (LLM)-driven attribute graph construction with graph-aware LLM ranking. In the offline stage, we extract structured product attributes from unstructured text, and construct a reusable attribute graph with category-aware schemas. In the online stage, we rank retrieved candidates by reasoning over this structured representation rather than raw text, reducing per-product token usage by 57% while improving ranking precision. Experiments show that our approach outperforms multiple baselines under zero-shot scenarios, achieving a over 5% improvement in average precision without requiring training data, generalizes robustly across diverse product categories, and shows immense potential for real-world deployment.

ai.tldr: 提出一种结合大语言模型属性图构建和图感知排序的两阶段方法，用于电商实体搜索与排序，零样本下平均精度提升超5%，每产品token使用减少57%。
ai.motivation: 传统嵌入方法难以捕捉电商中不同类别和上下文的细粒度属性相关性，导致实体搜索精度不足。
ai.method: 离线阶段用LLM从非结构化文本提取结构化属性并构建可复用的属性图；在线阶段基于图结构进行排序推理。
ai.result: 零样本场景下平均精度提升超5%，每产品token使用减少57%，跨类别泛化鲁棒。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户在没有训练数据的情况下，高效准确地搜索和排序电商产品。

idea_spark.idea: 将离线构建的属性图与在线LLM推理结合，减少推理成本同时提升精度。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖LLM提取属性可能引入噪声，且图构建的初始成本较高。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用LLM将非结构化数据转化为结构化图，再基于图进行推理，可推广至更多信息检索任务。

en.tldr: A two-stage approach combining LLM-driven attribute graph construction and graph-aware LLM ranking for entity search in e-commerce, achieving over 5% improvement in average precision under zero-shot scenarios while reducing per-product token usage by 57%.
en.motivation: Traditional embedding methods struggle to capture nuanced context-specific attribute relevance in e-commerce, leading to suboptimal entity search accuracy.
en.method: Offline: extract structured product attributes from unstructured text using LLM and build a reusable attribute graph with category-aware schemas. Online: rank candidates by reasoning over the structured graph representation.
en.result: Over 5% improvement in average precision under zero-shot scenarios, 57% reduction in per-product token usage, and robust generalization across diverse product categories.
en.help_to_user: Enables accurate and efficient entity search and ranking in e-commerce without requiring training data.

idea_spark.idea: Combine offline attribute graph construction with online LLM reasoning to reduce inference cost while improving accuracy.
idea_spark.risk: LLM-based attribute extraction may introduce noise, and initial graph construction cost is high.
idea_spark.inspiration: Leveraging LLMs to transform unstructured data into structured graphs for reasoning can be extended to many information retrieval tasks.

papers.title: The quantum group structure of long-range integrable deformations
papers.summary: Quantum integrable spin chains are known to possess a large family of long-range deformations generated by the local, boost and bilocal operators. Although these deformations are well-understood on the level of the pairwise commuting charges, the underlying quantum group structures had not yet been recognised. In this paper, we provide a quantum group-theoretical description for the family of long-range deformations of arbitrary homogeneous Yang-Baxter integrable spin chains up to first order in the deformation parameter. In particular, we show that the deformations are obtained via a twist of the algebraic structure of the underlying quantum group. This twisting results in a generally non-associative algebra that has a non-trivial Drinfeld associator. The Drinfeld associator is then shown to encode the information about the long-range interaction terms for the integrable spin chain. Moreover, the deformed quantum group is shown to contain a large perturbatively associative substructure, thus ensuring the perturbative integrability of the long-range model. The deformed quantum group provides explicit expressions for the Lax operators and R-matrices of the long-range deformed models, which manifestly satisfy the RLL relation and the Yang-Baxter equation up to first order in the deformation parameter. In order to derive the results, we introduce algebra elements that we call the algebraic charge densities. As a side result, we provide a conjecture for the explicit expressions of the undeformed charge densities in terms of these algebra elements.

ai.tldr: 本文为长程可积自旋链的变形提供了量子群理论描述，证明变形源于量子群代数结构的扭曲，并导致非结合代数及Drinfeld结合子。
ai.motivation: 长程可积变形在可积自旋链中广泛存在，但其背后的量子群结构尚未被识别。
ai.method: 通过扭曲量子群代数结构，引入代数荷密度，构造变形后的Lax算子和R矩阵，并验证RLL关系和Yang-Baxter方程至一阶。
ai.result: 变形量子群包含大扰动结合子结构，保证可积性；Drinfeld结合子编码长程相互作用项。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解长程可积变形的代数基础，提供构造Lax算子和R矩阵的显式方法。

idea_spark.idea: 利用Drinfeld结合子设计新型长程相互作用项，或探索非结合代数在可积系统中的应用。
idea_spark.risk: 高阶变形可能破坏可积性，非结合代数结构可能复杂化计算。
idea_spark.inspiration: 代数荷密度概念可启发其他可积模型中守恒荷的代数构造。

zh.tldr: 本文为长程可积自旋链的变形提供了量子群理论描述，证明变形源于量子群代数结构的扭曲，并导致非结合代数及Drinfeld结合子。

idea_spark.inspiration: 代数荷密度概念可启发其他可积模型中守恒荷的代数构造。

en.tldr: This paper provides a quantum group description for long-range deformations of integrable spin chains, showing that deformations arise from a twist of the quantum group algebra, leading to a non-associative algebra with a Drinfeld associator.
en.motivation: Long-range integrable deformations are well-known but their underlying quantum group structure had not been recognized.
en.method: By twisting the quantum group algebraic structure and introducing algebraic charge densities, deformed Lax operators and R-matrices are constructed, satisfying the RLL relation and Yang-Baxter equation to first order.
en.result: The deformed quantum group contains a large perturbatively associative substructure ensuring integrability; the Drinfeld associator encodes long-range interaction terms.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand the algebraic foundation of long-range integrable deformations and provides explicit expressions for Lax operators and R-matrices.

idea_spark.idea: Use the Drinfeld associator to design novel long-range interactions, or explore non-associative algebras in integrable systems.
idea_spark.risk: Higher-order deformations may break integrability; non-associative structures could complicate computations.
idea_spark.inspiration: The concept of algebraic charge densities may inspire algebraic constructions of conserved charges in other integrable models.

papers.title: A Grid-Aware Agent-Based Model for Analyzing Electric Vehicle Charging Systems
papers.summary: This paper presents a configurable, grid-aware Agent-Based Model (ABM) for the systematic analysis of electric vehicle (EV) charging systems under configurable infrastructure and operational conditions. The model integrates heterogeneous EV behavior, charging column constraints, and a shared Energy Sandbox that regulates aggregate power allocation, enabling the joint study of user-centric charging dynamics and facility-level power behavior. Implemented in Python using the SimPy discrete-event framework, the approach supports scalable, event-driven simulations across varying system sizes, charger compositions, and scheduling strategies. A representative workplace charging scenario is investigated to illustrate how infrastructure configuration and coordination mechanisms influence energy delivery performance, infrastructure utilization, and aggregate load characteristics. The results highlight the context-dependence of infrastructure suitability and demonstrate how charging strategies and charger types reshape both service-level outcomes and grid-facing behavior. The proposed ABM provides a flexible and extensible simulation environment for exploring technical, operational, and grid-aware aspects of EV charging ecosystems, and for serving as a methodological basis for subsequent studies on advanced coordination strategies beyond the specific scenario analyzed in this study.

ai.tldr: 提出一种可配置的、电网感知的基于智能体的模型，用于分析电动汽车充电系统，并展示了其在工作场所充电场景中的应用。
ai.motivation: 现有模型难以同时考虑用户行为、充电桩约束和电网功率分配，需要一种灵活可扩展的仿真环境来系统分析充电系统。
ai.method: 采用基于智能体的建模方法，集成异构电动汽车行为、充电桩约束和共享能量沙盒，基于SimPy离散事件框架实现可扩展的事件驱动仿真。
ai.result: 通过工作场所充电场景验证，表明基础设施配置和协调机制显著影响能量交付性能、设施利用率和聚合负荷特性。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助研究人员和规划者理解不同充电策略和充电桩类型对服务水平和电网行为的影响，为充电基础设施优化提供仿真工具。

idea_spark.idea: 结合真实充电站数据校准模型参数，并引入强化学习算法优化实时充电调度策略。
idea_spark.risk: 模型假设可能简化实际充电行为的随机性，导致仿真结果与真实场景存在偏差。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将电网感知的功率分配机制与用户行为建模结合，为智能充电协调策略设计提供了新思路。

en.tldr: A configurable, grid-aware agent-based model for analyzing electric vehicle charging systems is presented, with a demonstration in a workplace charging scenario.
en.motivation: Existing models often fail to simultaneously consider user behavior, charger constraints, and grid power allocation, necessitating a flexible and extensible simulation environment for systematic analysis.
en.method: An agent-based modeling approach integrates heterogeneous EV behavior, charging column constraints, and a shared Energy Sandbox for aggregate power allocation, implemented using the SimPy discrete-event framework for scalable event-driven simulations.
en.result: A workplace charging scenario shows that infrastructure configuration and coordination mechanisms significantly impact energy delivery performance, infrastructure utilization, and aggregate load characteristics.
en.help_to_user: Helps researchers and planners understand how different charging strategies and charger types affect service levels and grid-facing behavior, providing a simulation tool for charging infrastructure optimization.

idea_spark.idea: Calibrate model parameters with real charging station data and incorporate reinforcement learning algorithms to optimize real-time charging scheduling.
idea_spark.risk: Model assumptions may simplify the stochastic nature of actual charging behavior, leading to deviations between simulation results and real-world scenarios.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combining grid-aware power allocation with user behavior modeling offers new insights for designing smart charging coordination strategies.

papers.title: InterPartAbility: Text-Guided Part Matching for Interpretable Person Re-Identification
papers.summary: Text-to-image person re-identification (TI-ReID) relies on natural-language text description to retrieve top matching individuals from a large gallery of images. While recent large vision-language models (VLMs) achieve strong retrieval performance, their decisions remain largely uninterpretable. Existing interpretability approaches in TI-ReID rely solely on slot-attention to highlight attended regions, but fail to reliably bind visual regions to semantically meaningful concepts, limiting explanations to qualitative visualizations over a restricted vocabulary. This paper introduces InterPartAbility, an interpretable TI-ReID method that performs explicit part-wise matching and enables phrase-region grounding. A new open-vocabulary, lightweight supervision, patch-phrase interaction module (PPIM) is proposed to train a standard TI-ReID model with concept-level guidance. Concept-based part phrases provide evidence that encourages the model to attend to corresponding image regions. InterPartAbility further constrains CLIP ViT self-attention to produce spatially concentrated patch activations aligned with each part-level phrase, yielding grounded explanation maps. A quantitative interpretability protocol for TI-ReID is introduced by adapting perturbation-based evaluation metrics, including counterfactual region masking that measures retrieval degradation when top-ranked explanatory regions are removed. Empirical results\footnote{Our code is included in the supplementary materials and will be made public.} on challenging benchmarks like CUHK-PEDES and ICFG-PEDES show that InterPartAbility achieves state-of-the-art (SOTA) interpretability performance under these metrics, while sustaining competitive retrieval accuracy.

ai.tldr: 提出InterPartAbility方法，通过显式的部件级匹配和短语-区域对齐实现可解释的文本到图像行人重识别。
ai.motivation: 现有方法仅依赖槽注意力突出区域，无法将视觉区域可靠绑定到语义概念，解释局限于有限词汇的定性可视化。
ai.method: 提出开放词汇、轻量监督的补丁-短语交互模块（PPIM），利用概念级部件短语引导模型关注对应图像区域，并约束CLIP ViT自注意力产生空间集中的补丁激活。
ai.result: 在CUHK-PEDES和ICFG-PEDES基准上，在定量可解释性指标（包括反事实区域掩蔽）上达到最先进水平，同时保持有竞争力的检索精度。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解模型为何检索到特定行人，通过部件级短语和对应图像区域的可视化提供可解释证据。

idea_spark.idea: 将部件级短语作为概念监督，结合自注意力约束生成可解释性图，并引入反事实掩蔽进行定量评估。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖预定义部件短语可能限制对未见概念的泛化；反事实评估可能受掩蔽策略影响。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用CLIP的跨模态对齐能力，通过轻量模块实现概念级引导，为可解释AI提供新范式。

en.tldr: Proposes InterPartAbility for interpretable text-to-image person re-identification via explicit part-wise matching and phrase-region grounding.

papers.title: Propagation of nonlinear pulses near diffractive points of any order
papers.summary: We construct pulse-type approximate solutions to nonlinear hyperbolic equations near diffractive points, allowing arbitrary (even infinite) order of grazing. We show that in low regularity spaces and the high frequency limit, such solutions can be approximated by a sum of incoming and reflected pulses constructed using incoming and reflected phases and profiles that satisfy transport equations. New low-regularity estimates comparing the size of pulses to the size of their profiles are required. Earlier geometric optics results for pulses assumed much higher regularity, and considered only propagation in free space or transversal reflection at boundaries.

ai.tldr: 本文构造了非线性双曲型方程在任意阶衍射点附近的脉冲型近似解，并证明了在低正则性空间和高频极限下，这些解可由入射和反射脉冲之和近似。
ai.motivation: 现有几何光学结果仅适用于自由空间传播或边界横向反射，且要求高正则性，无法处理任意阶衍射点附近的脉冲传播。
ai.method: 利用入射和反射相位及满足输运方程的剖面构造脉冲解，并建立新的低正则性估计来比较脉冲大小与其剖面大小。
ai.result: 在低正则性空间和高频极限下，非线性脉冲解可被入射和反射脉冲之和有效近似，支持任意阶（包括无穷阶）擦射。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解非线性波在复杂边界（如衍射点）附近的高频传播行为，为低正则性条件下的几何光学提供理论基础。

idea_spark.idea: 将脉冲分解为入射和反射部分的思想可应用于多尺度模拟或数值格式设计，以处理高频波与复杂边界的相互作用。
idea_spark.risk: 低正则性空间中的估计可能依赖于特定方程结构，推广至一般非线性系统时需验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受几何光学中脉冲传播的启发，但突破了高正则性和简单边界的限制，为更实际的高频波问题提供新视角。

en.tldr: This paper constructs pulse-type approximate solutions to nonlinear hyperbolic equations near diffractive points of arbitrary order, and shows that in low-regularity spaces and the high-frequency limit, such solutions can be approximated by a sum of incoming and reflected pulses.
en.motivation: Existing geometric optics results for pulses require high regularity and only consider propagation in free space or transversal reflection at boundaries, failing to handle diffractive points of any order.
en.method: Pulse solutions are constructed using incoming and reflected phases and profiles satisfying transport equations, supported by new low-regularity estimates comparing pulse size to profile size.
en.result: In low-regularity spaces and the high-frequency limit, nonlinear pulse solutions are effectively approximated by a sum of incoming and reflected pulses, allowing arbitrary (even infinite) order of grazing.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand high-frequency propagation of nonlinear waves near complex boundaries like diffractive points, providing a theoretical foundation for geometric optics under low regularity.

idea_spark.idea: The decomposition into incoming and reflected pulses can inspire multiscale simulations or numerical schemes for high-frequency waves interacting with complex boundaries.
idea_spark.risk: Low-regularity estimates may depend on specific equation structure; generalization to arbitrary nonlinear systems requires verification.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by geometric optics for pulses, but breaks the limitations of high regularity and simple boundaries, offering a new perspective for more realistic high-frequency wave problems.

papers.title: FreeOcc: Training-Free Embodied Open-Vocabulary Occupancy Prediction
papers.summary: Existing learning-based occupancy prediction methods rely on large-scale 3D annotations and generalize poorly across environments. We present FreeOcc, a training-free framework for open-vocabulary occupancy prediction from monocular or RGB-D sequences. Unlike prior approaches that require voxel-level supervision and ground-truth camera poses, FreeOcc operates without 3D annotations, pose ground truth, or any learning stage. FreeOcc incrementally builds a globally consistent occupancy map via a four-layer pipeline: a SLAM backbone estimates poses and sparse geometry; a geometrically consistent Gaussian update constructs dense 3D Gaussian maps; open-vocabulary semantics from off-the-shelf vision-language models are associated with Gaussian primitives; and a probabilistic Gaussian-to-occupancy projection produces dense voxel occupancy. Despite being entirely training-free and pose-agnostic, FreeOcc achieves over $2\times$ improvements in IoU and mIoU on EmbodiedOcc-ScanNet compared to prior self-supervised methods. We further introduce ReplicaOcc, a benchmark for indoor open-vocabulary occupancy prediction, and show that FreeOcc transfers zero-shot to novel environments, substantially outperforming both supervised and self-supervised baselines. Project page: https://the-masses.github.io/freeocc-web/.

ai.tldr: FreeOcc是一个无需训练的开词汇占据预测框架，利用SLAM、3D高斯图和视觉语言模型，从单目或RGB-D序列中构建全局占据图，无需3D标注或真值相机位姿。
ai.motivation: 现有基于学习的占据预测方法依赖大规模3D标注，跨环境泛化能力差。
ai.method: 四层流水线：SLAM估计位姿和稀疏几何；几何一致的高斯更新构建密集3D高斯图；将开放词汇语义与高斯原语关联；概率高斯到占据投影生成密集体素占据。
ai.result: 在EmbodiedOcc-ScanNet上IoU和mIoU相比自监督方法提升2倍以上，零样本迁移到新环境显著优于监督和自监督基线。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一种无需训练、无需3D标注的占据预测方案，适用于机器人导航和场景理解。

idea_spark.idea: 将高斯原语与视觉语言模型结合，实现无需训练的开放词汇3D占据预测。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖SLAM精度和视觉语言模型的质量，在复杂动态场景中可能退化。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用现成模型（SLAM、VLM）组合解决传统需要大量标注的任务，启发无监督3D感知新范式。
