en.tldr: This paper reviews the quantization of scalar field theory on λ-Minkowski space using the Batalin-Vilkovisky formalism, comparing tree-level three-point and four-point correlation functions in standard and braided quantization schemes.
en.motivation: To study quantum field theory on noncommutative spacetime, specifically φ^3-theory on λ-Minkowski space, and compare the effects of different quantization schemes (standard vs. braided) on correlation functions.
en.method: Using the Batalin-Vilkovisky formalism, quantization is performed based on ordinary L∞-algebra and braided L∞-algebra, respectively, and tree-level three-point and four-point correlation functions are computed and compared.
en.result: For the four-point function, standard quantization yields two inequivalent classes of diagrams with different noncommutative contributions, while braided quantization yields only a single class of diagrams where noncommutativity enters solely through an overall phase factor depending on external momenta.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand different quantization schemes for quantum field theory on noncommutative spacetime and their impact on correlation functions, particularly how braided quantization simplifies noncommutative contributions.

idea_spark.idea: Explore the application of braided L∞-algebra in more complex field theories, such as gauge theories or gravity.
idea_spark.risk: The mathematical structure of braided quantization may be more complex, and its physical interpretation (e.g., the overall phase factor) requires further validation.
idea_spark.inspiration: The fact that noncommutativity enters only through an overall phase factor in braided quantization inspires the search for similar symmetries or algebraic structures that simplify noncommutative effects.

papers.title: LLMs as ASP Programmers: Self-Correction Enables Task-Agnostic Nonmonotonic Reasoning
papers.summary: Recent large language models (LLMs) have achieved impressive reasoning milestones but continue to struggle with high computational costs, logical inconsistencies, and sharp performance degradation on high-complexity problems. While neuro-symbolic methods attempt to mitigate these issues by coupling LLMs with symbolic reasoners, existing approaches typically rely on monotonic logics (e.g., SMT) that cannot represent defeasible reasoning -- essential components of human cognition. We present "LLM+ASP," a framework that translates natural language into Answer Set Programming (ASP), a nonmonotonic formalism based on stable model semantics. Unlike prior "LLM+ASP" approaches that require manually authored knowledge modules, domain-specific prompts, or evaluation restricted to single problem classes, our framework operates without any per-task engineering and applies uniformly across diverse reasoning tasks. Our system utilizes an automated self-correction loop where structured feedback from the ASP solver enables iterative refinement. Evaluating across six diverse benchmarks, we demonstrate that: (1) stable model semantics allow LLMs to naturally express default rules and exceptions, outperforming SMT-based alternatives by significant margins on nonmonotonic tasks; (2) iterative self-correction is the primary driver of performance, effectively replacing the need for handcrafted domain knowledge; (3) compact in-context reference guides substantially outperform verbose documentation, revealing a "context rot" phenomenon where excessive context hinders constraint adherence.

ai.tldr: 提出LLM+ASP框架，通过自校正循环实现任务无关的非单调推理，无需人工领域知识。
ai.motivation: 现有神经符号方法依赖单调逻辑（如SMT），无法处理可废止推理，且需要大量人工工程。
ai.method: 将自然语言翻译为回答集程序（ASP），利用ASP求解器的结构化反馈进行迭代自校正。
ai.result: 在六个基准上，ASP方法在非单调任务上显著优于SMT；自校正是性能提升的主要因素；紧凑上下文指南优于冗长文档。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种无需任务特定工程即可实现非单调推理的通用框架，降低LLM推理中的逻辑不一致和计算成本。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将ASP与LLM结合用于需要常识推理和异常处理的场景，如法律推理或医疗诊断。
idea_spark.risk: ASP求解器反馈可能引入额外延迟，且对复杂问题的可扩展性需验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: “上下文腐烂”现象提示在LLM提示设计中应避免过度信息，优先选择精简指南。

idea_spark.inspiration: “上下文腐烂”现象提示在LLM提示设计中应避免过度信息，优先选择精简指南。

en.tldr: Proposes LLM+ASP framework for task-agnostic nonmonotonic reasoning via self-correction, eliminating per-task engineering.
en.motivation: Existing neuro-symbolic methods rely on monotonic logics (e.g., SMT) that cannot handle defeasible reasoning and require extensive manual effort.
en.method: Translates natural language into Answer Set Programming (ASP) and uses structured feedback from the ASP solver for iterative self-correction.
en.result: On six benchmarks, ASP significantly outperforms SMT on nonmonotonic tasks; self-correction is the primary driver of performance; compact in-context guides outperform verbose documentation.
en.help_to_user: Provides a general framework for nonmonotonic reasoning without task-specific engineering, reducing logical inconsistencies and computational costs in LLM reasoning.

idea_spark.idea: Explore combining ASP with LLMs for scenarios requiring commonsense reasoning and exception handling, such as legal reasoning or medical diagnosis.
idea_spark.risk: ASP solver feedback may introduce additional latency, and scalability to complex problems needs verification.
idea_spark.inspiration: The 'context rot' phenomenon suggests avoiding excessive information in LLM prompts, favoring concise guides.

papers.title: From Unstructured Recall to Schema-Grounded Memory: Reliable AI Memory via Iterative, Schema-Aware Extraction
papers.summary: Persistent AI memory is often reduced to a retrieval problem: store prior interactions as text, embed them, and ask the model to recover relevant context later. This design is useful for thematic recall, but it is mismatched to the kinds of memory that agents need in production: exact facts, current state, updates and deletions, aggregation, relations, negative queries, and explicit unknowns. These operations require memory to behave less like search and more like a system of record.   This paper argues that reliable external AI memory must be schema-grounded. Schemas define what must be remembered, what may be ignored, and which values must never be inferred. We present an iterative, schema-aware write path that decomposes memory ingestion into object detection, field detection, and field-value extraction, with validation gates, local retries, and stateful prompt control. The result shifts interpretation from the read path to the write path: reads become constrained queries over verified records rather than repeated inference over retrieved prose.   We evaluate this design on structured extraction and end-to-end memory benchmarks. On the extraction benchmark, the judge-in-the-loop configuration reaches 90.42% object-level accuracy and 62.67% output accuracy, above all tested frontier structured-output baselines. On our end-to-end memory benchmark, xmemory reaches 97.10% F1, compared with 80.16%-87.24% across the third-party baselines. On the application-level task, xmemory reaches 95.2% accuracy, outperforming specialised memory systems, code-generated Markdown harnesses, and customer-facing frontier-model application harnesses. The results show that, for memory workloads requiring stable facts and stateful computation, architecture matters more than retrieval scale or model strength alone.

ai.motivation: 现有AI记忆依赖检索，无法处理精确事实、状态更新、聚合查询等生产级需求。
ai.method: 设计迭代模式感知写入流程，包括对象检测、字段检测、字段值提取，并加入验证门控和本地重试。
ai.result: 在提取基准上达到90.42%对象准确率，端到端记忆F1达97.10%，应用任务准确率95.2%，超越基线。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户构建更可靠的AI记忆系统，支持精确事实存储和状态化计算。

idea_spark.inspiration: 数据库系统设计中的模式约束思想可启发AI记忆架构。

en.tldr: Proposes schema-grounded AI memory via iterative extraction and validation for reliable fact recall.
en.motivation: Existing AI memory relies on retrieval, failing to handle exact facts, state updates, aggregations, and other production needs.
en.method: Designs an iterative schema-aware write pipeline with object detection, field detection, field-value extraction, validation gates, and local retries.
en.result: Achieves 90.42% object accuracy on extraction benchmark, 97.10% F1 on end-to-end memory benchmark, and 95.2% accuracy on application task, surpassing baselines.
en.help_to_user: Helps users build more reliable AI memory systems supporting precise facts and stateful computation.

idea_spark.idea: Shift memory writing from free-text retrieval to schema-constrained validated extraction.
idea_spark.risk: Schema definitions may be too rigid, reducing flexibility.
idea_spark.inspiration: Schema constraints in database design can inspire AI memory architecture.

papers.title: Evaluating TabPFN for Mild Cognitive Impairment to Alzheimer's Disease Conversion in Data Limited Settings
papers.summary: Accurate prediction of conversion from Mild Cognitive Impairment (MCI) to Alzheimers Diseases (AD) is essential for early intervention, however, developing reliable conversion predictive models is difficult to develop due to limited longitudinal data availability We evaluate TabPFN (Tabular Pre-Trained Foundation Network) against traditional machine learning methods for predicting 3 year MCI to AD conversion using the TADPOLE dataset derived from ADNI. Using multimodal biomarker features extracted from demographics, APOE4, MRI volumes, CSF markers, and PET imaging, we conducted an experimental comparison across varying training set sizes (N=50 to 1000) and models including XGBoost, Random Forest, LightGBM, and Logistic Regression. TabPFN achieved one the highest performance (AUC=0.892), outperforming LightGBM (AUC=0.860) and demonstrating advantages in low data settings. At N=50 training samples, TabPFN maintained strong AUC while the traditional machine learning models struggles at small training samples. These findings demonstrate that foundation models are promising for disease prediction in data limited scenarios, such as Alzheimers diseases.

ai.tldr: 评估TabPFN在数据有限场景下预测轻度认知障碍向阿尔茨海默病转化的性能。
ai.motivation: 早期干预需要准确的MCI-to-AD转化预测，但纵向数据有限，传统模型在小样本下表现不佳。
ai.method: 使用TADPOLE数据集的多模态生物标志物特征，在训练集大小从50到1000的范围内比较TabPFN与XGBoost、随机森林、LightGBM和逻辑回归。
ai.result: TabPFN在AUC=0.892时表现最佳，优于LightGBM（0.860），且在N=50时仍保持高AUC，传统模型则显著下降。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户了解在数据稀缺的医学预测任务中，基础模型（如TabPFN）相比传统机器学习方法的优势。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将TabPFN与主动学习结合，在有限标注预算下逐步提升预测性能。
idea_spark.risk: TabPFN对特征分布和缺失值的敏感性可能限制其在真实临床数据中的泛化性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 基础模型在表格数据上的成功启发我们重新思考传统机器学习在小样本医学预测中的局限性。

en.tldr: Evaluates TabPFN for predicting MCI-to-AD conversion in data-limited settings.
en.motivation: Accurate conversion prediction is crucial for early intervention, but limited longitudinal data hinders traditional models.
en.method: Compared TabPFN with XGBoost, Random Forest, LightGBM, and Logistic Regression on TADPOLE dataset using multimodal biomarkers across training sizes from 50 to 1000.
en.result: TabPFN achieved the highest AUC (0.892), outperforming LightGBM (0.860), and maintained strong performance with only 50 training samples.
en.help_to_user: Highlights the advantage of foundation models like TabPFN for disease prediction when data is scarce.

idea_spark.idea: Combine TabPFN with active learning to iteratively improve prediction with limited labeling budget.
idea_spark.risk: Sensitivity to feature distribution and missing values may limit generalization in real clinical data.
idea_spark.inspiration: Success of foundation models on tabular data inspires rethinking limitations of traditional ML in small-sample medical prediction.

papers.title: RHyVE: Competence-Aware Verification and Phase-Aware Deployment for LLM-Generated Reward Hypotheses
papers.summary: Large language models (LLMs) make reward design in reinforcement learning substantially more scalable, but generated rewards are not automatically reliable training objectives. Existing work has focused primarily on generating, evolving, or selecting reward candidates, while paying less attention to when such candidates can be verified and deployed during policy optimization. We study this deployment-time problem by treating generated rewards as reward hypotheses whose utility depends on the competence of the current policy and the phase of training. We propose \textsc{RHyVE}, a competence-aware verification and phase-aware deployment protocol that compares small sets of reward hypotheses from shared policy checkpoints using short-horizon fork verification. Our experiments show that reward rankings are unreliable at low competence but become informative after task-dependent thresholds. On a sparse manipulation task, phase-aware deployment improves peak and retained performance under a locked protocol. Updated LLM-generated reward-candidate experiments show candidate-family-dependent behavior: generated pools can exhibit phase-dependent winner changes, but no fixed warm-up schedule is universally optimal. Held-out schedule selection, conservative selector baselines, compute-matched controls, and scale controls further show that \textsc{RHyVE} is best understood as a verification-informed deployment protocol rather than a universal scheduler. Dense and all-failure boundary experiments delimit the scope of the method. Together, these results suggest that reward generation and reward deployment should be studied as coupled problems: generated rewards must be verified and deployed under changing policy competence.

ai.tldr: 提出RHyVE协议，在策略优化中根据当前策略能力和训练阶段验证并部署LLM生成的奖励假设。
ai.motivation: 现有工作主要关注奖励生成、进化或选择，忽略了何时验证和部署这些奖励候选的问题。
ai.method: RHyVE协议：基于共享策略检查点，通过短视分支验证比较少量奖励假设，实现能力感知验证和阶段感知部署。
ai.result: 奖励排序在低能力时不可靠，达到任务相关阈值后才有信息量；阶段感知部署在稀疏操作任务上提升峰值和保持性能；不同奖励候选族表现出阶段依赖的胜者变化，无固定预热计划普遍最优。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解何时以及如何可靠地使用LLM生成的奖励进行强化学习训练。

idea_spark.idea: 将奖励生成与部署视为耦合问题，根据策略能力动态调整验证和部署策略。
idea_spark.risk: 方法依赖任务相关的能力阈值，可能在不同任务间需要重新校准。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发将验证与部署阶段分离，并考虑训练动态对生成候选有效性的影响。

papers.title: SpatialGrammar: A Domain-Specific Language for LLM-Based 3D Indoor Scene Generation
papers.summary: Automatically generating interactive 3D indoor scenes from natural language is crucial for virtual reality, gaming, and embodied AI. However, existing LLM-based approaches often suffer from spatial errors and collisions, in part because common scene representations-raw coordinates or verbose code-are difficult for models to reason about 3D spatial relationships and physical constraints. We propose SpatialGrammar, a domain-specific language that represents gravity-aligned indoor layouts as BEV grid placements with deterministic compilation to valid 3D geometry, enabling verifiable constraint checking. Building on this representation, we develop (1) SG-Agent, a closed-loop system that uses compiler feedback to iteratively refine scenes and enforce collision constraints, and (2) SG-Mini, a 104M-parameter model trained entirely on compiler-validated synthetic data. Across 159 test scenes spanning five scenarios of different complexity, SG-Agent improves spatial fidelity and physical plausibility over prior methods, while SG-Mini performs competitively against larger LLM-based baselines on single-shot generation scenarios.

ai.tldr: 提出SpatialGrammar，一种用于LLM生成3D室内场景的领域特定语言，通过BEV网格布局和编译器反馈减少空间错误与碰撞。
ai.motivation: 现有LLM方法在生成3D室内场景时因坐标或代码表示难以推理空间关系，导致空间错误和碰撞。
ai.method: 设计SpatialGrammar语言，将重力对齐的室内布局表示为BEV网格放置，并编译为有效3D几何；开发SG-Agent闭环系统利用编译器反馈迭代优化，以及SG-Mini小模型在合成数据上训练。
ai.result: 在159个测试场景中，SG-Agent在空间保真度和物理合理性上优于先前方法，SG-Mini在单次生成场景中与更大LLM基线竞争。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户从自然语言自动生成无碰撞、空间合理的3D室内场景，适用于VR、游戏和具身AI。

idea_spark.idea: 将SpatialGrammar与强化学习结合，让模型在生成过程中主动学习空间约束。
idea_spark.risk: 语言设计可能过于特定，难以泛化到非重力对齐或复杂拓扑场景。
idea_spark.inspiration: 编译器在编程语言中的验证作用启发我们将其用于3D场景生成中的约束检查。

en.tldr: Proposes SpatialGrammar, a domain-specific language for LLM-based 3D indoor scene generation, using BEV grid placements and compiler feedback to reduce spatial errors and collisions.
en.motivation: Existing LLM methods suffer from spatial errors and collisions in 3D indoor scene generation because common representations (raw coordinates or verbose code) are hard for models to reason about spatial relationships and physical constraints.
en.method: Designs SpatialGrammar language that represents gravity-aligned indoor layouts as BEV grid placements with deterministic compilation to valid 3D geometry; develops SG-Agent closed-loop system using compiler feedback for iterative refinement, and SG-Mini small model trained on compiler-validated synthetic data.
en.result: On 159 test scenes across five scenarios, SG-Agent improves spatial fidelity and physical plausibility over prior methods, while SG-Mini performs competitively against larger LLM-based baselines on single-shot generation.
en.help_to_user: Helps users automatically generate collision-free, spatially plausible 3D indoor scenes from natural language, useful for VR, gaming, and embodied AI.

idea_spark.idea: Combine SpatialGrammar with reinforcement learning to let the model actively learn spatial constraints during generation.
idea_spark.risk: The language design may be too specific, limiting generalization to non-gravity-aligned or complex topology scenes.
idea_spark.inspiration: The role of compilers in programming language verification inspires using them for constraint checking in 3D scene generation.

papers.title: Hypergeometric Functions of Nilpotent Operators: Functional Collapse and Structural Depth at Exceptional Points
papers.summary: We study hypergeometric functions of nilpotent operators in finite-dimensional settings, motivated by the algebraic structure of exceptional points in non-Hermitian quantum mechanics. Our starting point is the following exact result: if N is a nilpotent operator of index m+1 in an associative algebra over C, then every generalized hypergeometric function pFq evaluated at N reduces to a finite polynomial in N of degree at most m, without any analytic convergence requirement. This "functional collapse" is distinct from the classical parameter-termination mechanism and arises purely from the nilpotent structure of the argument. The main result is a "nilpotent depth criterion" (Theorem 2): if the first non-constant coefficient of a formal series F appears in degree r >= 1, then the nilpotent part F(N) - F(0)I has nilpotency index bounded above by ceil((m+1)/r). We apply this criterion to Hamiltonians at exceptional points, where H = lambda I + N with N^{m+1} = 0. Theorem 3 establishes that a function F analytic at lambda reduces the Jordan depth of the exceptional point from m+1 to at most ceil((m+1)/r), where r is the contact order of F at lambda. As consequences: the time evolution operator e^{tH} preserves the full Jordan depth for all t != 0; a function with a zero of order m+1 at lambda annihilates the entire Jordan structure; and the order of the pole of the modified resolvent is reduced from m+1 to at most m+1-r. Results are illustrated with explicit 3x3 Jordan block computations for 1F1, 2F1, and the time evolution operator, confirming sharpness of the bounds.

ai.tldr: 研究了幂零算子的超几何函数在有限维代数中的精确多项式约化，并应用于非厄米量子力学中的奇异点结构。
ai.motivation: 非厄米量子力学中奇异点的代数结构需要理解幂零算子上的函数行为。
ai.method: 通过幂零指数和形式级数首非零系数的阶数，建立幂零深度准则。
ai.result: 函数在奇异点处将Jordan深度从m+1降至ceil((m+1)/r)，其中r为接触阶。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了分析奇异点附近函数行为的代数工具，可用于量子系统的时间演化和谱分析。

idea_spark.idea: 利用幂零算子的多项式约化性质，设计数值算法以高效计算奇异点附近的演化算子。
idea_spark.risk: 高维幂零算子可能导致计算复杂度随指数增长。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将幂零深度准则与扰动理论结合，研究奇异点附近能级交叉的动力学。

en.tldr: Hypergeometric functions of nilpotent operators reduce to finite polynomials in finite-dimensional algebras, with applications to exceptional points in non-Hermitian quantum mechanics.
en.motivation: The algebraic structure of exceptional points in non-Hermitian quantum mechanics motivates the study of functions of nilpotent operators.
en.method: A nilpotent depth criterion is established based on the nilpotency index and the order of the first non-constant coefficient of a formal series.
en.result: At an exceptional point, a function reduces the Jordan depth from m+1 to at most ceil((m+1)/r), where r is the contact order.
en.help_to_user: Provides algebraic tools to analyze function behavior near exceptional points, useful for time evolution and spectral analysis in quantum systems.

idea_spark.idea: Exploit polynomial reduction of nilpotent operators to design efficient numerical algorithms for evolution operators near exceptional points.
idea_spark.risk: High-dimensional nilpotent operators may lead to computational complexity growing exponentially.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combine the nilpotent depth criterion with perturbation theory to study dynamics of level crossings near exceptional points.

papers.title: Secure Cross-Silo Synthetic Genomic Data Generation
papers.summary: Access to genomic data is highly regulated due to its sensitive nature. While safeguards are essential, cumbersome data access processes pose a significant barrier to the development of AI methods for genomics. Synthetic data generation can mitigate this tension by enabling broader data sharing without exposing sensitive information. Synthetic genomic data are produced by training generative models on real data and subsequently sampling artificial data that preserves relevant statistics while limiting disclosures about the underlying individuals. In some settings, a single data holder may have sufficient data to train such generative models; however, in many applications data must be combined across multiple sites to achieve adequate scale. This need arises, e.g., in rare disease studies, where individual hospitals typically hold data for only a small number of patients. The solution we present in this paper enables multiple data holders to jointly train a synthetic data generator without revealing their raw data. Our approach combines secure multiparty computation (MPC) to ensure input privacy, so that no party ever discloses its data in unencrypted form, with differential privacy (DP) to provide output privacy by mitigating information leakage from the released synthetic data. We empirically demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method by generating high-utility synthetic datasets from multiple real RNA-seq cohorts in federated settings, showing that our approach enables privacy-preserving data synthesis even when data are distributed across institutions.

ai.tldr: 提出一种结合安全多方计算和差分隐私的方法，使多个数据持有者能联合训练合成基因组数据生成器，无需暴露原始数据。
ai.motivation: 基因组数据访问受限，阻碍AI方法发展；合成数据可缓解此矛盾，但许多场景需跨机构联合数据才能达到足够规模。
ai.method: 采用安全多方计算保证输入隐私，差分隐私提供输出隐私，在联邦设置下联合训练生成模型。
ai.result: 在多个真实RNA-seq队列上生成高可用性合成数据集，证明方法在数据分布跨机构时仍能实现隐私保护的数据合成。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何在保护隐私的前提下，跨机构联合生成合成基因组数据，适用于罕见病等数据稀疏场景。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将MPC与DP结合用于纵向联邦学习中的合成数据生成，或扩展到非基因组数据。
idea_spark.risk: MPC和DP的组合可能增加计算开销，且DP的隐私预算分配需谨慎，否则影响数据效用。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受联邦学习与隐私保护技术融合的启发，解决数据孤岛与隐私合规的双重挑战。

idea_spark.inspiration: 受联邦学习与隐私保护技术融合的启发，解决数据孤岛与隐私合规的双重挑战。

en.tldr: Proposes a method combining secure multiparty computation and differential privacy to enable multiple data holders to jointly train a synthetic genomic data generator without revealing raw data.
en.motivation: Access to genomic data is highly regulated, hindering AI development; synthetic data can help, but many applications require combining data across sites for adequate scale.
en.method: Uses secure multiparty computation for input privacy and differential privacy for output privacy, training generative models in federated settings.
en.result: Generates high-utility synthetic datasets from multiple real RNA-seq cohorts, demonstrating effective privacy-preserving data synthesis even with distributed data.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how to jointly generate synthetic genomic data across institutions while preserving privacy, useful for rare disease studies and other data-scarce scenarios.

idea_spark.idea: Explore combining MPC and DP for synthetic data generation in vertical federated learning, or extend to non-genomic data.
idea_spark.risk: Combining MPC and DP may increase computational overhead, and careful privacy budget allocation is needed to avoid degrading data utility.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the fusion of federated learning and privacy-preserving techniques to address data silos and privacy compliance challenges.

papers.title: Fake3DGS: A Benchmark for 3D Manipulation Detection in Neural Rendering
papers.summary: Recent advances in 3D reconstruction and neural rendering,particularly 3D Gaussian Splatting, make it feasible and simple to edit 3D scenes and re-render them as highly realistic images. Therefore, security concerns arise regarding the authenticity of 3D content. Despite this threat, 3D fake detection remains largely unexplored in the literature, and most existing work is limited to 2D space. Therefore, in this paper, we formalize the concept of 3D fake detection and introduce Fake3DGS, a dataset of 3D Gaussian splatting scenes and corresponding rendered views, where fake images are produced by controlled manipulations of geometry, appearance, and spatial layout, while preserving high visual realism. Using this benchmark, we demonstrate that current state-of-the-art 2D detectors struggle to distinguish between original and 3D manipulated images. To bridge this gap, we introduce a 3D-aware detection method that leverages multi-view coherence and features derived from the Gaussian splatting representation. Experimental results demonstrate a substantial improvement in recognizing modified 3D content, underscoring the validity of the new dataset and the necessity for authenticity assessment techniques that extend beyond 2D evidence. Code and data are publicly released for future investigations.

ai.tldr: 提出3D伪造检测概念，构建Fake3DGS数据集，并引入3D感知检测方法，证明2D检测器在3D操纵图像上的不足。
ai.motivation: 3D重建与神经渲染（特别是3D高斯泼溅）使编辑3D场景并生成逼真图像变得简单，引发内容真实性担忧，但现有伪造检测主要限于2D空间。
ai.method: 构建包含几何、外观、空间布局受控操纵的3D高斯泼溅场景及渲染视图的数据集；提出利用多视图一致性和高斯泼溅特征的3D感知检测方法。
ai.result: 当前最优2D检测器难以区分原始与3D操纵图像；所提3D感知方法显著提升识别性能。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解3D伪造检测的挑战，并提供基准数据集与检测方法。

idea_spark.idea: 利用高斯泼溅的显式几何属性（如位置、协方差）设计更鲁棒的3D伪造特征。
idea_spark.risk: 数据集规模有限，可能无法覆盖所有操纵类型；3D感知方法计算开销较大。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将3D表示的内在属性（如点云结构）直接用于伪造检测，而非仅依赖渲染图像。

en.tldr: Formalizes 3D fake detection, introduces Fake3DGS dataset, and proposes a 3D-aware detection method, showing that 2D detectors fail on 3D manipulated images.
en.motivation: Advances in 3D reconstruction and neural rendering, especially 3D Gaussian Splatting, enable easy editing of 3D scenes and rendering realistic images, raising authenticity concerns, yet existing forgery detection is mostly limited to 2D.
en.method: Constructs a dataset of 3D Gaussian splatting scenes with controlled manipulations of geometry, appearance, and layout; proposes a 3D-aware detection method leveraging multi-view coherence and Gaussian splatting features.
en.result: State-of-the-art 2D detectors struggle to distinguish original from 3D manipulated images; the proposed 3D-aware method significantly improves detection performance.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand the challenge of 3D forgery detection and provides a benchmark dataset and detection method.

idea_spark.idea: Exploit explicit geometric properties of Gaussian splatting (e.g., positions, covariances) to design more robust 3D forgery features.
idea_spark.risk: Limited dataset size may not cover all manipulation types; 3D-aware methods incur higher computational cost.
idea_spark.inspiration: Use intrinsic properties of 3D representations (e.g., point cloud structure) directly for forgery detection, rather than relying solely on rendered images.

papers.title: Pauli equation in spaces of constant curvature and extended Nikiforov-Uvarov method
papers.summary: We apply the extended Nikiforov-Uvarov method to the non-relativistic limit of the Dirac equation with a Coulomb potential in spaces of constant curvature. In this case, the radial equation reduces to the Heun equation, and the extended Nikiforov-Uvarov method easily yields a quantization condition which leads to necessary condition under which the resulting Heun equation can have polynomial solutions. The energy spectrum implied by the quantization condition is virtually identical to the spectrum of a spinless particle obtained using the Schrödinger equation, except for the absence of the ``geometric potential", confirming the non-commutativity of the naive non-relativistic limit with the ``squaring" of the Dirac equation, first discovered on curved surfaces. However, the necessary conditions for the existence of polynomial solutions cannot be met, and this fact undermines the reliability of the results obtained. This circumstance forces us to conclude that the extended Nikiforov-Uvarov method has limited, if any, value when considering similar problems in quantum mechanics.

ai.tldr: 将扩展的Nikiforov-Uvarov方法应用于常曲率空间中含库仑势的Dirac方程的非相对论极限，得到Heun方程和量子化条件，但多项式解的必要条件无法满足，表明该方法在此类问题中价值有限。
ai.motivation: 检验扩展的Nikiforov-Uvarov方法在常曲率空间量子力学问题中的适用性，并澄清Dirac方程平方与非相对论极限的非对易性。
ai.method: 对常曲率空间中含库仑势的Dirac方程取非相对论极限，得到径向方程（Heun方程），应用扩展的Nikiforov-Uvarov方法推导量子化条件。
ai.result: 量子化条件给出的能谱与无自旋粒子的Schrödinger方程结果几乎一致，但缺少“几何势”项；然而多项式解的必要条件无法满足，结果可靠性存疑。
ai.help_to_user: 揭示了扩展Nikiforov-Uvarov方法在常曲率空间量子力学问题中的局限性，并提供了Dirac方程非相对论极限与平方操作非对易性的一个实例。

idea_spark.idea: 尝试修改扩展Nikiforov-Uvarov方法或结合其他解析技术（如超几何函数）来克服多项式解条件不满足的问题。
idea_spark.risk: 方法本身可能不适用于此类问题，导致结果不可靠；需谨慎验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 考虑使用数值方法或微扰理论替代解析方法，以获取常曲率空间中Dirac方程非相对论极限的可靠能谱。

en.tldr: The extended Nikiforov-Uvarov method is applied to the non-relativistic limit of the Dirac equation with a Coulomb potential in spaces of constant curvature, yielding a Heun equation and a quantization condition, but the necessary conditions for polynomial solutions are not met, limiting the method's value.
en.motivation: To test the applicability of the extended Nikiforov-Uvarov method in curved-space quantum mechanics and clarify the non-commutativity of squaring and the non-relativistic limit of the Dirac equation.
en.method: Take the non-relativistic limit of the Dirac equation with a Coulomb potential in spaces of constant curvature, obtain the radial Heun equation, and apply the extended Nikiforov-Uvarov method to derive a quantization condition.
en.result: The quantization condition yields an energy spectrum nearly identical to that of a spinless particle from the Schrödinger equation, except for the absence of the 'geometric potential'; however, the necessary conditions for polynomial solutions are not satisfied, undermining reliability.

idea_spark.idea: Modify the extended Nikiforov-Uvarov method or combine it with other analytic techniques (e.g., hypergeometric functions) to overcome the failure of polynomial solution conditions.
idea_spark.risk: The method may be fundamentally unsuitable for such problems, leading to unreliable results; careful validation is needed.
idea_spark.inspiration: Consider numerical methods or perturbation theory as alternatives to obtain reliable energy spectra for the non-relativistic limit of the Dirac equation in curved spaces.

papers.title: Visual Generation in the New Era: An Evolution from Atomic Mapping to Agentic World Modeling
papers.summary: Recent visual generation models have made major progress in photorealism, typography, instruction following, and interactive editing, yet they still struggle with spatial reasoning, persistent state, long-horizon consistency, and causal understanding. We argue that the field should move beyond appearance synthesis toward intelligent visual generation: plausible visuals grounded in structure, dynamics, domain knowledge, and causal relations. To frame this shift, we introduce a five-level taxonomy: Atomic Generation, Conditional Generation, In-Context Generation, Agentic Generation, and World-Modeling Generation, progressing from passive renderers to interactive, agentic, world-aware generators. We analyze key technical drivers, including flow matching, unified understanding-and-generation models, improved visual representations, post-training, reward modeling, data curation, synthetic data distillation, and sampling acceleration. We further show that current evaluations often overestimate progress by emphasizing perceptual quality while missing structural, temporal, and causal failures. By combining benchmark review, in-the-wild stress tests, and expert-constrained case studies, this roadmap offers a capability-centered lens for understanding, evaluating, and advancing the next generation of intelligent visual generation systems.

ai.tldr: 本文提出视觉生成从原子映射到智能世界建模的五级分类法，并分析关键技术驱动与评估缺陷。
ai.motivation: 现有视觉生成模型在空间推理、持久状态、长程一致性和因果理解上仍存在不足，需要超越外观合成迈向智能生成。
ai.method: 提出五级分类法（原子生成、条件生成、上下文生成、智能体生成、世界模型生成），并梳理流匹配、统一理解-生成模型、后训练、奖励建模等关键技术。
ai.result: 指出当前评估过度强调感知质量而忽略结构、时间和因果失败，通过基准测试、野外压力测试和专家约束案例研究提供能力中心视角。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助研究者理解视觉生成领域的能力层次、技术路线和评估陷阱，指导下一代智能生成系统的研发。

idea_spark.risk: 世界模型生成可能引入不可控的因果幻觉，需严格验证物理一致性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从强化学习中的世界模型和因果推理文献中借鉴形式化方法，用于视觉生成的结构化约束。

en.motivation: Current visual generation models struggle with spatial reasoning, persistent state, long-horizon consistency, and causal understanding, necessitating a shift beyond appearance synthesis toward intelligent generation.

papers.title: On the Quantisation of Linear Gauge Theories on Lorentzian Manifolds: Maxwell's Theory via Complete Gauge Fixing
papers.summary: This thesis is devoted to the study of hyperbolic differential operators on globally hyperbolic manifolds, linear gauge theories and their quantisation.   In the first part, we treat the Cauchy problem for symmetric hyperbolic systems and normally hyperbolic operators on globally hyperbolic manifolds from first principles. Although hyperbolic equations are usually studied with local interactions, there are strong motivations from several areas of mathematical physics to consider also nonlocal interactions. As an intermezzo, we therefore take a small deviation from the classical local theory and prove well-posedness of the Cauchy problem for symmetric hyperbolic systems coupled to a broad class of nonlocal potentials.   The second part presents a detailed exposition of linear gauge theories in globally hyperbolic spacetimes. Linear gauge theories are yet another deviation from the concept of hyperbolicity: the corresponding equations of motion are generically non-hyperbolic; however, can always be reduced to a constrained hyperbolic dynamics once an appropriate gauge fixing procedure has been applied. We give a thorough analysis of their Cauchy problem and classical phase space, complemented by a detailed discussion of many examples of physical interest, and discuss their quantisation following the algebraic approach to quantum field theory.   The final chapter is devoted to the quantisation of Maxwell's theory on globally hyperbolic spacetimes, with the goal of proving the existence of Hadamard states. The novelty of our approach lies in a new gauge-fixing procedure at the level of initial data, which allows us to suppress the unphysical degrees of freedom. This gauge is achieved by means of a new Hodge decomposition for differential k-forms in Sobolev spaces on complete Riemannian manifolds, while states are constructed using tools from pseudodifferential calculus.

ai.tldr: 本文研究全局双曲流形上的线性规范理论及其量子化，重点通过完全规范固定方法证明麦克斯韦理论中Hadamard态的存在性。
ai.motivation: 解决线性规范理论在全局双曲时空中的量子化问题，特别是麦克斯韦理论中Hadamard态的存在性证明。
ai.method: 采用代数量子场论方法，引入基于初始数据的新规范固定程序，结合Sobolev空间中的Hodge分解和伪微分算子构造态。
ai.result: 成功证明了全局双曲时空中麦克斯韦理论的Hadamard态存在性，并建立了非局部势下对称双曲系统的适定性。
ai.help_to_user: 为理解弯曲时空中的规范场量子化提供严格数学框架，尤其适用于研究量子场论在弯曲背景下的Hadamard态构造。

idea_spark.idea: 将Hodge分解与伪微分算子结合，可能为量子引力中的约束系统处理提供新思路。
idea_spark.risk: 非局部势的引入可能破坏因果性，需验证物理合理性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 借鉴非局部势的适定性结果，可探索非局域量子场论模型（如非局域引力）的数学基础。

en.tldr: This thesis studies linear gauge theories on globally hyperbolic manifolds and their quantization, focusing on proving the existence of Hadamard states for Maxwell's theory via a complete gauge-fixing procedure.
en.motivation: To address the quantization of linear gauge theories in globally hyperbolic spacetimes, particularly proving the existence of Hadamard states for Maxwell's theory.
en.method: Using the algebraic approach to quantum field theory, a new gauge-fixing procedure at the level of initial data is introduced, combined with a Hodge decomposition for differential k-forms in Sobolev spaces and pseudodifferential calculus for state construction.
en.result: Successfully proves the existence of Hadamard states for Maxwell's theory on globally hyperbolic spacetimes and establishes well-posedness of symmetric hyperbolic systems with nonlocal potentials.
en.help_to_user: Provides a rigorous mathematical framework for quantizing gauge fields in curved spacetimes, particularly useful for studying Hadamard state construction in quantum field theory on curved backgrounds.

idea_spark.idea: Combining Hodge decomposition with pseudodifferential operators may offer new approaches to handling constraint systems in quantum gravity.
idea_spark.risk: Introduction of nonlocal potentials may violate causality; physical plausibility needs verification.
idea_spark.inspiration: The well-posedness results for nonlocal potentials could inspire mathematical foundations for nonlocal quantum field models (e.g., nonlocal gravity).

papers.title: HiMix: Hierarchical Artifact-aware Mixup for Generalized Synthetic Image Detection
papers.summary: The rapid evolution of generative models has enabled the creation of highly realistic and diverse synthetic images, posing significant challenges to reliable and generalizable Synthetic Image Detection (SID). However, existing detectors are typically trained on limited and biased datasets, resulting in poor generalization to unseen generators. To address this issue, we propose HiMix, a unified framework that enhances generalization by expanding the training distribution and promoting artifact-aware representations. Specifically, the Mixup-driven Distributional Augmentation (MDA) module constructs continuous transitional samples between real and fake images, improving coverage of low-confidence regions and exposing the model to more challenging samples, while the pixel-wise mixup operation smoothly perturbs semantics to enhance sensitivity to low-level artifacts. Moreover, the Hierarchical Artifact-aware Representation (HAR) module aggregates artifact information from both global and local levels through cross-layer integration and coarse-to-fine feature fusion, enabling the extraction of discriminative forgery representations under diverse distributions. Extensive experiments across multiple benchmarks demonstrate that HiMix achieves state-of-the-art performance, establishing well-separated logits for improved generalization to unseen forgeries.

ai.tldr: 提出HiMix框架，通过混合增强和层次化伪影感知表示，提升合成图像检测的泛化能力。
ai.motivation: 现有检测器在有限且有偏的数据集上训练，对未见生成器泛化差。
ai.method: 包含Mixup驱动的分布增强模块和层次化伪影感知表示模块，前者构造连续过渡样本，后者融合全局与局部伪影信息。
ai.result: 在多个基准上达到最先进性能，对未见伪造图像具有良好泛化。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户检测由不同生成模型产生的合成图像，提升安全监控和内容审核的可靠性。

en.tldr: Proposes HiMix, a framework that enhances generalization in synthetic image detection via mixup augmentation and hierarchical artifact-aware representation.
en.motivation: Existing detectors trained on limited biased datasets generalize poorly to unseen generators.
en.method: Includes a Mixup-driven Distributional Augmentation module that constructs continuous transitional samples, and a Hierarchical Artifact-aware Representation module that aggregates global and local artifact information.
en.result: Achieves state-of-the-art performance on multiple benchmarks with well-separated logits for improved generalization.
en.help_to_user: Helps users detect synthetic images from various generative models, improving reliability in security monitoring and content moderation.

idea_spark.idea: Extends mixup to pixel-level operations and designs cross-layer feature fusion to capture subtle artifacts.
idea_spark.risk: May still miss highly realistic generated images and incurs higher computational cost.
idea_spark.inspiration: Simultaneously addressing distribution coverage and multi-scale artifact representation inspires future work on robust generalization.

papers.title: SST-Guard: Detecting and Characterizing Server-Side Google Analytics in the Wild
papers.summary: As web browsers increasingly restrict client-side tracking, the web tracking ecosystem is shifting from client-side to server-side tracking (SST). In SST, the browser sends tracking requests to an intermediate endpoint, which then forwards them to the tracker's endpoint, eliminating direct client-to-tracker requests. As a result, existing tracking protections that block requests to known tracker endpoints are rendered ineffective.   In this paper, we investigate server-side implementation of Google Analytics, the most widely deployed third-party tracking service on the web today. We also present SST-Guard, a multi-modal, browser-based system for detecting and blocking server-side Google Analytics (sGA). Our key insight is that even when the tracker's endpoints change, sGA must necessarily still collect and share the same semantic information as client-side Google Analytics (e.g., identifiers, event metadata). Therefore, rather than detecting requests to known Google Analytics endpoints, SST-Guard aims to detect underlying artifacts of collection and sharing of these semantic values to any arbitrary endpoint. Operationalizing this insight is challenging because real-world sGA deployments commonly customize endpoints and obfuscate URLs/payloads. SST-Guard addresses this challenge using a value-template approach that employs regular expressions to match semantic value patterns across multiple modalities: network requests, cookies, and the window object.   We validate SST-Guard on Tranco top-10k websites, detecting 4.02\% (403) sGA domains with over 93\% accuracy across three modalities, with network request classifier demonstrating the highest accuracy (99.8\%). By deploying SST-Guard in the wild, we find 4.21\% (6,314) of Tranco top-150k websites using sGA.

ai.tldr: 提出 SST-Guard 系统，通过多模态检测服务器端 Google Analytics，准确率超过 93%。
ai.motivation: 浏览器限制客户端跟踪后，跟踪转向服务器端，现有保护失效。
ai.method: 基于值模板方法，用正则表达式匹配网络请求、Cookie 和窗口对象中的语义值模式。
ai.result: 在 Tranco 前 10k 网站中检测到 4.02% 的 sGA 域，准确率 93% 以上；前 150k 网站中 4.21% 使用 sGA。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户识别和阻止服务器端 Google Analytics 跟踪。

idea_spark.risk: 正则表达式可能漏掉高度定制化的混淆。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从客户端跟踪的语义信息不变性出发，设计跨模态检测。

zh.motivation: 浏览器限制客户端跟踪后，跟踪转向服务器端，现有保护失效。
zh.method: 基于值模板方法，用正则表达式匹配网络请求、Cookie 和窗口对象中的语义值模式。
zh.result: 在 Tranco 前 10k 网站中检测到 4.02% 的 sGA 域，准确率 93% 以上；前 150k 网站中 4.21% 使用 sGA。
zh.help_to_user: 帮助用户识别和阻止服务器端 Google Analytics 跟踪。

idea_spark.idea: 利用语义值模式而非端点检测，可绕过 URL 混淆。
idea_spark.risk: 正则表达式可能漏掉高度定制化的混淆。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从客户端跟踪的语义信息不变性出发，设计跨模态检测。

en.tldr: Proposes SST-Guard, a multi-modal system to detect server-side Google Analytics with over 93% accuracy.
en.motivation: As browsers restrict client-side tracking, tracking shifts to server-side, rendering existing protections ineffective.
en.method: Uses a value-template approach with regular expressions to match semantic value patterns across network requests, cookies, and window object.
en.result: Detects 4.02% sGA domains in Tranco top-10k with >93% accuracy; 4.21% of top-150k sites use sGA.
en.help_to_user: Helps users detect and block server-side Google Analytics tracking.

idea_spark.idea: Leveraging semantic value patterns instead of endpoints bypasses URL obfuscation.
idea_spark.risk: Regular expressions may miss highly customized obfuscation.
idea_spark.inspiration: The invariance of semantic information from client-side tracking inspires cross-modal detection.

papers.title: Length Value Model: Scalable Value Pretraining for Token-Level Length Modeling
papers.summary: Token serves as the fundamental unit of computation in modern autoregressive models, and generation length directly influences both inference cost and reasoning performance. Despite its importance, existing approaches lack fine-grained length modeling, operating primarily at the coarse-grained sequence level. We introduce the Length Value Model (LenVM), a token-level framework that models the remaining generation length. By formulating length modeling as a value estimation problem and assigning a constant negative reward to each generated token, LenVM predicts a bounded, discounted return that serves as a monotone proxy for the remaining generation horizon. This formulation yields supervision that is annotation-free, dense, unbiased, and scalable. Experiments on LLMs and VLMs demonstrate LenVM provides a highly effective signal at inference time. On the LIFEBench exact length matching task, applying LenVM to a 7B model improves the length score from 30.9 to 64.8, significantly outperforming frontier closed-source models. Furthermore, LenVM enables continuous control over the trade off between performance and efficiency. On GSM8K at a budget of 200 tokens, LenVM maintains 63% accuracy compared to 6 percent for token budget baseline. It also accurately predicts total generation length from the prompt boundary. Finally, LenVM's token-level values offer an interpretable view of generation dynamics, revealing how specific tokens shift reasoning toward shorter or longer regimes. Results demonstrate that LenVM supports a broad range of applications and token length can be effectively modeled as a token-level value signal, highlighting the potential of LenVM as a general framework for length modeling and as a length-specific value signal that could support future RL training. Code is available at https://github.com/eric-ai-lab/Length-Value-Model.

ai.tldr: 提出长度价值模型（LenVM），在token级别对剩余生成长度进行建模，无需标注、可扩展，并能在推理时有效控制长度与性能的权衡。
ai.motivation: 现有方法仅在序列级别粗粒度地建模生成长度，缺乏细粒度的token级别控制，无法精确平衡推理成本与推理性能。
ai.method: 将长度建模转化为价值估计问题，对每个生成token赋予恒定负奖励，预测有界折扣回报作为剩余生成长度的单调代理，实现无标注、密集、无偏且可扩展的监督信号。
ai.result: 在LIFEBench精确长度匹配任务上，7B模型长度得分从30.9提升至64.8，超越前沿闭源模型；在GSM8K上200 token预算下准确率63%，远超基线6%。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何在推理时动态控制生成长度，以在性能和效率之间取得更好平衡，并提供可解释的生成动态视图。

idea_spark.idea: 将长度价值信号作为强化学习中的奖励函数，训练模型自主学会在给定预算下生成最优长度的回答。
idea_spark.risk: 价值估计可能对长尾或罕见生成模式不够鲁棒，需要进一步验证在不同分布下的泛化能力。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受强化学习中价值函数启发，将生成长度视为可优化的价值信号，为token级控制提供了新思路。

en.tldr: We propose the Length Value Model (LenVM), a token-level framework that models remaining generation length via value estimation, providing annotation-free, dense, unbiased, and scalable supervision for length control.
en.motivation: Existing methods only model generation length at the coarse sequence level, lacking fine-grained token-level control to balance inference cost and reasoning performance.
en.method: Formulating length modeling as a value estimation problem, LenVM assigns a constant negative reward to each generated token and predicts a bounded discounted return as a monotonic proxy for remaining generation horizon.
en.result: On LIFEBench exact length matching, LenVM improves a 7B model's length score from 30.9 to 64.8, surpassing frontier closed-source models; on GSM8K with a 200-token budget, it achieves 63% accuracy vs. 6% for the baseline.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how to dynamically control generation length at inference time for better performance-efficiency trade-offs, with interpretable generation dynamics.

idea_spark.idea: Use the length value signal as a reward function in reinforcement learning to train models to autonomously generate optimal-length responses under a given budget.
idea_spark.risk: Value estimation may be less robust for long-tail or rare generation patterns, requiring further validation of generalization across distributions.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by value functions in reinforcement learning, treating generation length as an optimizable value signal opens new avenues for token-level control.

papers.title: Simulating Validity: Modal Decoupling in MLLM Generated Feedback on Science Drawings
papers.summary: In science education, students frequently construct hand-drawn visual models of scientific phenomena. These drawings rely on a visual structure where information is encoded through visual objects, their attributes, and relationships. Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) are increasingly used to generate feedback on students' hand-drawn scientific models. However, the validity of such feedback depends on whether model claims are grounded in the specific visual evidence of the student drawing. This study uncovers grounding failures, consistent with modal decoupling, in off-the-shelf MLLM feedback, where outputs remain pedagogically plausible in form while contradicting the drawing or treating depicted elements as missing. Using N = 150 middle school drawings from a kinetic molecular theory unit spanning five modeling tasks and three competence levels, we generated N = 300 feedback instances with GPT-5.1. All outputs were coded for four grounding error types: object mismatch, attribute mismatch, relation mismatch, and false absence. Grounding failures were common: 41.3% of feedback instances contained at least one error. An inventory-list-first workflow reduced several error categories and lowered the overall error rate, but it did not resolve the underlying limitation: approximately one in three outputs remained flawed, with false absence as the dominant failure mode. Moreover, feedback that appears visually grounded offered little diagnostic value for identifying invalid instances. The findings indicate that modal decoupling is a substantial limitation and that valid feedback will require grounding mechanisms beyond common prompting strategies.

ai.tldr: 研究发现多模态大语言模型在科学绘图反馈中普遍存在模态解耦导致的接地失败，41.3%的反馈包含至少一种错误。
ai.motivation: 科学教育中，学生常绘制手绘科学模型，多模态大语言模型被用于生成反馈，但其有效性取决于反馈是否基于绘图中的视觉证据。
ai.method: 收集150份中学动力学分子理论绘图，使用GPT-5.1生成300条反馈，编码四种接地错误类型（对象、属性、关系不匹配及虚假缺失）。
ai.result: 41.3%的反馈存在接地错误，清单优先工作流虽降低部分错误率，但约三分之一输出仍有缺陷，虚假缺失是主要错误模式。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解多模态大语言模型在科学绘图反馈中的局限性，以及简单提示策略无法解决模态解耦问题。

idea_spark.idea: 开发基于视觉-语言对齐的显式接地机制，例如在反馈生成前强制模型输出绘图元素清单并验证。
idea_spark.risk: 显式接地可能增加计算开销，且过度约束可能降低反馈的自然性和多样性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受人类教师反馈流程启发：先识别绘图元素再给出评价，而非直接生成整体反馈。

zh.motivation: 科学教育中，学生常绘制手绘科学模型，多模态大语言模型被用于生成反馈，但其有效性取决于反馈是否基于绘图中的视觉证据。

en.tldr: The study reveals that multimodal large language models commonly suffer from grounding failures due to modal decoupling in feedback on science drawings, with 41.3% of instances containing at least one error.
en.motivation: In science education, students often create hand-drawn visual models, and MLLMs are increasingly used to generate feedback, but validity depends on grounding in visual evidence.
en.method: Collected 150 middle school drawings on kinetic molecular theory, generated 300 feedback instances with GPT-5.1, and coded four grounding error types (object, attribute, relation mismatch, and false absence).
en.result: 41.3% of feedback contained grounding errors; an inventory-list-first workflow reduced some errors but about one-third of outputs remained flawed, with false absence as the dominant failure mode.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand the limitations of MLLM feedback on science drawings and that simple prompting strategies cannot resolve modal decoupling.

idea_spark.idea: Develop explicit grounding mechanisms based on vision-language alignment, e.g., forcing the model to list and verify drawing elements before generating feedback.
idea_spark.risk: Explicit grounding may increase computational cost, and over-constraining could reduce naturalness and diversity of feedback.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by human teacher feedback process: first identify drawing elements, then evaluate, rather than generating holistic feedback directly.

papers.title: Robust Constrained Optimization via Sliding Mode Control
papers.summary: This paper develops a sliding mode control based frame work for equality constrained optimization by reformulation the first order Karush Kuhn Tucker conditions as control affine dynamical system. The optimization variables are treated as states and the Lagrange multipliers as control input, with equality constraints defined as sliding manifold. The resulting design guarantees exact constraint enforcement with finite time convergence, independent of objective convexity, and exhibits robustness to matched disturbance, structural uncertainty and bounded measurement noise. To accelerate the convergence, a nonsingular terminal sliding mode based normed gradient flow is introduced, ensuring both finite time convergence to optimal solution and constraint satisfaction. Rigorous Lyapunov analysis establishes closed loop stability and convergence. Numerical studies across diverse benchmark problems demonstrate superior accuracy and robustness over classical continuous time optimization method, highlighting effectiveness under disturbance.

ai.tldr: 提出基于滑模控制的等式约束优化框架，将KKT条件重构为控制仿射系统，实现有限时间精确约束满足，且对扰动和噪声具有鲁棒性。
ai.motivation: 传统连续时间优化方法在约束满足和鲁棒性方面存在不足，需要一种能严格保证约束且对扰动不敏感的方法。
ai.method: 将优化变量视为状态、拉格朗日乘子视为控制输入，等式约束定义为滑模面；引入非奇异终端滑模范数梯度流加速收敛。
ai.result: 通过李雅普诺夫分析证明闭环稳定性和有限时间收敛，数值实验显示比经典方法更高的精度和鲁棒性。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种鲁棒的约束优化求解思路，尤其适用于存在扰动和不确定性的工程优化问题。

idea_spark.idea: 将滑模控制与强化学习结合，用于在线优化控制策略。
idea_spark.risk: 滑模控制可能引起抖振，需考虑实际系统的执行器限制。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受滑模控制对匹配扰动不敏感的特性启发，可用于设计抗干扰的优化算法。

zh.tldr: 提出基于滑模控制的等式约束优化框架，将KKT条件重构为控制仿射系统，实现有限时间精确约束满足，且对扰动和噪声具有鲁棒性。
zh.motivation: 传统连续时间优化方法在约束满足和鲁棒性方面存在不足，需要一种能严格保证约束且对扰动不敏感的方法。

zh.result: 通过李雅普诺夫分析证明闭环稳定性和有限时间收敛，数值实验显示比经典方法更高的精度和鲁棒性。
zh.help_to_user: 提供一种鲁棒的约束优化求解思路，尤其适用于存在扰动和不确定性的工程优化问题。

idea_spark.idea: 将滑模控制与强化学习结合，用于在线优化控制策略。
idea_spark.risk: 滑模控制可能引起抖振，需考虑实际系统的执行器限制。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受滑模控制对匹配扰动不敏感的特性启发，可用于设计抗干扰的优化算法。

en.tldr: Proposes a sliding mode control framework for equality constrained optimization, reformulating KKT conditions as a control affine system to achieve finite-time exact constraint satisfaction with robustness to disturbances and noise.
en.motivation: Classical continuous-time optimization methods lack strict constraint enforcement and robustness, necessitating a method that guarantees constraints and tolerates disturbances.
en.method: Treats optimization variables as states and Lagrange multipliers as control inputs, with equality constraints as sliding manifold; introduces a nonsingular terminal sliding mode normed gradient flow to accelerate convergence.
en.result: Lyapunov analysis proves closed-loop stability and finite-time convergence; numerical experiments show superior accuracy and robustness over classical methods.
en.help_to_user: Provides a robust constrained optimization approach suitable for engineering problems with disturbances and uncertainties.

idea_spark.idea: Combine sliding mode control with reinforcement learning for online optimization of control policies.
idea_spark.risk: Sliding mode control may cause chattering, requiring consideration of actuator limitations in practice.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the insensitivity of sliding mode control to matched disturbances, it can be used to design disturbance-rejecting optimization algorithms.

papers.title: UHR-Net: An Uncertainty-Aware Hypergraph Refinement Network for Medical Image Segmentation
papers.summary: Accurate lesion segmentation is crucial for clinical diagnosis and treatment planning. However, lesions often resemble surrounding tissues and exhibit ill-defined boundaries, leading to unstable predictions in boundary/transition regions. Moreover, small-lesion cues can be diluted by multi-scale feature extraction, causing under- or over-segmentation. To address these challenges, we propose an Uncertainty-Aware Hypergraph Refinement Network (UHR-Net). First, we introduce an Uncertainty-Oriented Instance Contrastive (UO-IC) pretraining strategy that couples geometry-aware copy-paste augmentation with hard-negative mining of lesion-like background regions to improve instance-level discrimination for small and visually ambiguous lesions. Second, we design an Uncertainty-Guided Hypergraph Refinement (UGHR) block, which derives an entropy-based uncertainty map from a coarse probability map to guide hypergraph refinement. By splitting hyperedge prototypes into foreground and background groups, UGHR decouples higher-order interactions and improves refinement in ambiguous regions. Experiments on five public benchmarks demonstrate consistent gains over strong baselines. Code is available at: https://github.com/CUGfreshman/UHR-Net.

ai.tldr: 提出UHR-Net，通过不确定性感知的超图细化网络，解决医学图像分割中病变边界模糊和小病变漏检问题。
ai.motivation: 病变常与周围组织相似且边界不清，导致预测不稳定；小病变特征在多尺度提取中被稀释，造成欠分割或过分割。
ai.method: 采用不确定性导向的实例对比预训练（UO-IC），结合几何感知复制粘贴增强和难负样本挖掘；设计不确定性引导超图细化块（UGHR），利用熵图指导超边原型的前景/背景分组，解耦高阶交互。
ai.result: 在五个公开数据集上取得一致提升，代码已开源。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一种处理边界模糊和小病变的通用分割框架，可直接用于医学影像分析任务。

idea_spark.idea: 将不确定性图与超图学习结合，通过熵值动态调整超边聚合权重，可能进一步改善模糊区域表示。
idea_spark.risk: 超图构建和熵计算增加计算开销，需验证在实时或大尺度场景下的效率。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从病变边界不确定性出发，启发利用预测置信度动态引导特征交互，类似思想可用于点云分割或视频目标分割。

zh.tldr: 提出UHR-Net，通过不确定性感知的超图细化网络，解决医学图像分割中病变边界模糊和小病变漏检问题。
zh.motivation: 病变常与周围组织相似且边界不清，导致预测不稳定；小病变特征在多尺度提取中被稀释，造成欠分割或过分割。

zh.result: 在五个公开数据集上取得一致提升，代码已开源。
zh.help_to_user: 提供了一种处理边界模糊和小病变的通用分割框架，可直接用于医学影像分析任务。

idea_spark.idea: 将不确定性图与超图学习结合，通过熵值动态调整超边聚合权重，可能进一步改善模糊区域表示。
idea_spark.risk: 超图构建和熵计算增加计算开销，需验证在实时或大尺度场景下的效率。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从病变边界不确定性出发，启发利用预测置信度动态引导特征交互，类似思想可用于点云分割或视频目标分割。

en.tldr: Proposes UHR-Net, an uncertainty-aware hypergraph refinement network for medical image segmentation, addressing ill-defined boundaries and small lesion under-segmentation.
en.motivation: Lesions often resemble surrounding tissues with unclear boundaries, causing unstable predictions; small lesion cues are diluted during multi-scale feature extraction, leading to under- or over-segmentation.
en.method: Employs an Uncertainty-Oriented Instance Contrastive (UO-IC) pretraining with geometry-aware copy-paste augmentation and hard-negative mining; designs an Uncertainty-Guided Hypergraph Refinement (UGHR) block that uses an entropy-based uncertainty map to split hyperedge prototypes into foreground/background groups for decoupled higher-order interactions.
en.result: Consistent improvements over strong baselines on five public benchmarks; code is publicly available.
en.help_to_user: Provides a general segmentation framework that handles boundary ambiguity and small lesions, directly applicable to medical imaging tasks.

idea_spark.idea: Combining uncertainty maps with hypergraph learning by dynamically adjusting hyperedge aggregation weights based on entropy may further improve representation in ambiguous regions.
idea_spark.risk: Hypergraph construction and entropy computation add computational overhead; efficiency in real-time or large-scale scenarios needs verification.
idea_spark.inspiration: Leveraging prediction confidence to dynamically guide feature interactions, inspired by lesion boundary uncertainty, could be applied to point cloud segmentation or video object segmentation.

papers.title: Light-Cone Structure of Propagation of Entanglement
papers.summary: For a wide class of bipartite systems with localized couplings, we establish existence of an effective light-cone for propagation of entanglement. This result yields a hard lower bound on the time it takes, under ideal conditions (no loss, no decoherence), to transport entanglement to a distant location (say, a node of a graph-structured quantum network), or to maintain it there.

ai.tldr: 对于具有局域耦合的双粒子系统，证明了纠缠传播存在有效光锥结构，给出了理想条件下纠缠传输到远距离节点所需时间的硬下界。
ai.motivation: 理解纠缠在量子网络中传播的基本速度限制，为量子通信和量子网络设计提供理论依据。
ai.method: 通过分析局域耦合双粒子系统的动力学，建立纠缠传播的有效光锥并推导下界。
ai.result: 证明了纠缠传播存在有效光锥，并给出了理想条件下纠缠传输到远距离位置所需时间的硬下界。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解量子网络中纠缠传播的速度极限，指导量子网络节点布局和纠缠分发策略设计。

idea_spark.idea: 利用有效光锥下界优化量子网络中的纠缠路由协议，减少纠缠建立时间。

en.tldr: For a wide class of bipartite systems with localized couplings, we establish existence of an effective light-cone for propagation of entanglement, yielding a hard lower bound on the time to transport entanglement to a distant node under ideal conditions.
en.motivation: To understand the fundamental speed limit of entanglement propagation in quantum networks, providing theoretical basis for quantum communication and network design.
en.method: By analyzing the dynamics of bipartite systems with localized couplings, we establish an effective light-cone for entanglement propagation and derive a lower bound.
en.result: Proved the existence of an effective light-cone for entanglement propagation and derived a hard lower bound on the time required to transport entanglement to a distant location under ideal conditions.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand the speed limit of entanglement propagation in quantum networks, guiding node placement and entanglement distribution strategies.

idea_spark.idea: Use the effective light-cone lower bound to optimize entanglement routing protocols in quantum networks, reducing entanglement establishment time.
idea_spark.risk: The ideal condition assumption may ignore the effects of noise and decoherence, making the lower bound overly optimistic in practical systems.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the relativistic light-cone, applying a similar concept to quantum information propagation reveals fundamental speed limits in quantum networks.

papers.title: Low-Complexity Run-Length-Limited ISI-Mitigation (RLIM) Codes for Molecular Communication
papers.summary: Molecular communication suffers from severe inter-symbol interference, which makes constrained coding essential for reliable transmission. Run-length-limited ISI-mitigation codes are attractive because they select low-weight constrained codebooks, reducing ISI while allowing more molecules to be assigned to each transmitted 1-symbol under the usual molecular-communication normalization. Previous results showed strong bit-error-rate performance for these codes, but their original realization required full codebook generation and storage. This exponential storage growth is unsuitable for resource-constrained molecular communication channels and also limits the exploration of larger information dimensions. This is particularly important for nano-scale molecular communication, where transmitter and receiver nodes are expected to operate under severe memory and computational constraints. This paper removes that realization bottleneck by replacing full codebook storage with an enumerative realization based on Cover's ranking framework, constant-weight run-length-limited counting, and cumulative weight-layer offsets. The resulting encoder and decoder preserve the selected RLIM codebooks and the original projection-based decoding behavior while storing only polynomial-size counting tables. Storage and runtime measurements confirm the resulting exponential-to-polynomial reduction, and diffusion-based molecular-communication simulations show that the newly accessible larger-dimensional RLIM regimes can improve the best attainable bit-error-rate performance in the tested settings.

ai.tldr: 提出一种低复杂度的游程限制码（RLIM）的枚举实现方法，用多项式大小的计数表替代指数级码本存储，适用于资源受限的分子通信。
ai.motivation: 分子通信中严重的码间干扰需要约束编码，但现有RLIM码需完整码本生成和存储，指数级存储增长不适合资源受限的纳米级分子通信节点。
ai.method: 基于Cover排序框架、恒定权重游程限制计数和累积权重层偏移，用枚举实现替代完整码本存储，编码器和解码器仅存储多项式大小的计数表。
ai.result: 存储和运行时间测量证实从指数级到多项式级的降低；扩散基分子通信仿真显示，新可访问的高维RLIM区域在测试设置中能改善最佳误码率性能。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解如何在分子通信中设计低复杂度、高可靠性的约束编码方案。

idea_spark.idea: 将Cover排序框架与恒定权重游程限制计数结合，实现多项式存储的编码器/解码器。
idea_spark.risk: 枚举实现可能在高码率或长码长时计算复杂度仍较高，需进一步优化。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用组合计数和排序技术替代暴力存储，启发其他资源受限通信系统的编码设计。

en.tldr: Proposes a low-complexity enumerative realization of run-length-limited ISI-mitigation (RLIM) codes, replacing exponential codebook storage with polynomial-size counting tables for resource-constrained molecular communication.
en.motivation: Molecular communication suffers from severe inter-symbol interference, requiring constrained coding. Existing RLIM codes need full codebook generation and storage, whose exponential growth is unsuitable for resource-constrained nano-scale nodes.
en.method: Replaces full codebook storage with an enumerative realization based on Cover's ranking framework, constant-weight run-length-limited counting, and cumulative weight-layer offsets. The encoder and decoder store only polynomial-size counting tables.
en.result: Storage and runtime measurements confirm exponential-to-polynomial reduction. Diffusion-based simulations show that newly accessible higher-dimensional RLIM regimes improve best attainable bit-error-rate performance in tested settings.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand how to design low-complexity, high-reliability constrained coding schemes for molecular communication.

idea_spark.idea: Combines Cover's ranking framework with constant-weight run-length-limited counting to achieve polynomial-storage encoder/decoder.
idea_spark.risk: Enumerative implementation may still have high computational complexity at high code rates or long block lengths, requiring further optimization.
idea_spark.inspiration: Using combinatorial counting and ranking techniques to replace brute-force storage inspires coding design for other resource-constrained communication systems.

papers.title: Stop Holding Your Breath: CT-Informed Gaussian Splatting for Dynamic Bronchoscopy
papers.summary: Bronchoscopic navigation relies on registering endoscopic video to a preoperative CT scan, but respiratory motion deforms the airway by 5-20 mm, creating CT-to-body divergence that limits localization accuracy. In practice, this is mitigated through breath-hold protocols, which attempt to match the intraoperative anatomy to a static CT, but are difficult to reproduce and disrupt clinical workflow. We propose to eliminate the need for breath-hold protocols by leveraging patient-specific respiratory modeling. Paired inhale-exhale CT scans, already acquired for planning, implicitly define the patient-specific deformation space of the breathing airway. By registering these scans, we reduce respiratory motion to a single scalar breathing phase per frame, constraining all reconstructions to anatomically observed configurations. We embed this representation within a mesh-anchored Gaussian splatting framework, where a lightweight estimator infers breathing phase directly from endoscopic RGB, enabling continuous, deformation-aware reconstruction throughout the respiratory cycle without breath-holds or external sensing. To enable quantitative evaluation, we introduce RESPIRE, a physically grounded bronchoscopy simulation pipeline with per-frame ground truth for geometry, pose, breathing phase, and deformation. Experiments on RESPIRE show that our approach achieves geometrically faithful reconstruction, over 20x faster training, and 1.22 mm target localization accuracy (within the 3mm clinically relevant tolerances) outperforming unconstrained single-CT baselines. Please check out our website for additional visuals: https://asdunnbe.github.io/RESPIRE/

ai.tldr: 提出无需屏气的动态支气管镜导航方法，利用患者特定呼吸模型和网格锚定高斯泼溅实现连续变形重建。
ai.motivation: 呼吸运动导致CT与体内解剖差异达5-20毫米，现有屏气协议难以复现且干扰流程，需消除对屏气的依赖。
ai.method: 通过配准吸气-呼气CT定义患者特定变形空间，将呼吸运动简化为单标量相位；嵌入网格锚定高斯泼溅框架，从内窥镜RGB实时推断呼吸相位。
ai.result: 在RESPIRE模拟上实现几何保真重建、训练速度提升20倍以上、目标定位精度1.22毫米（优于3毫米临床阈值）。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解如何利用术前CT和实时视频实现无屏气、高精度的支气管镜导航。

idea_spark.idea: 将呼吸相位作为隐变量，结合可变形高斯泼溅实现连续解剖重建，替代外部传感器。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖配对吸气-呼气CT，若临床未常规采集则适用性受限；模拟环境与真实手术的差距可能影响泛化。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用术前双相CT隐式建模变形空间，将复杂运动降维为单参数，启发其他周期性运动补偿方法。

en.tldr: Proposes breath-hold-free dynamic bronchoscopy navigation using patient-specific respiratory modeling and mesh-anchored Gaussian splatting for continuous deformation-aware reconstruction.
en.motivation: Respiratory motion causes 5-20 mm CT-to-body divergence; existing breath-hold protocols are irreproducible and disrupt workflow, necessitating elimination of breath-hold dependence.
en.method: Registers paired inhale-exhale CT scans to define patient-specific deformation space, reducing respiratory motion to a scalar breathing phase; embeds this in a mesh-anchored Gaussian splatting framework that infers phase from endoscopic RGB in real time.
en.result: On RESPIRE simulation, achieves geometrically faithful reconstruction, >20x faster training, and 1.22 mm target localization accuracy (within 3 mm clinical tolerance), outperforming unconstrained single-CT baselines.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand how to achieve high-accuracy, breath-hold-free bronchoscopic navigation using preoperative CT and live video.

idea_spark.idea: Use breathing phase as a latent variable with deformable Gaussian splatting for continuous anatomical reconstruction, replacing external sensors.
idea_spark.risk: Relies on paired inhale-exhale CT, limiting applicability if not clinically acquired; gap between simulation and real surgery may affect generalization.
idea_spark.inspiration: Leveraging preoperative biphasic CT to implicitly model deformation space and reduce complex motion to a single parameter inspires other periodic motion compensation methods.

papers.title: MSR:Hybrid Field Modeling for CT-MRI Rigid-Deformable Registration of the Cervical Spine with an Annotated Dataset
papers.summary: Accurate CT-MRI registration of the cervical spine is essential for preoperative planning because this region is anatomically complex,highly variable,and vulnerable to injury of the vertebral arteries and spinal cord. However,cervical CT-MRI registration remains underexplored,particularly for rigid-deformable hybrid modeling,and the lack of high-quality annotated multimodal data further limits progress. To address these challenges, we construct and release a comprehensively annotated CT-MRI dataset, R-D-Reg, and propose MSR, a rigid-deformable hybrid registration framework for complex joint structures. Specifically, MSR includes a rigid registration module for independent local rigid alignment of individual vertebrae and a deformable registration module with an MSL block that combines Mamba-based global modeling and Swin Transformer-based local modeling through adaptive gating. The rigid and deformable deformation fields are then fused to generate a hybrid field that better preserves local anatomical consistency. The code and dataset are publicly available at https://github.com/ssc1230609-spec/MSR-registration.

ai.tldr: 提出MSR框架和R-D-Reg数据集，实现颈椎CT-MRI刚柔混合配准。
ai.motivation: 颈椎解剖复杂、个体差异大，现有CT-MRI配准方法缺乏刚柔混合建模，且缺少高质量标注多模态数据。
ai.method: 构建R-D-Reg数据集；MSR包含刚性配准模块（独立对齐各椎体）和变形配准模块（MSL块，通过自适应门控融合Mamba全局建模与Swin Transformer局部建模），融合生成混合变形场。
ai.result: 在自建数据集上验证，混合场更好地保持局部解剖一致性。
ai.help_to_user: 提供开源代码和数据集，可直接用于颈椎术前规划相关研究。

idea_spark.idea: 将Mamba与Swin Transformer通过自适应门控融合，用于医学图像配准。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖高质量标注数据，不同扫描协议下泛化性需验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用状态空间模型（Mamba）替代传统CNN或纯Transformer，提升长程依赖建模效率。

en.tldr: Proposes MSR framework and R-D-Reg dataset for hybrid rigid-deformable CT-MRI registration of the cervical spine.
en.motivation: Cervical spine anatomy is complex and variable; existing methods lack rigid-deformable hybrid modeling and high-quality annotated multimodal data.
en.method: Constructs R-D-Reg dataset; MSR includes a rigid module for per-vertebra alignment and a deformable module with MSL block that adaptively gates Mamba global and Swin Transformer local modeling, fusing fields for hybrid deformation.
en.result: Validated on the dataset, the hybrid field better preserves local anatomical consistency.
en.help_to_user: Provides open-source code and dataset for cervical spine preoperative planning research.

idea_spark.idea: Adaptive gating of Mamba and Swin Transformer for medical image registration.
idea_spark.risk: Relies on high-quality annotations; generalization across different scanning protocols needs verification.
idea_spark.inspiration: Using state-space models (Mamba) to replace CNNs or pure Transformers for efficient long-range dependency modeling.

papers.title: Why Mean Pooling Works: Quantifying Second-Order Collapse in Text Embeddings
papers.summary: For constructing text embeddings, mean pooling, which averages token embeddings, is the standard approach. This paper examines whether mean pooling actually works well in real models. First, we note that mean pooling can collapse information beyond the first-order statistics of the token embeddings, such as second-order statistics that capture their spatial structure, potentially mapping distinct token embedding distributions to similar text embeddings. Motivated by this concern, we propose a simple metric to quantify such a collapse induced by mean pooling. Then, using this metric, we empirically measure how often this collapse occurs in actual models and texts, and find that modern text encoders are robust to this collapse. In particular, contrastive fine-tuned text encoders tend to be less prone to the collapse than their pretrained backbone models. We also find that the robustness of these text encoders lies in the concentration of token embeddings within each text. In addition, we find that robustness to the collapse, as quantified by our proposed metric, correlates with downstream task performance. Overall, our findings offer a new perspective on why modern text encoders remain effective despite relying on seemingly coarse mean pooling.

ai.tldr: 本文研究了文本嵌入中平均池化导致二阶统计信息坍塌的问题，并提出量化指标，发现现代文本编码器对此具有鲁棒性。
ai.motivation: 平均池化是文本嵌入的标准方法，但可能丢失令牌嵌入的二阶统计信息（如空间结构），导致不同分布映射为相似嵌入。
ai.method: 提出一个简单指标量化平均池化引起的二阶坍塌，并在实际模型和文本中测量坍塌频率。
ai.result: 现代文本编码器对坍塌鲁棒，对比微调模型比预训练骨干更不易坍塌；鲁棒性源于令牌嵌入在文本内的集中性；该指标与下游任务性能相关。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解平均池化为何有效，以及如何评估和选择鲁棒的文本编码器。

idea_spark.idea: 设计新的池化策略，显式保留二阶统计信息以提升嵌入质量。
idea_spark.risk: 新池化策略可能增加计算复杂度，且对某些任务未必优于平均池化。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从统计坍塌角度重新审视常见操作，启发更精细的表示学习理论。

idea_spark.risk: 新池化策略可能增加计算复杂度，且对某些任务未必优于平均池化。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从统计坍塌角度重新审视常见操作，启发更精细的表示学习理论。

en.tldr: This paper investigates second-order collapse caused by mean pooling in text embeddings, proposes a metric to quantify it, and finds modern text encoders are robust to this collapse.
en.motivation: Mean pooling, the standard method for text embeddings, may collapse second-order statistics (e.g., spatial structure) of token embeddings, potentially mapping distinct distributions to similar embeddings.
en.method: A simple metric is proposed to quantify second-order collapse induced by mean pooling, and empirical measurements are conducted on real models and texts.
en.result: Modern text encoders are robust to collapse; contrastive fine-tuned models are less prone than pretrained backbones; robustness correlates with token embedding concentration within texts; the metric correlates with downstream task performance.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand why mean pooling works and how to evaluate robust text encoders.

idea_spark.idea: Design novel pooling strategies that explicitly preserve second-order statistics to improve embedding quality.
idea_spark.risk: New pooling strategies may increase computational cost and may not outperform mean pooling on all tasks.
idea_spark.inspiration: Revisiting common operations from a statistical collapse perspective inspires more principled representation learning theories.

papers.title: From Coarse to Fine: Benchmarking and Reward Modeling for Writing-Centric Generation Tasks
papers.summary: Large language models have achieved remarkable progress in text generation but still struggle with generative writing tasks. In terms of evaluation, existing benchmarks evaluate writing reward models coarsely and fail to measure performance from the perspective of specific requirements. In terms of training, existing training methods either use LLM-as-a-judge approaches or train coarse-grained reward models, lacking fine-grained requirement-adherence reward modeling. To address these issues, we propose a fine-grained evaluation pipeline WEval for writing reward models and a fine-grained reinforcement learning training framework WRL. The evaluation data of WEval covers multiple task categories and requirement types, enabling systematic evaluation of writing reward models by measuring the correlation between the rankings of the reward model and gold rankings. WRL constructs positive and negative samples by selectively dropping instruction requirements, allowing for more precise reward model training. Experiments show that our models achieve substantial improvements across various writing benchmarks and exhibit strong generalization. The code and data are publicly available at \href{https://github.com/Rainier-rq1/From_Coarse_to_Fine}{https://github.com/Rainier-rq1/From\_Coarse\_to\_Fine}.

ai.tldr: 提出从粗到细的写作生成任务评估与奖励建模方法，包括细粒度评估流水线WEval和强化学习训练框架WRL。
ai.motivation: 现有基准对写作奖励模型评估粗糙，缺乏细粒度需求符合性奖励建模。
ai.method: 构建WEval评估流水线，覆盖多任务类别和需求类型；WRL通过选择性丢弃指令需求构造正负样本进行奖励模型训练。
ai.result: 在多个写作基准上取得显著提升，并展现强泛化能力。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户系统评估和训练写作奖励模型，提升生成文本对具体需求的符合度。

idea_spark.idea: 利用指令需求选择性丢弃构造对比样本，可更精确地训练奖励模型。
idea_spark.risk: 需求丢弃策略可能引入偏差，需谨慎设计以保证样本代表性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从粗到细的评估框架启发我们关注任务中的多层次需求满足。

en.tldr: Proposes a coarse-to-fine approach for evaluating and reward modeling in writing-centric generation tasks, including a fine-grained evaluation pipeline WEval and a reinforcement learning training framework WRL.
en.motivation: Existing benchmarks evaluate writing reward models coarsely and lack fine-grained requirement-adherence reward modeling.
en.method: Builds WEval evaluation pipeline covering multiple task categories and requirement types; WRL constructs positive and negative samples by selectively dropping instruction requirements for more precise reward model training.
en.result: Achieves substantial improvements across various writing benchmarks and exhibits strong generalization.
en.help_to_user: Helps users systematically evaluate and train writing reward models, improving adherence to specific requirements in generated text.

idea_spark.idea: Using selective dropping of instruction requirements to construct contrastive samples enables more precise reward model training.
idea_spark.risk: The dropping strategy may introduce bias; careful design is needed to ensure sample representativeness.
idea_spark.inspiration: The coarse-to-fine evaluation framework inspires attention to multi-level requirement satisfaction in tasks.

papers.title: Mapping the Methodological Space of Classroom Interaction Research: Scale, Duration, and Modality in an Age of AI
papers.summary: Research on classroom interaction has long been divided between large-scale observation and in-depth ethnographic work. We propose a framework mapping this methodological space along three dimensions--scale, duration, and modality--where a study's position shapes what it reveals and obscures. We illustrate it through contrasting studies of dialogic teaching--Howe et al. (2019) and Snell and Lefstein (2018)--and an interview with the lead researchers, organized around three questions: what can be operationalized, what mechanisms become visible, and what translates to practice. We then examine how AI is expanding this space and how the framework can guide research and tool design.

ai.tldr: 提出一个按规模、时长和模态三个维度绘制课堂互动研究方法空间的框架，并探讨AI如何扩展这一空间。
ai.motivation: 课堂互动研究长期分裂于大规模观察与深度民族志工作之间，缺乏统一的方法论框架。
ai.method: 通过对比两项对话教学研究（Howe等2019与Snell和Lefstein 2018）及对主要研究者的访谈，从可操作化、机制可见性和实践转化三个问题出发，构建三维框架。
ai.result: 框架揭示了不同研究位置在揭示和遮蔽上的差异，并指出AI正在扩展该空间，为研究和工具设计提供指导。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助研究者定位自己的研究方法，理解不同选择带来的局限与优势，并利用AI拓展研究可能性。

idea_spark.idea: 利用AI自动标注课堂互动中的模态（如语音、文本、手势），结合框架动态推荐最优研究方法组合。
idea_spark.risk: AI扩展可能过度简化质性维度，导致对课堂复杂性的忽视。
idea_spark.inspiration: 借鉴计算机视觉中的多尺度分析，设计自适应研究工具，根据研究问题自动调整观察的规模、时长和模态。
