en.tldr: Proposes a framework mapping the methodological space of classroom interaction research along scale, duration, and modality, and examines how AI expands this space.
en.motivation: Classroom interaction research is divided between large-scale observation and in-depth ethnography, lacking a unified methodological framework.
en.method: Contrasts two dialogic teaching studies (Howe et al. 2019 vs. Snell and Lefstein 2018) and interviews lead researchers around three questions: what can be operationalized, what mechanisms become visible, and what translates to practice.
en.result: The framework reveals how a study's position shapes what it reveals and obscures, and shows AI is expanding the space, guiding research and tool design.
en.help_to_user: Helps researchers locate their methodological approach, understand trade-offs, and leverage AI to explore new possibilities.

idea_spark.idea: Use AI to automatically annotate modalities (e.g., speech, text, gesture) in classroom interaction and dynamically recommend optimal research method combinations based on the framework.
idea_spark.risk: AI expansion may oversimplify qualitative dimensions, leading to neglect of classroom complexity.
idea_spark.inspiration: Draw from multi-scale analysis in computer vision to design adaptive research tools that automatically adjust scale, duration, and modality according to research questions.

papers.title: Modeling Clinical Concern Trajectories in Language Model Agents
papers.summary: Large language model (LLM) agents deployed in clinical settings often exhibit abrupt, threshold-driven behavior, offering little visibility into accumulating risk prior to escalation. In real-world care, however, clinicians act on gradually rising concern rather than instantaneous triggers. We study whether explicit state dynamics can expose such pre-escalation signals without delegating clinical authority to the agent. We introduce a lightweight agent architecture in which a memoryless clinical risk encoder is integrated over time using first- and second-order dynamics to produce a continuous escalation pressure signal. Across synthetic ward scenarios, stateless agents exhibit sharp escalation cliffs, while second-order dynamics produce smooth, anticipatory concern trajectories despite similar escalation timing. These trajectories surface sustained unease prior to escalation, enabling human-in-the-loop monitoring and more informed intervention. Our results suggest that explicit state dynamics can make LLM agents more clinically legible by revealing how long concern has been rising, not just when thresholds are crossed.

ai.tldr: 提出一种轻量级代理架构，通过一阶和二阶动力学整合临床风险编码器，生成连续升级压力信号，使LLM代理在临床环境中更可解释。
ai.motivation: 临床LLM代理常表现出突变的阈值驱动行为，缺乏风险累积的可见性，而真实临床医生关注逐渐上升的担忧。
ai.method: 引入无记忆临床风险编码器，利用一阶和二阶动力学随时间积分，产生连续升级压力信号。
ai.result: 二阶动力学产生平滑、预期的担忧轨迹，在升级前显示持续不安，支持人在回路监控。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解LLM代理在临床决策中的风险累积过程，提升可解释性和安全性。

idea_spark.idea: 将动力学模型与LLM结合，实现更自然的预警机制。
idea_spark.risk: 二阶动力学可能引入额外计算开销，且需验证在真实临床数据中的泛化性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从临床医生逐渐担忧的行为中汲取灵感，设计更人性化的AI监控系统。

en.tldr: Proposes a lightweight agent architecture integrating a memoryless clinical risk encoder over time via first- and second-order dynamics to produce a continuous escalation pressure signal, making LLM agents more clinically legible.
en.motivation: Clinical LLM agents often exhibit abrupt threshold-driven behavior with little visibility into accumulating risk, whereas real clinicians act on gradually rising concern.
en.method: Introduces a memoryless clinical risk encoder integrated over time using first- and second-order dynamics to generate a continuous escalation pressure signal.
en.result: Second-order dynamics produce smooth, anticipatory concern trajectories, surfacing sustained unease prior to escalation and enabling human-in-the-loop monitoring.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand the risk accumulation process in LLM-based clinical agents, improving interpretability and safety.

idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by clinicians' gradual concern behavior to design more human-like AI monitoring systems.

papers.title: Assessing Pancreatic Ductal Adenocarcinoma Vascular Invasion: the PDACVI Benchmark
papers.summary: Surgical resection remains the only potentially curative treatment for pancreatic ductal adenocarcinoma (PDAC), and eligibility depends on accurate assessment of vascular invasion (VI), i.e., tumor extension into adjacent critical vessels. Despite its importance for preoperative staging and surgical planning, computational VI assessment remains underexplored. Two major challenges are the lack of public datasets and the diagnostic ambiguity at the tumor-vessel interface, which leads to substantial inter-rater variability even among expert radiologists. To address these limitations, we introduce the CURVAS-PDACVI Dataset and Challenge, an open benchmark for uncertainty-aware AI in PDAC staging based on a densely annotated dataset with five independent expert annotations per scan. We also propose a multi-metric evaluation framework that extends beyond spatial overlap to include probabilistic calibration and VI assessment. Evaluation of six state-of-the-art methods shows that strong global volumetric overlap does not necessarily translate into reliable performance at clinically critical tumor-vessel interfaces. In particular, methods optimized for binary segmentation perform competitively on average overlap metrics, but often degrade in high-complexity cases with low expert consensus, either collapsing in volume or overextending at uncertain boundaries. In contrast, methods that model inter-rater disagreement produce better calibrated probabilistic maps and show greater robustness in these ambiguous cases. The benchmark highlights the limitations of volumetric accuracy as a proxy for localized surgical utility, motivating uncertainty-aware probabilistic models for preoperative decision-making.

ai.tldr: 提出PDACVI基准，包含密集标注数据集和多指标评估框架，揭示体积重叠不能替代局部手术效用的局限性。
ai.motivation: 胰腺导管腺癌手术切除依赖准确的血管侵犯评估，但缺乏公开数据集且肿瘤-血管界面诊断模糊，导致专家间差异大。
ai.method: 构建CURVAS-PDACVI数据集（每扫描5个独立专家标注），提出包含概率校准和VI评估的多指标框架，评估六种SOTA方法。
ai.result: 强全局体积重叠不保证肿瘤-血管界面可靠性能；二值分割方法在低共识复杂病例中退化，而建模评分者间差异的方法产生更优校准概率图。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解血管侵犯评估的挑战，并指导选择不确定性感知模型用于术前决策。

idea_spark.idea: 结合体积重叠与局部不确定性度量，设计面向手术规划的分割损失函数。
idea_spark.risk: 数据集规模有限，可能限制泛化性；专家标注一致性低时模型训练不稳定。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从临床模糊性出发，将评分者间差异作为监督信号，推动不确定性感知AI发展。

en.tldr: Introduces the PDACVI benchmark with densely annotated dataset and multi-metric evaluation, revealing that volumetric overlap does not substitute for localized surgical utility.
en.motivation: Surgical resection for PDAC depends on accurate vascular invasion assessment, but public datasets are lacking and tumor-vessel interface ambiguity causes high inter-rater variability.
en.method: Constructs CURVAS-PDACVI dataset (5 independent expert annotations per scan) and a multi-metric framework including probabilistic calibration and VI assessment; evaluates six SOTA methods.
en.result: Strong global volumetric overlap does not guarantee reliable performance at tumor-vessel interfaces; binary segmentation methods degrade in low-consensus complex cases, while methods modeling inter-rater disagreement produce better calibrated probabilistic maps.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand challenges in vascular invasion assessment and guides selection of uncertainty-aware models for preoperative decision-making.

idea_spark.idea: Design a segmentation loss combining volumetric overlap with local uncertainty measures tailored for surgical planning.
idea_spark.risk: Limited dataset size may hinder generalization; low expert consensus can cause unstable training.
idea_spark.inspiration: Leverage clinical ambiguity as supervision signal from inter-rater variability to advance uncertainty-aware AI.

papers.title: Action Motifs: Self-Supervised Hierarchical Representation of Human Body Movements
papers.summary: Effective human behavior modeling requires a representation of the human body movement that capitalizes on its compositionality. We propose a hierarchical representation consisting of Action Atoms that capture the atomic joint movements and Action Motifs that are formed by their temporal compositions and encode similar body movements found across different overall human actions. We derive A4Mer, a nested latent Transformer to learn this hierarchical representation from human pose data in a fully self-supervised manner. A4Mer splits a 3D pose sequence into variable-length segments and represents each segment as a single latent token (Action Atoms). Through bottom-up representation learning, temporal patterns composed of these Action Atoms, which capture meaningful temporal spans of reusable, semantic segments of body movements, naturally emerge (Action Motifs). A4Mer achieves this with a unified pretext task of masked token prediction in their respective latent spaces. We also introduce Action Motif Dataset (AMD), a large-scale dataset of multi-view human behavior videos with full SMPL annotations. We introduce a novel use of cameras by mounting them on the feet to achieve their frame-wise annotations despite frequent and heavy body occlusions. Experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of A4Mer for extracting meaningful Action Motifs, which significantly benefit human behavior modeling tasks including action recognition, motion prediction, and motion interpolation.

ai.tldr: 提出一种自监督层次化人体运动表示方法，通过动作原子和动作基序捕捉人体运动的组合性，并构建了大规模多视角人体行为数据集。
ai.motivation: 有效的人体行为建模需要利用人体运动的组合性，现有方法缺乏层次化表示。
ai.method: 设计嵌套潜变量Transformer A4Mer，将3D姿态序列分割为可变长度片段并编码为潜变量令牌（动作原子），通过掩码令牌预测自监督学习，使时间模式自然涌现为动作基序。
ai.result: 在动作识别、运动预测和运动插值任务上验证了A4Mer提取有意义动作基序的有效性。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一种自监督学习人体运动层次化表示的方法，可用于行为理解、运动生成等任务。

idea_spark.idea: 将动作基序视为可复用的运动模块，类似句子中的短语，可启发构建运动语法或运动生成库。
idea_spark.risk: 动作基序的语义可解释性可能不足，且对长序列的片段分割依赖超参数。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用脚部安装相机解决严重遮挡下的全身姿态标注，为野外数据采集提供新思路。

idea_spark.idea: 将动作基序视为可复用的运动模块，类似句子中的短语，可启发构建运动语法或运动生成库。
idea_spark.risk: 动作基序的语义可解释性可能不足，且对长序列的片段分割依赖超参数。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用脚部安装相机解决严重遮挡下的全身姿态标注，为野外数据采集提供新思路。

en.tldr: Proposes a self-supervised hierarchical representation of human body movements using Action Atoms and Action Motifs, and introduces a large-scale multi-view human behavior dataset.
en.motivation: Effective human behavior modeling requires compositional representation of body movements, which existing methods lack.
en.method: Designs a nested latent Transformer A4Mer that segments 3D pose sequences into variable-length tokens (Action Atoms) and learns hierarchical representations via masked token prediction, enabling Action Motifs to emerge naturally.
en.result: Demonstrates effectiveness of A4Mer in extracting meaningful Action Motifs for action recognition, motion prediction, and motion interpolation.
en.help_to_user: Provides a self-supervised method for learning hierarchical human motion representations, useful for behavior understanding and motion generation.

idea_spark.idea: Treating Action Motifs as reusable motion primitives, akin to phrases in language, could inspire a motion grammar or motion generation library.
idea_spark.risk: Semantic interpretability of Action Motifs may be limited, and segment length hyperparameters affect performance.
idea_spark.inspiration: Using foot-mounted cameras for full-body annotation under heavy occlusion offers a novel approach for in-the-wild data collection.

papers.title: Multi-Connectivity for UAVs: A Measurement Study of Integrating Cellular, Aerial Mesh, and LEO Satellite Links
papers.summary: Future uncrewed aerial vehicle (UAV) systems increasingly combine heterogeneous communication technologies, such as low-latency aerial mesh, terrestrial cellular, and satellite links, to improve robustness and coverage. Multipath transport is a natural mechanism for aggregating these links, yet its ability to support real-time UAV services in highly heterogeneous environments remains insufficiently characterized. We present a measurement-driven study based on UAV flight experiments in an integrated network comprising UAV-to-UAV aerial mesh, private cellular, and low Earth orbit (LEO) satellite connectivity. Using Multipath TCP (MPTCP) as a representative lossless, in-order multipath transport framework, we find that aggregation can preserve end-to-end connectivity under severe link outages. However, large round-trip time (RTT) heterogeneity amplifies packet reordering, leading to substantial receiver-side buffering and bursty delivery. In addition, when the available links do not provide sufficient capacity for the offered load, pronounced sender-side buffering emerges. These effects cause real-time streaming to violate delay constraints, including cases where aggregate capacity is sufficient. To interpret these results, we formalize the distinction between connectivity continuity and service continuity and show empirically that maintaining connectivity is necessary but not sufficient for timely real-time delivery in multi-technology UAV networks. The findings motivate multipath designs that explicitly account for delay constraints, rather than optimizing for connectivity alone.

ai.tldr: 通过无人机飞行实验，测量了集成蜂窝、空中网格和低轨卫星链路的多路径传输性能，发现连接连续性不等于服务连续性。
ai.motivation: 未来无人机系统需要结合多种异构通信技术以提高鲁棒性和覆盖范围，但多路径传输在高度异构环境中对实时服务的支持能力尚不明确。
ai.method: 在集成无人机间空中网格、私有蜂窝和低轨卫星链路的网络中，使用多路径TCP（MPTCP）进行飞行实验测量。
ai.result: 聚合链路可维持端到端连接，但RTT差异大导致严重数据包重排序和接收端缓冲；链路容量不足时出现发送端缓冲，实时流违反延迟约束。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解多技术无人机网络中连接连续性与服务连续性的区别，指导多路径传输设计。

idea_spark.idea: 设计显式考虑延迟约束的多路径传输协议，而非仅优化连接性。
idea_spark.risk: 协议复杂度增加可能影响部署效率。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从测量结果出发，探索基于延迟感知的调度算法或跨层优化方案。

en.tldr: A measurement study of integrating cellular, aerial mesh, and LEO satellite links for UAVs reveals that connectivity continuity does not guarantee service continuity for real-time streaming.
en.motivation: Future UAV systems require heterogeneous communication technologies for robustness and coverage, but multipath transport's support for real-time services in highly heterogeneous environments is insufficiently characterized.
en.method: Flight experiments using Multipath TCP (MPTCP) in an integrated network of UAV-to-UAV aerial mesh, private cellular, and LEO satellite links.
en.result: Aggregation preserves connectivity under link outages, but large RTT heterogeneity causes packet reordering and receiver buffering; insufficient capacity leads to sender buffering, violating real-time delay constraints.
en.help_to_user: Clarifies the distinction between connectivity continuity and service continuity, guiding multipath transport design for multi-technology UAV networks.

idea_spark.idea: Design multipath transport protocols that explicitly account for delay constraints rather than optimizing for connectivity alone.
idea_spark.risk: Increased protocol complexity may hinder deployment efficiency.
idea_spark.inspiration: Explore delay-aware scheduling algorithms or cross-layer optimizations based on measurement insights.

papers.title: MCPHunt: An Evaluation Framework for Cross-Boundary Data Propagation in Multi-Server MCP Agents
papers.summary: Multi-server MCP agents create an information-flow control problem: faithful tool composition can turn individually benign read/write permissions into cross-boundary credential propagation -- a structural side effect of workflow topology, not necessarily malicious model behavior. We present MCPHunt, to our knowledge the first controlled benchmark that isolates non-adversarial, verbatim credential propagation across multi-server MCP trust boundaries, with three methodological contributions: (1) canary-based taint tracking that reduces propagation detection to objective string matching; (2) an environment-controlled coverage design with risky, benign, and hard-negative conditions that validates pipeline soundness and controls for credential-format confounds; (3) CRS stratification that disentangles task-mandated propagation (faithful execution of verbatim-transfer instructions) from policy-violating propagation (credentials included despite the option to redact). Across 3,615 main-benchmark traces from 5 models spanning 147 tasks and 9 mechanism families, policy-violating propagation rates reach 11.5--41.3% across all models. This propagation is pathway-specific (25x cross-mechanism range) and concentrated in browser-mediated data flows; hard-negative controls provide evidence that production-format credentials are not necessary -- prompt-directed cross-boundary data flow is sufficient. A prompt-mitigation study across 3 models reduces policy-violating propagation by up to 97% while preserving 80.5% utility, but effectiveness varies with instruction-following capability -- suggesting that prompt-level defenses alone may not suffice. Code, traces, and labeling pipeline are released under MIT and CC BY 4.0.

ai.tldr: 提出MCPHunt基准，评估多服务器MCP代理中跨信任边界的非恶意凭证传播，发现传播率高达11.5-41.3%，提示级防御效果有限。
ai.motivation: 多服务器MCP代理中，工具组合可能无意中导致凭证跨边界传播，现有研究缺乏对此非恶意传播的系统评估。
ai.method: 设计金丝雀污点追踪、环境控制覆盖设计和CRS分层方法，在3615条轨迹上评估5个模型。
ai.result: 策略违规传播率11.5-41.3%，路径特异性强，浏览器中介数据流集中；提示缓解可降低97%传播但保留80.5%效用。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解MCP代理中凭证传播的风险，并提供评估和缓解方法。

idea_spark.idea: 结合静态分析与运行时监控，自动检测并阻断跨边界凭证传播。
idea_spark.risk: 提示级防御可能被绕过，需结合架构级安全机制。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从软件工程的数据流分析借鉴，设计更鲁棒的代理安全协议。

en.tldr: Proposes MCPHunt benchmark to evaluate non-malicious credential propagation across trust boundaries in multi-server MCP agents, finding propagation rates of 11.5-41.3% and limited effectiveness of prompt-level defenses.
en.motivation: In multi-server MCP agents, tool composition can inadvertently cause cross-boundary credential propagation, and existing work lacks systematic evaluation of this non-malicious propagation.
en.method: Designs canary-based taint tracking, environment-controlled coverage design, and CRS stratification, evaluating 5 models on 3,615 traces.

idea_spark.idea: Combine static analysis with runtime monitoring to automatically detect and block cross-boundary credential propagation.
idea_spark.risk: Prompt-level defenses may be bypassed, requiring architectural security mechanisms.
idea_spark.inspiration: Borrow from data flow analysis in software engineering to design more robust agent security protocols.

papers.title: How Code Representation Shapes False-Positive Dynamics in Cross-Language LLM Vulnerability Detection
papers.summary: How code representation format shapes false positive behaviour in cross-language LLM vulnerability detection remains poorly understood. We systematically vary training intensity and code representation format, comparing raw source text with pruned Abstract Syntax Trees at both training time and inference time, across two 8B-parameter LLMs (Qwen3-8B and Llama 3.1-8B-Instruct) fine-tuned on C/C++ data from the NIST Juliet Test Suite (v1.3) and evaluated on Java (OWASP Benchmark v1.2) and Python (BenchmarkPython v0.1).   Cross-language FPR reflects the joint effect of training-time and inference-time representation, not either alone. Text fine-tuning drives FPR upward monotonically (Qwen3-8B: 0.763 zero-shot, 0.866 pilot, 1.000 full-scale) while F1 remains stable (0.637-0.688), masking the collapse. We argue surface-cue memorisation is the primary mechanism: text fine-tuning encodes C/C++-specific API names and syntactic idioms as vulnerability triggers that fire indiscriminately on target-language code. A cross-representation probe, applying text-trained weights to AST-encoded input without retraining, isolates this: Qwen3-8B FPR drops from 0.866 to 0.583, and 37.2% of false positives revert to true negatives under AST input alone. Direct AST fine-tuning does not preserve the benefit (FPR at least 0.970), as flat linearisation introduces structural surface cues of its own. The pattern replicates across both model families. On BenchmarkPython the AST probe yields FPR=0.554, within 2.9 percentage points of the Java result, despite maximal surface-syntax differences, substantially weakening a domain-shift explanation. These findings motivate a pre-deployment consistency gate, running alerts through both text and AST paths, as a retraining-free filter for false-positive-sensitive settings, at the cost of reduced recall.

ai.tldr: 研究了代码表示格式（原始文本 vs 剪枝抽象语法树）如何影响跨语言大模型漏洞检测中的误报动态，发现文本微调导致误报率单调上升，而AST探针可大幅降低误报。
ai.motivation: 跨语言LLM漏洞检测中，代码表示格式对误报行为的影响尚不明确，需要系统研究以提升检测可靠性。
ai.method: 在C/C++数据上微调两个8B参数LLM，比较原始文本与剪枝AST在训练和推理时的组合效果，并在Java和Python上评估跨语言误报率。
ai.result: 文本微调使误报率单调上升（Qwen3-8B从0.763升至1.000），F1稳定；跨表示探针（文本权重+AST输入）将误报率降至0.583，37.2%误报转为真阴性；直接AST微调无法保持优势。
ai.help_to_user: 揭示了代码表示格式对误报的关键影响，提出了一种无需重新训练的预部署一致性门控方法，可有效过滤误报。

idea_spark.idea: 设计一个双路径一致性过滤器，在部署前同时运行文本和AST推理，仅当两者均告警时才触发警报。
idea_spark.risk: 可能降低召回率，且AST线性化可能引入新的表面线索，需进一步优化表示。
idea_spark.inspiration: 表面线索记忆是跨语言误报的主要机制，提示未来工作应关注表示解耦或对抗训练来缓解该问题。

en.tldr: Investigates how code representation format (raw text vs pruned AST) shapes false-positive dynamics in cross-language LLM vulnerability detection, finding that text fine-tuning monotonically increases FPR while a cross-representation probe drastically reduces it.
en.motivation: The impact of code representation format on false-positive behavior in cross-language LLM vulnerability detection is poorly understood, necessitating systematic study to improve detection reliability.
en.method: Fine-tuned two 8B-parameter LLMs on C/C++ data, comparing raw text and pruned AST at training and inference time, and evaluated cross-language FPR on Java and Python.
en.result: Text fine-tuning monotonically increases FPR (Qwen3-8B: 0.763 to 1.000) while F1 remains stable; cross-representation probe (text weights + AST input) drops FPR to 0.583, reverting 37.2% false positives to true negatives; direct AST fine-tuning fails to preserve the benefit.
en.help_to_user: Reveals the critical role of code representation in false positives and proposes a retraining-free consistency gate for pre-deployment filtering.

idea_spark.idea: Design a dual-path consistency filter that runs both text and AST inference at deployment time and triggers an alert only when both paths agree.
idea_spark.risk: May reduce recall, and AST linearization could introduce new surface cues, requiring further representation optimization.
idea_spark.inspiration: Surface-cue memorization is the primary mechanism for cross-language false positives, suggesting future work should focus on representation disentanglement or adversarial training to mitigate this issue.

papers.title: AnTi-MiCS: Analytical Framework for Bounding Time in Embedded Mixed-Criticality Systems
papers.summary: In Mixed-Criticality (MC) systems, although the high Worst-Case Execution Time (WCET) serves as a conservative upper bound representing the task's maximum execution time under all conditions, obtaining a low WCET is essential for representing realistic executions and improving utilization and Quality-of-Service (QoS). Nevertheless, determining appropriate low WCET(s) for lower-criticality (LO) modes poses a significant challenge. Opting for a very low value of this WCET enhances processor utilization by scheduling more tasks in LO mode. Conversely, employing a larger WCET ensures fewer mode switches, thereby enhancing QoS, albeit at the cost of processor utilization. This paper proposes an analytical approach, AnTi-MiCS, to determine the appropriate low WCET through design-time analysis of task executions. In some cases, a single low WCET may not be adequate to capture large variations in the execution time distribution, for example, in scenarios like bimodal distributions. Therefore, we further propose a scalable approach, MulTi-MiCS, to compute multiple appropriate low WCETs. This approach exploits the temporal correlation between subsequent inputs presented to the application. Experimental results, conducted on a real platform with embedded real-time benchmarks, demonstrate the efficacy of our proposed scheme, in which QoS is improved by 30.27% on average while reducing utilization waste by 35.89%, compared to existing approaches. Besides, MulTi-MiCS improves QoS by 6.41% compared to AnTi-MiCS while reducing utilization waste by 8.23%.

ai.tldr: 提出AnTi-MiCS和MulTi-MiCS两种分析方法，通过设计时分析确定混合关键性系统中低关键性模式下的低WCET，以平衡处理器利用率和服务质量。
ai.motivation: 混合关键性系统中，低WCET的选择直接影响处理器利用率和QoS，现有方法难以在两者间取得良好折中。
ai.method: AnTi-MiCS通过设计时任务执行分析确定单一低WCET；MulTi-MiCS利用后续输入的时间相关性计算多个低WCET，以应对执行时间分布的大变化（如双峰分布）。
ai.result: 在真实嵌入式基准平台上，AnTi-MiCS相比现有方法平均提升QoS 30.27%，降低利用率浪费35.89%；MulTi-MiCS进一步比AnTi-MiCS提升QoS 6.41%，降低利用率浪费8.23%。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助嵌入式系统设计者在混合关键性场景下合理选择低WCET，优化系统性能和资源使用。

idea_spark.idea: 利用输入的时间相关性动态调整WCET，可进一步扩展到在线自适应调度策略。
idea_spark.risk: 多WCET方案可能增加运行时开销，需评估其对实时性的影响。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从执行时间分布的多模态特性出发，启发设计更灵活的资源管理机制。

en.tldr: Proposes AnTi-MiCS and MulTi-MiCS analytical frameworks to determine appropriate low WCETs for lower-criticality modes in mixed-criticality systems, balancing processor utilization and QoS.
en.motivation: Choosing a low WCET in mixed-criticality systems critically affects processor utilization and QoS, and existing approaches struggle to achieve a good trade-off.
en.method: AnTi-MiCS determines a single low WCET via design-time analysis of task executions; MulTi-MiCS computes multiple low WCETs by exploiting temporal correlation between subsequent inputs to handle large variations (e.g., bimodal distributions).
en.result: On a real embedded benchmark platform, AnTi-MiCS improves QoS by 30.27% and reduces utilization waste by 35.89% on average over existing approaches; MulTi-MiCS further improves QoS by 6.41% and reduces utilization waste by 8.23% compared to AnTi-MiCS.
en.help_to_user: Helps embedded system designers select appropriate low WCETs in mixed-criticality scenarios to optimize system performance and resource usage.

idea_spark.idea: Leveraging temporal correlation of inputs to dynamically adjust WCET could be extended to online adaptive scheduling strategies.
idea_spark.risk: Multiple WCETs may increase runtime overhead; impact on real-time guarantees needs evaluation.
idea_spark.inspiration: The multi-modal nature of execution time distributions inspires more flexible resource management mechanisms.

papers.title: Automated Detection of Mutual Gaze and Joint Attention in Dual-Camera Settings via Dual-Stream Transformers
papers.summary: Analyzing mutual gaze (MG) and joint attention (JA) is critical in developmental psychology but traditionally relies on labor-intensive manual coding. Automating this process in multi-camera laboratory settings is computationally challenging due to complex cross-camera relational dynamics. In this paper, we propose a highly efficient dual-stream Transformer architecture for detecting MG and JA from synchronized dual-camera recordings. Our approach leverages frozen gaze-aware backbones (GazeLLE) to extract rich visual priors, combined with a custom token fusion mechanism to map the spatial and semantic relationships between interacting dyads. Evaluated on an ecologically valid dataset of caregiver-infant interactions, our model exhibits good performance, significantly outperforming both a convolutional baseline and a state-of-the-art multimodal Large Language Model (LLM). By open-sourcing our model and pre-trained weights, we provide behavioral scientists with a scalable tool that can be fine-tuned to diverse laboratory environments, effectively bridging the gap between computational modeling and applied interaction research.

ai.tldr: 提出一种双流Transformer架构，利用冻结的凝视感知骨干网络和令牌融合机制，从同步双摄像头视频中自动检测相互凝视和共同注意，在照顾者-婴儿交互数据集上表现优异。
ai.motivation: 发展心理学中相互凝视和共同注意的分析传统依赖耗时的人工编码，自动化处理在多摄像头实验室环境中面临跨摄像头关系动态的挑战。
ai.method: 采用双流Transformer架构，使用冻结的GazeLLE凝视感知骨干提取视觉先验，结合自定义令牌融合机制映射交互双方的空间和语义关系。
ai.result: 在生态有效的照顾者-婴儿交互数据集上，模型性能显著优于卷积基线和多模态大语言模型。
ai.help_to_user: 为行为科学家提供可扩展的自动化工具，支持微调以适应不同实验室环境，减少人工编码负担。

idea_spark.idea: 将凝视感知骨干与跨摄像头令牌融合结合，实现高效的关系建模，无需复杂的手工特征设计。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖同步双摄像头设置，可能限制在非受控环境中的应用；冻结骨干可能无法适应极端视角变化。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从发展心理学需求出发，利用预训练视觉模型和轻量级融合模块，平衡计算效率与检测精度。

zh.motivation: 发展心理学中相互凝视和共同注意的分析传统依赖耗时的人工编码，自动化处理在多摄像头实验室环境中面临跨摄像头关系动态的挑战。
zh.method: 采用双流Transformer架构，使用冻结的GazeLLE凝视感知骨干提取视觉先验，结合自定义令牌融合机制映射交互双方的空间和语义关系。
zh.result: 在生态有效的照顾者-婴儿交互数据集上，模型性能显著优于卷积基线和多模态大语言模型。
zh.help_to_user: 为行为科学家提供可扩展的自动化工具，支持微调以适应不同实验室环境，减少人工编码负担。

idea_spark.idea: 将凝视感知骨干与跨摄像头令牌融合结合，实现高效的关系建模，无需复杂的手工特征设计。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖同步双摄像头设置，可能限制在非受控环境中的应用；冻结骨干可能无法适应极端视角变化。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从发展心理学需求出发，利用预训练视觉模型和轻量级融合模块，平衡计算效率与检测精度。

en.tldr: Proposes a dual-stream Transformer architecture using frozen gaze-aware backbones and a token fusion mechanism to automatically detect mutual gaze and joint attention from synchronized dual-camera videos, achieving strong performance on caregiver-infant interaction data.
en.motivation: Analyzing mutual gaze and joint attention in developmental psychology traditionally relies on labor-intensive manual coding, and automation in multi-camera lab settings is challenging due to complex cross-camera relational dynamics.
en.method: Employs a dual-stream Transformer with frozen GazeLLE gaze-aware backbones for visual priors and a custom token fusion mechanism to map spatial and semantic relationships between interacting dyads.
en.result: On an ecologically valid caregiver-infant interaction dataset, the model significantly outperforms a convolutional baseline and a state-of-the-art multimodal LLM.
en.help_to_user: Provides behavioral scientists with a scalable, fine-tunable tool for automated analysis, reducing manual coding effort in diverse lab environments.

idea_spark.idea: Combines gaze-aware backbones with cross-camera token fusion for efficient relational modeling without complex handcrafted features.
idea_spark.risk: Relies on synchronized dual-camera setups, which may limit applicability in uncontrolled environments; frozen backbones may struggle with extreme viewpoint changes.
idea_spark.inspiration: Driven by developmental psychology needs, leverages pretrained vision models and lightweight fusion modules to balance computational efficiency and detection accuracy.

papers.title: ResiHMR: Residual-Limb Aware Single-Image 3D Human Mesh Recovery for Individuals with Limb Loss
papers.summary: Single-image human mesh recovery provides a compact 3D, person-centric representation that supports analysis, animation, AR and VR, rehabilitation, and human-computer interaction. However, prevailing systems impose an intact-limb prior and degrade on people with limb loss, because fixed-topology models cannot represent residual limbs. In this work, we present ResiHMR, a residual-limb aware framework for single-image 3D human modeling. ResiHMR adopts residual-limb keypoints and introduces two components: (i) a topology-adaptive Residual Anchor-Factor Optimization module that constrains estimation to the observed kinematic subgraph of anatomically valid structures, and (ii) a geometry-based Residual-Limb Reconstruction module that estimates residual-limb boundaries and convex limb-termination geometry. These components introduce topology-aware optimization and explicit termination geometry as tools for human mesh recovery under non-standard limb anatomy. Unlike joint-removal methods in a fixed topology, ResiHMR explicitly reconstructs residual-limb surfaces and aligns optimization with limb-loss topology, which better matches prosthetic biomechanics and real-world use. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first single-image HMR system that explicitly reconstructs residual-limb surfaces and performs topology-adaptive optimization for individuals with limb loss. On a curated dataset of real-world images with limb loss, ResiHMR improves reconstruction quality under both SMPLify-X and HSMR backbones, reducing intact-joint 2D MPJPE from 41.32 to 37.40 with SMPLify-X and residual-limb 2D MPJPE from 73.61 to 23.19 with HSMR.

ai.tldr: 提出ResiHMR框架，首次实现单张图像中截肢者残肢的三维网格重建，通过拓扑自适应优化和显式残肢几何重建提升重建质量。
ai.motivation: 现有单图像人体网格恢复方法假设肢体完整，固定拓扑模型无法处理截肢者的残肢，导致重建质量下降。
ai.method: 采用残肢关键点，引入拓扑自适应的残基锚点因子优化模块和基于几何的残肢重建模块，分别约束估计到有效解剖子图并重建残肢边界与凸终止几何。
ai.result: 在真实截肢图像数据集上，基于SMPLify-X和HSMR骨干，分别将完整关节2D MPJPE从41.32降至37.40，残肢2D MPJPE从73.61降至23.19。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解如何针对非标准肢体解剖结构进行三维人体建模，适用于康复、假肢设计和人机交互。

idea_spark.idea: 结合残肢重建与假肢数字孪生，实现个性化假肢适配与运动仿真。
idea_spark.risk: 真实截肢图像数据集有限，可能影响模型泛化性；残肢关键点标注依赖专家知识。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从假肢生物力学需求出发，突破固定拓扑限制，启发面向包容性人体建模的研究方向。

en.tldr: Proposes ResiHMR, the first single-image human mesh recovery framework that explicitly reconstructs residual-limb surfaces for individuals with limb loss via topology-adaptive optimization and explicit termination geometry.
en.motivation: Existing single-image human mesh recovery methods assume intact limbs and degrade on people with limb loss due to fixed-topology models that cannot represent residual limbs.
en.method: Adopts residual-limb keypoints and introduces a topology-adaptive Residual Anchor-Factor Optimization module and a geometry-based Residual-Limb Reconstruction module to constrain estimation to valid kinematic subgraphs and reconstruct residual-limb boundaries and convex termination geometry.

en.help_to_user: Helps understand how to perform 3D human modeling for non-standard limb anatomy, applicable to rehabilitation, prosthetic design, and human-computer interaction.

idea_spark.idea: Combine residual-limb reconstruction with prosthetic digital twins for personalized prosthetic fitting and motion simulation.
idea_spark.risk: Limited real-world limb-loss datasets may affect generalization; residual-limb keypoint annotation requires expert knowledge.
idea_spark.inspiration: Driven by prosthetic biomechanics needs, breaking fixed-topology constraints inspires inclusive human modeling research.

papers.title: Toward Personalized Digital Twins for Cognitive Decline Assessment: A Multimodal, Uncertainty-Aware Framework
papers.summary: Cognitive decline is highly heterogeneous across individuals, which complicates prognosis, trial design, and treatment planning. We present the Personalized Cognitive Decline Assessment Digital Twin (PCD-DT), a multimodal and uncertainty-aware framework for modeling patient-specific disease trajectories from sparse, noisy, and irregular longitudinal data. The framework combines three methodological components: (1) latent state-space models for individualized temporal dynamics, (2) multimodal fusion for clinical, biomarker, and imaging features, and (3) uncertainty-aware validation and adaptive updating for robust digital twin operation. We also outline how conditional generative models can support data augmentation and stress testing for underrepresented progression patterns. As a preliminary feasibility study, we analyze longitudinal TADPOLE trajectories and show clear separation between cognitively normal and Alzheimer's disease cohorts in ADAS13, ventricle volume, and hippocampal volume over five years. We further conduct a multimodal next-visit prediction ablation using an LSTM sequence model on 3{,}003 visit-pair sequences derived from TADPOLE, where the combined cognitive plus MRI configuration achieves the lowest standardized RMSE for both ADAS13 (0.4419) and ventricle volume (0.5842), outperforming a Last Observation Carried Forward baseline. A Bayesian tensor modeling component for high-dimensional imaging fusion is also discussed. These results support the feasibility of the proposed architecture while also highlighting the need for stronger uncertainty calibration and longer-horizon predictive evaluation. The PCD-DT framework provides a principled starting point for personalized in silico modeling in neurodegenerative disease. This work positions PCD-DT as a foundational step toward clinically deployable, uncertainty-aware digital twin systems.

ai.tldr: 提出个性化认知衰退数字孪生框架PCD-DT，融合多模态数据与不确定性量化，初步验证其在阿尔茨海默病轨迹建模中的可行性。
ai.motivation: 认知衰退具有高度个体异质性，现有模型难以处理稀疏、不规则、带噪声的纵向数据，缺乏个性化与不确定性感知能力。
ai.method: 结合潜在状态空间模型、多模态融合（临床、生物标志物、影像）以及不确定性感知验证与自适应更新，并利用条件生成模型进行数据增强。
ai.result: 在TADPOLE数据上，认知+MRI配置的LSTM模型在ADAS13和脑室体积预测中取得最低标准化RMSE（0.4419和0.5842），优于基线方法。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助研究人员理解如何构建面向认知衰退的个性化数字孪生系统，并指导未来在不确定性校准和长期预测方面的改进方向。

idea_spark.idea: 利用条件生成模型合成罕见进展模式的合成数据，增强数字孪生对极端病例的鲁棒性。
idea_spark.risk: 生成数据可能引入偏差，需严格验证其与真实分布的匹配度。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将不确定性量化与自适应更新机制结合，可启发开发临床可部署的实时决策支持系统。

en.tldr: Proposes PCD-DT, a multimodal, uncertainty-aware digital twin framework for personalized cognitive decline assessment, with preliminary feasibility on Alzheimer's disease data.
en.motivation: Cognitive decline is highly heterogeneous; existing models struggle with sparse, noisy, irregular longitudinal data and lack personalization and uncertainty awareness.
en.method: Combines latent state-space models, multimodal fusion (clinical, biomarker, imaging), uncertainty-aware validation and adaptive updating, plus conditional generative models for data augmentation.
en.result: On TADPOLE, the cognitive+MRI LSTM configuration achieves the lowest standardized RMSE for ADAS13 (0.4419) and ventricle volume (0.5842), outperforming the LOCF baseline.
en.help_to_user: Guides researchers in building personalized digital twins for cognitive decline and highlights future directions for uncertainty calibration and long-horizon prediction.

idea_spark.idea: Use conditional generative models to synthesize data for rare progression patterns, enhancing digital twin robustness to extreme cases.
idea_spark.risk: Generated data may introduce bias; rigorous validation against real distributions is required.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combining uncertainty quantification with adaptive updating can inspire clinically deployable real-time decision support systems.

papers.title: Ease of dependency distance minimization in star-like structures
papers.summary: The syntactic structure of a sentence can be represented as a tree where edges indicate syntactic dependencies between words. When that structure is a star, it has been demonstrated that the head should be placed in the middle of the linear arrangement according to the principle of syntactic dependency distance minimization. However, hubs of stars tend to be put at one of the ends, against that principle. Here we address two questions: (1) How difficult is it to minimize dependency distance? (2) Why anti dependency distance minimization effects have been found in star structures but not in path structures? The ease of optimization is determined by the shape of the optimization landscape. It was demonstrated that the landscape of star structures is quasiconvex (Ferrer-i-Cancho 2015, Language Dynamics and Change). As for (1), here we show that it is indeed convex (a particular case of quasiconvexity) both for star trees and quasistar trees and thus the distance-based optimization problem is simpler than previously believed. As for (2), we argue that (a) competing principles, rather than the difficulty of optimization, must be the actual reason for anti-dependency distance minimization effects and that (b) dependency distance minimization on star-like structures is less rewarding compared to other structures.

ai.tldr: 本文证明星型句法树中依赖距离最小化的优化景观是凸的（比之前认为的拟凸更简单），并指出反依赖距离最小化效应源于竞争原则而非优化难度。
ai.motivation: 解释为何星型结构中存在反依赖距离最小化效应，而路径结构中不存在，并评估依赖距离最小化的难易程度。
ai.method: 通过数学证明星型树和拟星型树的优化景观是凸的，并对比不同结构下的优化收益。
ai.result: 星型结构的优化景观是凸的，问题比预期简单；反效应由竞争原则导致，且星型结构的最小化收益较低。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解句法依赖距离最小化在不同树结构中的优化特性及其局限性。

idea_spark.idea: 将竞争原则（如中心性偏好）建模为多目标优化问题，量化其对依赖距离最小化的影响。
idea_spark.risk: 竞争原则的具体形式可能因语言而异，需更多实证数据验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发在自然语言处理中设计更符合语言规律的句法解析算法，平衡最小化与中心性偏好。

zh.tldr: 本文证明星型句法树中依赖距离最小化的优化景观是凸的（比之前认为的拟凸更简单），并指出反依赖距离最小化效应源于竞争原则而非优化难度。

zh.result: 星型结构的优化景观是凸的，问题比预期简单；反效应由竞争原则导致，且星型结构的最小化收益较低。

idea_spark.risk: 竞争原则的具体形式可能因语言而异，需更多实证数据验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发在自然语言处理中设计更符合语言规律的句法解析算法，平衡最小化与中心性偏好。

en.tldr: This paper proves that the optimization landscape for dependency distance minimization in star-like syntactic trees is convex (simpler than previously thought quasiconvex), and argues that anti-minimization effects arise from competing principles rather than optimization difficulty.
en.motivation: To explain why anti-dependency distance minimization effects occur in star structures but not in path structures, and to assess the ease of minimizing dependency distance.
en.method: Mathematical proof that the optimization landscape of star trees and quasistar trees is convex, and comparison of optimization rewards across different structures.
en.result: The landscape is convex, making the problem simpler than expected; anti-effects are due to competing principles, and star structures yield lower minimization rewards.
en.help_to_user: Provides insight into the optimization properties and limitations of dependency distance minimization across different syntactic tree structures.

idea_spark.idea: Model competing principles (e.g., centrality preference) as a multi-objective optimization problem to quantify their impact on dependency distance minimization.
idea_spark.risk: The specific form of competing principles may vary across languages, requiring more empirical validation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires designing syntax parsing algorithms in NLP that balance minimization with centrality preferences, better reflecting linguistic patterns.

papers.title: LRS-VoxMM: A benchmark for in-the-wild audio-visual speech recognition
papers.summary: We introduce LRS-VoxMM, an in-the-wild benchmark for audio-visual speech recognition (AVSR). The benchmark is derived from VoxMM, a dataset of diverse real-world spoken conversations with human-annotated transcriptions. We select AVSR-suitable samples and preprocess them in an LRS-style format for direct use in existing AVSR pipelines. Compared with commonly used benchmarks, LRS-VoxMM covers a more diverse range of scenarios and acoustic conditions. We also release distorted evaluation sets with additive noise, reverberation, and bandwidth limitation to support evaluation under severe acoustic degradation. Experimental results show that LRS-VoxMM is considerably harder than LRS3 and that the contribution of visual information becomes more evident as the audio signal degrades. LRS-VoxMM supports more realistic AVSR benchmarking and encourages further research on the role of visual information in challenging real-world conditions.

ai.tldr: 提出了一个基于VoxMM的野外音视频语音识别基准LRS-VoxMM，包含多样化场景和退化评估集，实验表明其难度高于LRS3，且视觉信息在音频退化时贡献更明显。
ai.motivation: 现有基准场景单一、声学条件受限，缺乏对真实世界复杂环境的充分覆盖。
ai.method: 从VoxMM对话数据中筛选适合AVSR的样本，按LRS格式预处理，并构建含加性噪声、混响和带宽限制的退化评估集。
ai.result: LRS-VoxMM比LRS3更难，音频退化时视觉信息的作用更加突出。
ai.help_to_user: 提供更真实的AVSR评测平台，帮助研究者评估模型在恶劣声学条件下的表现。

idea_spark.idea: 利用退化评估集系统研究视觉模态在不同噪声类型和强度下的补偿机制。
idea_spark.risk: 退化条件可能过于极端，导致模型性能过低而难以区分方法优劣。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受视觉信息在音频退化时贡献增强的启发，可设计自适应融合策略，根据音频质量动态调整视觉权重。

zh.help_to_user: 提供更真实的AVSR评测平台，帮助研究者评估模型在恶劣声学条件下的表现。

idea_spark.idea: 利用退化评估集系统研究视觉模态在不同噪声类型和强度下的补偿机制。
idea_spark.risk: 退化条件可能过于极端，导致模型性能过低而难以区分方法优劣。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受视觉信息在音频退化时贡献增强的启发，可设计自适应融合策略，根据音频质量动态调整视觉权重。

en.tldr: We introduce LRS-VoxMM, an in-the-wild AVSR benchmark derived from VoxMM, covering diverse scenarios and distorted evaluation sets. Experiments show it is harder than LRS3 and visual information becomes more beneficial under audio degradation.
en.motivation: Existing benchmarks lack diversity in real-world scenarios and acoustic conditions.
en.method: Select AVSR-suitable samples from VoxMM, preprocess in LRS-style format, and create distorted sets with additive noise, reverberation, and bandwidth limitation.
en.result: LRS-VoxMM is considerably harder than LRS3; visual contribution increases as audio degrades.
en.help_to_user: Provides a more realistic AVSR benchmark for evaluating models under challenging acoustic conditions.

idea_spark.idea: Systematically study the compensation mechanism of visual modality across different noise types and levels using the distorted sets.
idea_spark.risk: Extreme degradation may cause floor performance, making it hard to differentiate methods.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the increased visual contribution under audio degradation, design adaptive fusion strategies that dynamically adjust visual weight based on audio quality.

papers.title: Echo-α: Large Agentic Multimodal Reasoning Model for Ultrasound Interpretation
papers.summary: Ultrasound interpretation requires both precise lesion localization and holistic clinical reasoning, yet existing methods typically excel at only one of these capabilities: specialized detectors offer strong localization but limited reasoning, whereas multimodal large language models (MLLMs) provide flexible reasoning but weak grounding in specialized medical domains. We present Echo-α, an agentic multimodal reasoning model for ultrasound interpretation that unifies these strengths within an invoke-and-reason framework. Echo-α is trained to coordinate organ-specific detector outputs, integrate them with global visual context, and convert the resulting evidence into grounded diagnostic decisions beyond detector-only inference. This behavior is established through a nine-task supervised curriculum and then refined by sequential reinforcement learning under different reward trade-offs, yielding Echo-α-Grounding for lesion anchoring and Echo-α-Diagnosis for final diagnosis. On multi-center renal and breast ultrasound benchmarks, Echo-α outperforms competitive baselines on both grounding and diagnosis. In particular, on cross-center test sets, Echo-α-Grounding attains 56.73%/43.78% F1@0.5 and Echo- α-Diagnosis reaches 74.90%/49.20% overall accuracy on renal/breast ultrasound. These results suggest that agentic multimodal reasoning can turn specialized detectors into verifiable clinical evidence, offering a practical route toward ultrasound AI systems that are more accurate, interpretable, and transferable. The repository is at https://github.com/MiliLab/Echo-Alpha.

ai.tldr: 提出Echo-α，一个基于智能体多模态推理的超声解读模型，统一了病灶定位与临床推理能力。
ai.motivation: 现有方法要么定位强但推理弱，要么推理灵活但医学领域定位差，缺乏统一框架。
ai.method: 采用调用-推理框架，协调器官专用检测器输出与全局视觉上下文，通过九任务监督课程和序列强化学习训练。
ai.result: 在多中心肾脏和乳腺超声基准上，Echo-α在定位和诊断上均优于基线，跨中心测试F1@0.5达56.73%/43.78%，准确率达74.90%/49.20%。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助超声医生获得更准确、可解释且可迁移的AI辅助诊断结果。

idea_spark.idea: 将超声检测器输出作为可验证证据，结合大语言模型推理，实现可解释的临床决策。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖高质量检测器输出，若检测器泛化不足可能影响整体性能。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从“检测器+推理”分离到统一智能体框架，启发其他医学任务中专用模型与通用模型的融合。

en.tldr: Echo-α is an agentic multimodal reasoning model for ultrasound interpretation that unifies lesion localization and clinical reasoning.
en.motivation: Existing methods either excel at localization with limited reasoning or provide flexible reasoning but weak grounding in specialized medical domains.
en.method: It uses an invoke-and-reason framework coordinating organ-specific detector outputs with global visual context, trained via a nine-task supervised curriculum and sequential reinforcement learning.
en.result: On multi-center renal and breast ultrasound benchmarks, Echo-α outperforms baselines in both grounding and diagnosis, achieving 56.73%/43.78% F1@0.5 and 74.90%/49.20% accuracy on cross-center tests.
en.help_to_user: Assists sonographers with more accurate, interpretable, and transferable AI-aided diagnosis.

idea_spark.idea: Leverage ultrasound detector outputs as verifiable evidence combined with LLM reasoning for explainable clinical decisions.
idea_spark.risk: Relies on high-quality detector outputs; poor detector generalization may degrade overall performance.
idea_spark.inspiration: The shift from separate detection and reasoning to a unified agentic framework inspires fusion of specialized and general models in other medical tasks.

papers.title: Knowledge Graph Representations for LLM-Based Policy Compliance Reasoning
papers.summary: The risks posed by AI features are increasing as they are rapidly integrated into software applications. In response, regulations and standards for safe and secure AI have been proposed. In this paper, we present an agentic framework that constructs knowledge graphs (KGs) from AI policy documents and retrieves policy-relevant information to answer questions. We build KGs from three AI risk-related polices under two ontology schemas, and then evaluate five LLMs on 42 policy QA tasks spanning six reasoning types, from entity lookup to cross-policy inference, using both heuristic scoring and an LLM-as-judge. KG augmentation improves scores for all five models, and an open, LLM-discovered schema matches or exceeds the formal ontology.

ai.tldr: 提出一个基于知识图谱的智能体框架，从AI政策文档中构建知识图谱并检索相关信息来回答合规性问题。
ai.motivation: AI功能快速集成到软件中带来风险，需要自动化的政策合规推理方法。
ai.method: 从三个AI风险政策文档构建知识图谱，使用两种本体模式，评估五个大语言模型在42个政策问答任务上的表现。
ai.result: 知识图谱增强提升了所有模型的得分，且大语言模型自动发现的本体模式达到或超过正式本体。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何利用知识图谱和大语言模型进行政策合规性推理。

idea_spark.idea: 探索使用大语言模型自动构建和优化领域特定的知识图谱本体。
idea_spark.risk: 知识图谱构建质量依赖政策文档的完整性和准确性，可能引入偏差。
idea_spark.inspiration: 结合知识图谱的符号推理与大语言模型的语义理解，提升复杂推理任务的可靠性。

en.tldr: Proposes an agentic framework that constructs knowledge graphs from AI policy documents and retrieves policy-relevant information to answer compliance questions.
en.motivation: The rapid integration of AI features into software increases risks, necessitating automated policy compliance reasoning.
en.method: Builds knowledge graphs from three AI risk-related policies under two ontology schemas, evaluates five LLMs on 42 policy QA tasks spanning six reasoning types.
en.result: KG augmentation improves scores for all five models, and an open, LLM-discovered schema matches or exceeds the formal ontology.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how to leverage knowledge graphs and LLMs for policy compliance reasoning.

idea_spark.idea: Explore using LLMs to automatically construct and optimize domain-specific knowledge graph ontologies.
idea_spark.risk: KG construction quality depends on the completeness and accuracy of policy documents, which may introduce bias.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combine symbolic reasoning of knowledge graphs with semantic understanding of LLMs to improve reliability in complex reasoning tasks.

papers.title: MoCapAnything V2: End-to-End Motion Capture for Arbitrary Skeletons
papers.summary: Recent methods for arbitrary-skeleton motion capture from monocular video follow a factorized pipeline, where a Video-to-Pose network predicts joint positions and an analytical inverse-kinematics (IK) stage recovers joint rotations. While effective, this design is inherently limited, since joint positions do not fully determine rotations and leave degrees of freedom such as bone-axis twist ambiguous, and the non-differentiable IK stage prevents the system from adapting to noisy predictions or optimizing for the final animation objective. In this work, we present the first fully end-to-end framework in which both Video-to-Pose and Pose-to-Rotation are learnable and jointly optimized. We observe that the ambiguity in pose-to-rotation mapping arises from missing coordinate system information: the same joint positions can correspond to different rotations under different rest poses and local axis conventions. To resolve this, we introduce a reference pose-rotation pair from the target asset, which, together with the rest pose, not only anchors the mapping but also defines the underlying rotation coordinate system. This formulation turns rotation prediction into a well-constrained conditional problem and enables effective learning. In addition, our model predicts joint positions directly from video without relying on mesh intermediates, improving both robustness and efficiency. Both stages share a skeleton-aware Global-Local Graph-guided Multi-Head Attention (GL-GMHA) module for joint-level local reasoning and global coordination. Experiments on Truebones Zoo and Objaverse show that our method reduces rotation error from ~17 degrees to ~10 degrees, and to 6.54 degrees on unseen skeletons, while achieving ~20x faster inference than mesh-based pipelines. Project page: https://animotionlab.github.io/MoCapAnythingV2/

ai.tldr: 提出首个端到端任意骨架动作捕捉框架，通过引入参考姿态-旋转对解决姿态到旋转映射的歧义，联合优化视频到姿态和姿态到旋转两个阶段。
ai.motivation: 现有方法采用分解流水线（视频→姿态→逆运动学），但关节位置不能完全确定旋转，且逆运动学阶段不可微，无法适应噪声或优化最终动画目标。
ai.method: 引入目标资产的参考姿态-旋转对，与静止姿态一起定义旋转坐标系，将旋转预测转化为有约束的条件问题；两个阶段共享骨架感知的全局-局部图引导多头注意力模块。
ai.result: 在Truebones Zoo和Objaverse上，旋转误差从约17度降至约10度，未见骨架降至6.54度，推理速度比基于网格的流水线快约20倍。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一种无需网格中间件、可直接从单目视频捕捉任意骨架动作的高效端到端方案。

idea_spark.idea: 能否将参考姿态-旋转对替换为可学习的隐式编码，以消除对显式参考数据的依赖？
idea_spark.risk: 隐式编码可能引入新的歧义，需要额外的正则化或自监督信号。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用参考数据锚定映射的思路，类似于风格迁移中利用参考图像控制生成结果。

idea_spark.risk: 隐式编码可能引入新的歧义，需要额外的正则化或自监督信号。

en.tldr: First end-to-end framework for arbitrary-skeleton motion capture, resolving pose-to-rotation ambiguity via a reference pose-rotation pair and jointly optimizing video-to-pose and pose-to-rotation stages.
en.motivation: Existing factorized pipelines (video→pose→IK) are limited because joint positions do not fully determine rotations, and the non-differentiable IK stage prevents adaptation to noise or optimization for animation objectives.
en.method: Introduces a reference pose-rotation pair from the target asset, which together with the rest pose defines the rotation coordinate system, turning rotation prediction into a well-constrained conditional problem; both stages share a skeleton-aware Global-Local Graph-guided Multi-Head Attention module.
en.result: On Truebones Zoo and Objaverse, rotation error reduces from ~17° to ~10°, and to 6.54° on unseen skeletons, with ~20x faster inference than mesh-based pipelines.
en.help_to_user: Provides an efficient end-to-end solution for capturing motion of arbitrary skeletons from monocular video without mesh intermediates.

idea_spark.idea: Could the reference pose-rotation pair be replaced by a learnable latent code to eliminate the need for explicit reference data?
idea_spark.risk: A latent code may introduce new ambiguities, requiring additional regularization or self-supervised signals.
idea_spark.inspiration: The use of reference data to anchor mapping is reminiscent of style transfer where a reference image controls generation.

papers.title: Noise2Map: End-to-End Diffusion Model for Semantic Segmentation and Change Detection
papers.summary: Semantic segmentation and change detection are two fundamental challenges in remote sensing, requiring models to capture either spatial semantics or temporal differences from satellite imagery. Existing deep learning models often struggle with temporal inconsistencies or in capturing fine-grained spatial structures, require extensive pretraining, and offer limited interpretability - especially in real-world remote sensing scenarios. Recent advances in diffusion models show that Gaussian noise can be systematically leveraged to learn expressive data representations through denoising. Motivated by this, we investigate whether the noise process in diffusion models can be effectively utilized for discriminative tasks. We propose Noise2Map, a unified diffusion-based framework that repurposes the denoising process for fast, end-to-end discriminative learning. Unlike prior work that uses diffusion only for generation or feature extraction, Noise2Map directly predicts semantic or change maps using task-specific noise schedules and timestep conditioning, avoiding the costly sampling procedures of traditional diffusion models. The model is pretrained via self-supervised denoising and fine-tuned with supervision, enabling both interpretability and robustness. Our architecture supports both tasks (SS and CD) through a shared backbone and task-specific noise schedulers. Extensive evaluations on the SpaceNet7, WHU, and xView2 buildings damaged by wildfires datasets demonstrate that Noise2Map ranks on average 1st among seven models on semantic segmentation and 1st on change detection by a cross-dataset rank metric (average F1 primary, IoU tie-break). Ablation studies highlight the robustness of our model against different training noise schedulers and timestep control in the diffusion process, as well as the ability of the model to perform multi-task learning.

ai.tldr: 提出Noise2Map，一种基于扩散模型的端到端框架，用于遥感语义分割和变化检测，通过任务特定的噪声调度和时间步条件直接预测结果，避免传统扩散模型的昂贵采样。
ai.motivation: 现有深度学习模型在遥感语义分割和变化检测中面临时间不一致、细粒度结构捕捉困难、需要大量预训练且可解释性有限等问题。扩散模型在去噪过程中学习数据表示的能力尚未被充分用于判别任务。
ai.method: Noise2Map利用扩散模型的去噪过程进行端到端判别学习，通过任务特定的噪声调度和时间步条件直接预测语义或变化图，采用自监督去噪预训练和监督微调，共享骨干网络并支持多任务学习。
ai.result: 在SpaceNet7、WHU和xView2建筑物火灾损伤数据集上，Noise2Map在语义分割和变化检测中均排名第一（平均F1为主，IoU为辅助），消融实验验证了噪声调度和时间步控制的鲁棒性及多任务学习能力。
ai.help_to_user: 该框架提供了一种统一、高效且可解释的遥感图像分析方案，适用于需要同时进行语义分割和变化检测的应用场景，如城市规划和灾害评估。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将Noise2Map扩展到视频遥感数据，利用时间维度上的噪声过程进行动态变化检测，或结合多模态数据（如SAR和光学）提升鲁棒性。
idea_spark.risk: 扩散模型的计算开销可能仍高于传统方法，尤其在实时应用中；任务特定噪声调度的设计需要领域知识，可能影响泛化性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受Noise2Map启发，可研究将扩散模型的去噪过程用于无监督域适应，通过噪声扰动对齐不同数据分布的特征空间。

en.tldr: Proposes Noise2Map, an end-to-end diffusion-based framework for remote sensing semantic segmentation and change detection, directly predicting maps via task-specific noise schedules and timestep conditioning, avoiding costly sampling.
en.motivation: Existing deep learning models for remote sensing semantic segmentation and change detection suffer from temporal inconsistencies, difficulty capturing fine-grained structures, extensive pretraining needs, and limited interpretability. Diffusion models' denoising process for discriminative tasks remains underexplored.
en.method: Noise2Map repurposes the diffusion denoising process for end-to-end discriminative learning, using task-specific noise schedules and timestep conditioning to directly predict semantic or change maps. It employs self-supervised denoising pretraining and supervised fine-tuning with a shared backbone for multi-task learning.
en.result: On SpaceNet7, WHU, and xView2 wildfire building damage datasets, Noise2Map ranks 1st on average for both semantic segmentation and change detection (primary F1, tie-break IoU). Ablation studies confirm robustness to noise schedules and timestep control, and multi-task capability.
en.help_to_user: This framework offers a unified, efficient, and interpretable solution for remote sensing image analysis, suitable for applications requiring simultaneous semantic segmentation and change detection, such as urban planning and disaster assessment.

idea_spark.idea: Explore extending Noise2Map to video remote sensing data for dynamic change detection using temporal noise processes, or integrate multimodal data (e.g., SAR and optical) for enhanced robustness.
idea_spark.risk: Computational overhead of diffusion models may still exceed traditional methods, especially in real-time applications; task-specific noise schedule design requires domain expertise, potentially limiting generalization.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by Noise2Map, investigate using diffusion denoising for unsupervised domain adaptation, aligning feature spaces of different data distributions via noise perturbations.

papers.title: Irreducible Ferrers diagrams in the Etzion-Silberstein conjecture
papers.summary: The Etzion-Silberstein conjecture asserts that, for any finite field $\mathbb F$, Ferrers diagram $\mathcal D$, and integer $d$, there exists a linear matrix code supported on $\mathcal D$ with minimum rank distance $d$ that attains a natural upper bound on its dimension. Codes achieving this bound are called maximum Ferrers diagram (MFD) codes. While the conjecture has been established for several classes of diagrams (including rectangular, monotone, and MDS-constructible cases), it remains open in general. In this paper, we study the reducibility of Ferrers diagrams. For a fixed distance $d$, a diagram $\mathcal D$ is said to reduce to $\mathcal D'$ if an MFD code for $(\mathcal D,d)$ can be obtained from one for $(\mathcal D',d)$ via shortening or inclusion. Diagrams that are not reducible are called irreducible. We show that the conjecture holds for all diagrams if and only if it holds for irreducible ones, thereby reducing the problem to this fundamental class. Our main result provides a complete characterization of irreducible diagrams: for each $d$, they correspond exactly to the integer points of a polytope $\mathfrak{P}_d \subset \mathbb{R}^{2d-3}$. We prove that these polytopes are integral, enabling the use of Ehrhart-theoretic tools to study their structure. Finally, we formulate a new conjecture on puncturing and inclusion of maximum rank distance codes, and show that it arises as a special case of the Etzion-Silberstein conjecture.

ai.tldr: 本文研究Etzion-Silberstein猜想，通过引入不可约Ferrers图的概念，将猜想简化为对这类图的研究，并完全刻画了不可约图的结构。
ai.motivation: Etzion-Silberstein猜想断言任意Ferrers图都存在达到维数上界的线性矩阵码，但一般情况尚未证明。本文旨在通过图的可约性分析简化该猜想。
ai.method: 定义Ferrers图关于距离d的可约性，证明猜想对所有图成立当且仅当对不可约图成立；利用多面体℘_d完全刻画不可约图，并证明该多面体是整的，从而可应用Ehrhart理论。
ai.result: 给出了不可约Ferrers图的完整刻画：它们对应于多面体℘_d⊂ℝ^{2d-3}的整数点；提出了关于最大秩距离码的缩短与包含的新猜想，并证明它是Etzion-Silberstein猜想的特例。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解Etzion-Silberstein猜想的简化途径，以及如何利用组合几何工具研究编码理论中的开放问题。

idea_spark.idea: 利用Ehrhart理论计算不可约图的数量或渐近性质，可能为猜想的完全证明提供新线索。
idea_spark.risk: 多面体℘_d的维数随d线性增长，高维情况下的组合枚举可能变得复杂。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从不可约图出发，尝试构造反例或证明猜想对某些无限图类成立，或许能突破当前瓶颈。

zh.tldr: 本文研究Etzion-Silberstein猜想，通过引入不可约Ferrers图的概念，将猜想简化为对这类图的研究，并完全刻画了不可约图的结构。
zh.motivation: Etzion-Silberstein猜想断言任意Ferrers图都存在达到维数上界的线性矩阵码，但一般情况尚未证明。本文旨在通过图的可约性分析简化该猜想。
zh.method: 定义Ferrers图关于距离d的可约性，证明猜想对所有图成立当且仅当对不可约图成立；利用多面体℘_d完全刻画不可约图，并证明该多面体是整的，从而可应用Ehrhart理论。
zh.result: 给出了不可约Ferrers图的完整刻画：它们对应于多面体℘_d⊂ℝ^{2d-3}的整数点；提出了关于最大秩距离码的缩短与包含的新猜想，并证明它是Etzion-Silberstein猜想的特例。
zh.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解Etzion-Silberstein猜想的简化途径，以及如何利用组合几何工具研究编码理论中的开放问题。

idea_spark.idea: 利用Ehrhart理论计算不可约图的数量或渐近性质，可能为猜想的完全证明提供新线索。
idea_spark.risk: 多面体℘_d的维数随d线性增长，高维情况下的组合枚举可能变得复杂。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从不可约图出发，尝试构造反例或证明猜想对某些无限图类成立，或许能突破当前瓶颈。

en.tldr: This paper studies the Etzion-Silberstein conjecture by introducing irreducible Ferrers diagrams, reducing the conjecture to this class, and completely characterizing irreducible diagrams via polytopes.
en.motivation: The Etzion-Silberstein conjecture asserts the existence of optimal linear matrix codes for any Ferrers diagram, but remains open in general. The authors aim to simplify the problem through diagram reducibility.
en.method: Define reducibility of Ferrers diagrams with respect to distance d; prove the conjecture holds for all diagrams iff it holds for irreducible ones; characterize irreducible diagrams as integer points of a polytope ℘_d ⊂ ℝ^{2d-3} and show it is integral, enabling Ehrhart-theoretic analysis.
en.result: Complete characterization of irreducible diagrams; a new conjecture on puncturing and inclusion of MRD codes is formulated and shown to be a special case of the Etzion-Silberstein conjecture.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand a reduction approach to the Etzion-Silberstein conjecture and how combinatorial geometry tools can be applied to open problems in coding theory.

idea_spark.idea: Use Ehrhart theory to count irreducible diagrams or study their asymptotic behavior, potentially providing new insights for a full proof of the conjecture.
idea_spark.risk: The dimension of polytope ℘_d grows linearly with d, making combinatorial enumeration challenging in high dimensions.
idea_spark.inspiration: Starting from irreducible diagrams, attempt to construct counterexamples or prove the conjecture for infinite families of diagrams, which might break the current bottleneck.

keywords_raw: puncturing and inclusion of mrd codes

papers.title: Graph World Models: Concepts, Taxonomy, and Future Directions
papers.summary: As one of the mainstream models of artificial intelligence, world models allow agents to learn the representation of the environment for efficient prediction and planning. However, classical world models based on flat tensors face several key problems, including noise sensitivity, error accumulation and weak reasoning. To address these limitations, many recent studies use graph structure to decompose the environment into entity nodes and interactive edges, and model virtual environments in a structured space. This paper systematically formalizes and unifies these emerging graph-based works under the concept of graph world models (GWMs). To the best of our knowledge, GWMs have not yet been explicitly defined and surveyed as a unified research paradigm. Furthermore, we propose a taxonomy based on relational inductive biases (RIB), categorizing GWMs by the specific structural priors they inject: (1) spatial RIB for topological abstraction; (2) physical RIB for dynamic simulation; and (3) logical RIB for causal and semantic reasoning. For each model category, we outline the key design principles, summarize representative models, and conduct comparative analyses. We further discuss open challenges and future directions, including dynamic graph adaptation, probabilistic relational dynamics, multi-granularity inductive biases, and the need for dedicated benchmarks and evaluation metrics for GWMs.

ai.tldr: 本文系统定义并统一了图世界模型（GWM）的概念，提出基于关系归纳偏见的分类法，涵盖空间、物理和逻辑三类，并总结了代表性模型、设计原则及未来方向。
ai.motivation: 经典世界模型基于扁平张量，存在噪声敏感、误差累积和推理能力弱等问题，亟需利用图结构进行结构化环境建模。
ai.method: 提出图世界模型（GWM）概念，以关系归纳偏见（RIB）为分类依据，将模型分为空间RIB（拓扑抽象）、物理RIB（动态模拟）和逻辑RIB（因果与语义推理）三类，并分别阐述设计原则与代表模型。
ai.result: 系统梳理了现有基于图的模型，提供了统一的分类框架和比较分析，指出动态图适应、概率关系动力学、多粒度归纳偏见等开放挑战。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助研究者快速理解图世界模型的核心思想、分类体系和代表性工作，为设计更鲁棒、可推理的世界模型提供指导。

idea_spark.idea: 结合概率图模型与图神经网络，构建能处理不确定性和动态关系的概率关系动力学世界模型。
idea_spark.risk: 图结构构建依赖先验知识或额外感知模块，可能引入误差；动态图适应在复杂环境中计算开销较大。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受物理模拟中图网络（如GNS）启发，将物理归纳偏见显式编码到世界模型中，可提升长期预测的准确性。

en.tldr: This paper systematically defines and unifies the concept of graph world models (GWMs), proposes a taxonomy based on relational inductive biases covering spatial, physical, and logical categories, and summarizes representative models, design principles, and future directions.
en.motivation: Classical world models based on flat tensors suffer from noise sensitivity, error accumulation, and weak reasoning, necessitating graph-structured environment modeling.
en.method: Proposes the concept of graph world models (GWMs) and a taxonomy based on relational inductive biases (RIB): spatial RIB for topological abstraction, physical RIB for dynamic simulation, and logical RIB for causal and semantic reasoning, with design principles and representative models for each category.
en.result: Systematically reviews existing graph-based models, provides a unified classification framework and comparative analysis, and identifies open challenges such as dynamic graph adaptation, probabilistic relational dynamics, and multi-granularity inductive biases.
en.help_to_user: Helps researchers quickly understand the core ideas, taxonomy, and representative works of graph world models, providing guidance for designing more robust and reasoning-capable world models.

idea_spark.idea: Combine probabilistic graphical models with graph neural networks to build probabilistic relational dynamics world models that handle uncertainty and dynamic relations.
idea_spark.risk: Graph construction relies on prior knowledge or additional perception modules, which may introduce errors; dynamic graph adaptation incurs high computational cost in complex environments.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by graph networks in physical simulation (e.g., GNS), explicitly encoding physical inductive biases into world models can improve long-term prediction accuracy.

papers.title: Robust Geometric Control of Catenary Robots under Unstructured Force Uncertainties
papers.summary: This paper considers the robust control of a catenary robot composed of two quadrotors connected by an inextensible cable. The system is modeled on \(SE(3)\), with the cable treated as a geometric subsystem induced by the UAV configuration rather than as an independent dynamical element. The catenary shape determines configuration-dependent forces that couple the translational dynamics of the vehicles. We propose a geometric tracking controller for the relative configuration of the agents and analyze its robustness with respect to unstructured uncertainties in the catenary-induced forces. The main theoretical result establishes local input-to-state stability of the closed-loop tracking errors. In particular, we obtain asymptotic convergence in the nominal case and an explicit ultimate bound for the tracking errors under bounded catenary-force perturbations.

ai.tldr: 本文针对由两个四旋翼通过不可伸缩缆绳连接构成的悬链线机器人，提出了一种几何跟踪控制器，并分析了其对缆绳诱导力中非结构化不确定性的鲁棒性。
ai.motivation: 悬链线机器人中缆绳引起的力具有构型依赖性且存在不确定性，需要鲁棒控制方法。
ai.method: 在SE(3)上建模，将缆绳视为由无人机构型诱导的几何子系统，设计几何跟踪控制器，并基于输入-状态稳定性理论分析鲁棒性。
ai.result: 证明了闭环跟踪误差的局部输入-状态稳定性：标称情况下渐近收敛，有界扰动下跟踪误差有显式最终界。
ai.help_to_user: 为悬链线机器人系统提供了一种理论保证的鲁棒几何控制方案。

idea_spark.idea: 考虑将缆绳的弹性或时变长度纳入几何框架，以处理更复杂的缆绳动力学。
idea_spark.risk: 非结构化不确定性假设可能过于保守，实际缆绳力模型可能具有特定结构。
idea_spark.inspiration: 结合自适应或学习方法来估计缆绳力模型，以降低保守性。

en.tldr: This paper proposes a geometric tracking controller for a catenary robot consisting of two quadrotors connected by an inextensible cable, and analyzes its robustness against unstructured uncertainties in the cable-induced forces.
en.motivation: Cable-induced forces in catenary robots are configuration-dependent and subject to uncertainties, requiring robust control.
en.method: Modeling on SE(3) with the cable as a geometric subsystem induced by UAV configuration, designing a geometric tracking controller, and analyzing robustness via input-to-state stability.
en.result: Local input-to-state stability of closed-loop tracking errors is established: asymptotic convergence in the nominal case and an explicit ultimate bound under bounded perturbations.
en.help_to_user: Provides a theoretically guaranteed robust geometric control scheme for catenary robot systems.

idea_spark.idea: Consider incorporating cable elasticity or time-varying length into the geometric framework to handle more complex cable dynamics.
idea_spark.risk: The unstructured uncertainty assumption may be overly conservative; actual cable force models may have specific structure.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combine adaptive or learning methods to estimate the cable force model and reduce conservatism.

papers.title: Design and Characteristics of a Thin-Film ThermoMesh for the Efficient Embedded Sensing of a Spatio-Temporally Sparse Heat Source
papers.summary: This work presents ThermoMesh, a passive thin-film thermoelectric mesh sensor designed to detect and characterize spatio-temporally sparse heat sources through conduction-based thermal imaging. The device integrates thermoelectric junctions with linear or nonlinear interlayer resistive elements to perform simultaneous sensing and in-sensor compression. We focus on the single-event (1-sparse) operation and define four performance metrics: range, efficiency, sensitivity, and accuracy. Numerical modeling shows that a linear resistive interlayer flattens the sensitivity distribution and improves minimum sensitivity by approximately tenfold for a $16\times16$ mesh. Nonlinear temperature-dependent interlayers further enhance minimum sensitivity at scale: a ceramic negative-temperature-coefficient (NTC) layer over 973--1273~K yields a $\sim14{,}500\times$ higher minimum sensitivity than the linear design at a $200\times200$ mesh, while a VO$_2$ interlayer modeled across its metal--insulator transition (MIT) over 298--373~K yields a $\sim24\times$ improvement. Using synthetic 1-sparse datasets with white boundary-channel noise at a signal-to-noise ratio of 40~dB, the VO$_2$ case achieved $98\%$ localization accuracy, a mean absolute temperature error of $0.23$~K, and a noise-equivalent temperature (NET) of $0.07$~K. For the ceramic-NTC case no localization errors were observed under the tested conditions, with a mean absolute temperature error of $1.83$~K and a NET of $1.49$~K. These results indicate that ThermoMesh could enable energy-efficient embedded thermal sensing in scenarios where conventional infrared imaging is limited, such as molten-droplet detection or hot-spot monitoring in harsh environments.

ai.tldr: 提出一种名为ThermoMesh的被动薄膜热电网格传感器，用于通过传导热成像检测时空稀疏热源，并实现传感与压缩一体化。
ai.motivation: 传统红外成像在恶劣环境（如熔滴检测、热点监测）中受限，需要一种低功耗、嵌入式热传感方案。
ai.method: 设计热电结与线性或非线性层间电阻元件组成的网格，通过数值建模分析单事件（1-稀疏）操作下的性能指标，并利用合成数据集验证。
ai.result: 非线性层（如NTC陶瓷、VO₂）显著提升最小灵敏度；VO₂方案在40 dB信噪比下定位准确率98%，温度误差0.23 K；NTC陶瓷方案无定位误差，温度误差1.83 K。

en.tldr: This work presents ThermoMesh, a passive thin-film thermoelectric mesh sensor for detecting spatio-temporally sparse heat sources via conduction-based thermal imaging with integrated sensing and compression.
en.motivation: Conventional infrared imaging is limited in harsh environments (e.g., molten-droplet detection, hot-spot monitoring), necessitating an energy-efficient embedded thermal sensing solution.
en.method: A mesh of thermoelectric junctions with linear or nonlinear interlayer resistive elements is designed; numerical modeling evaluates performance metrics for single-event (1-sparse) operation, validated with synthetic datasets.
en.result: Nonlinear interlayers (e.g., NTC ceramic, VO₂) significantly enhance minimum sensitivity; VO₂ achieves 98% localization accuracy, 0.23 K temperature error at 40 dB SNR; NTC ceramic shows no localization errors with 1.83 K error.
en.help_to_user: Provides an alternative for efficient embedded thermal imaging in harsh environments where conventional IR is limited.

idea_spark.idea: Leveraging phase-change materials like VO₂ could further optimize sensor response to weak thermal signals or enable multi-event detection.
idea_spark.risk: Uniformity and stability of nonlinear materials in fabrication may affect performance; synthetic dataset results need validation in real scenarios.
idea_spark.inspiration: Using material intrinsic nonlinearity for sensing-computation fusion inspires smarter embedded sensor designs.

papers.title: Post-Optimization Adaptive Rank Allocation for LoRA
papers.summary: Exponential growth in the scale of modern foundation models has led to the widespread adoption of Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) as a parameter-efficient fine-tuning technique. However, standard LoRA implementations disregard the varying intrinsic dimensionality of model layers and enforce a uniform rank, leading to parameter redundancy. We propose Post-Optimization Adaptive Rank Allocation (PARA), a data-free compression method for LoRA that integrates seamlessly into existing fine-tuning pipelines. PARA leverages Singular Value Decomposition to prune LoRA ranks using a global threshold over singular values across all layers. This results in non-uniform rank allocation based on layer-wise spectral importance. As a post-hoc method, PARA circumvents the training modifications and resulting instabilities that dynamic architectures typically incur. We empirically demonstrate that PARA reduces parameter count by 75-90\% while preserving the predictive performance of the original, uncompressed LoRA across multiple vision and language benchmarks. Code will be published upon acceptance.

ai.tldr: 提出一种数据无关的后优化自适应秩分配方法（PARA），通过奇异值分解全局阈值剪枝LoRA秩，实现非均匀秩分配，减少75-90%参数且保持性能。
ai.motivation: 标准LoRA对所有层使用统一秩，忽略了层间内在维度差异，导致参数冗余。
ai.method: 利用奇异值分解，基于全局奇异值阈值跨层剪枝LoRA秩，实现后处理非均匀秩分配。
ai.result: 在多个视觉和语言基准上，参数减少75-90%且保持原始LoRA的预测性能。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种无需修改训练流程即可压缩LoRA模型的方法，降低存储和计算成本。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将PARA与动态秩分配结合，在微调过程中自适应调整秩。

idea_spark.inspiration: 受模型剪枝中全局阈值策略启发，将其应用于LoRA秩分配。

en.tldr: Proposes a data-free post-optimization adaptive rank allocation method (PARA) that prunes LoRA ranks via global SVD thresholding, achieving non-uniform rank allocation and reducing parameters by 75-90% while preserving performance.
en.motivation: Standard LoRA uses uniform rank across layers, ignoring varying intrinsic dimensionality and causing parameter redundancy.
en.method: Leverages SVD with a global threshold on singular values to prune LoRA ranks across layers, enabling post-hoc non-uniform rank allocation.
en.result: Reduces parameter count by 75-90% while maintaining predictive performance on multiple vision and language benchmarks.
en.help_to_user: Provides a training-free compression method for LoRA, reducing storage and computational costs.

idea_spark.idea: Explore combining PARA with dynamic rank allocation during fine-tuning for adaptive rank adjustment.
idea_spark.risk: Global threshold may not generalize across all tasks; robustness under different data distributions needs validation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by global threshold strategies in model pruning, applied to LoRA rank allocation.

papers.title: Deep Learning-Based Segmentation of Peritoneal Cancer Index Regions from CT Imaging
papers.summary: Peritoneal metastases are currently assessed using diagnostic laparoscopy to determine Sugarbaker's Peritoneal Cancer Index (sPCI), which works by dividing the abdomen into 13 regions and scoring each region based on tumor size. A recent consensus study defined 3D regions to facilitate a radiological PCI (rPCI), providing standardized anatomical regions for imaging-based assessment. Despite its clinical value, sPCI is invasive and lacks a standardized imaging counterpart. In this study, we propose a deep learning-based approach to automatically segment the rPCI regions on CT. We evaluate nnU-Net and Swin UNETR on 62 CT scans with rPCI regions manually annotated by three clinical researchers and validated by two expert radiologists. Performance was assessed using five-fold cross-validation with the Dice Similarity Coefficient (Dice), 95th percentile Hausdorff distance and Average Surface Distance. nnU-Net achieved an overall Dice of 0.82, approaching interobserver agreement (0.88) and outperforming Swin UNETR (0.76), with remaining challenges primarily in right flank and small-bowel regions. These results demonstrate feasibility of automated rPCI segmentation, laying the foundation for non-invasive, imaging-based assessment.

papers.title: Syntactically-guided Information Maintenance in Sentence Comprehension
papers.summary: Maintaining information in context is essential in successful real-time language comprehension, but maintenance is cognitively costly and can slow processing. We hypothesize that rational language users selectively maintain information that is crucial for future prediction, guided by syntactic structure. Under this view, two factors affect maintenance cost: the number of predicted heads and the number of incomplete dependencies. Although these factors have been treated as competing hypotheses in the literature, our account predicts that they are not reducible to one another. We show this is the case, using a naturalistic reading time dataset in Japanese, a language in which the two factors contrast particularly clearly. We further show that there is a tradeoff such that readers that slow down for maintenance tend to benefit more from predictability, providing additional support for the proposed account.

ai.tldr: 提出句法引导的信息维护假说，认为读者会选择性维护对未来预测关键的信息，并通过日语自然阅读数据验证了预测头数和未完成依存关系两个因素不可相互约化。
ai.motivation: 语言理解中信息维护代价高昂，但现有研究对维护成本的来源存在争议（预测头数 vs. 未完成依存关系），需要统一的理论解释。
ai.method: 使用日语自然阅读时间数据集，分析预测头数和未完成依存关系对阅读时间的影响，并考察读者个体差异中的速度-预测收益权衡。
ai.result: 两个因素均独立影响阅读时间，不可相互约化；阅读速度较慢的读者从预测中获益更多，支持选择性维护假说。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解语言理解中认知资源分配的机制，特别是句法结构如何引导信息维护。

idea_spark.idea: 设计实验比较不同语言（如英语与日语）中句法引导维护的差异，或利用神经影像（EEG/fMRI）验证预测头数与未完成依存关系的神经基础。
idea_spark.risk: 自然阅读数据可能存在混杂变量（如词频、长度），需通过控制实验进一步确认因果性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将句法引导维护与强化学习中的价值驱动注意力机制类比，可能启发更高效的语言模型架构。
