en.tldr: Proposes a syntactically-guided information maintenance account, showing that readers selectively maintain information crucial for future prediction, and validates that predicted heads and incomplete dependencies are irreducible factors using Japanese reading time data.
en.motivation: Information maintenance during language comprehension is costly, but existing accounts disagree on the source of maintenance cost (predicted heads vs. incomplete dependencies), requiring a unified explanation.
en.method: Analyzed naturalistic reading time data in Japanese to examine the independent effects of predicted heads and incomplete dependencies, and tested the speed-predictability tradeoff across readers.
en.result: Both factors independently affect reading time and are not reducible to each other; slower readers benefit more from predictability, supporting the selective maintenance account.
en.help_to_user: Provides insight into how cognitive resources are allocated during language comprehension, especially how syntactic structure guides information maintenance.

idea_spark.idea: Design cross-linguistic experiments (e.g., English vs. Japanese) or use neuroimaging (EEG/fMRI) to dissociate neural correlates of predicted heads and incomplete dependencies.
idea_spark.risk: Natural reading data may contain confounds (e.g., word frequency, length); controlled experiments are needed to establish causality.
idea_spark.inspiration: Analogizing syntactically-guided maintenance to value-driven attention in reinforcement learning could inspire more efficient language model architectures.

papers.title: LA-Pose: Latent Action Pretraining Meets Pose Estimation
papers.summary: This paper revisits camera pose estimation through the lens of self-supervised pretraining, focusing on inverse-dynamics pretraining as a scalable alternative to the current trend of fully supervised training with 3D annotations. Concretely, we employ inverse- and forward-dynamics models to learn latent action representations, similar to Genie from large-scale driving videos. Our idea is simple yet effective. Existing methods use latent actions in their original capacity, that is, as action conditioning of world-models or as proxies of robot action parameters in policy networks. Our method, dubbed LA-Pose, repurposes the latent action features as inputs to a camera pose estimator, finetuned on a limited set of high-quality 3D annotations. This formulation enables accurate and generalizable pose prediction while maintaining feed-forward efficiency. Extensive experiments on driving benchmarks show that LA-Pose achieves competitive and even superior performance to state-of-the-art methods while using orders of magnitude less labeled data. Concretely, on the Waymo and PandaSet benchmarks, LA-Pose achieves over 10% higher pose accuracy than recent feed-forward methods. To our knowledge, this work is the first to demonstrate the power of inverse-dynamics self-supervised learning for pose estimation.

ai.tldr: 提出LA-Pose，利用逆动力学自监督预训练学习潜在动作表示，再微调用于相机位姿估计，在少量标注下达到SOTA。
ai.motivation: 现有位姿估计方法依赖大量3D标注，成本高；自监督预训练可降低标注需求。
ai.method: 采用逆动力学和正动力学模型从大规模驾驶视频中学习潜在动作特征，然后将其输入位姿估计器，在少量高质量3D标注上微调。
ai.result: 在Waymo和PandaSet上，相比前馈方法位姿精度提升超10%，且标注数据量少几个数量级。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种低标注成本的位姿估计方案，适合自动驾驶等场景。

idea_spark.idea: 将逆动力学预训练与位姿估计结合，用动作特征替代传统几何或视觉特征。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖大规模驾驶视频，领域偏移时泛化性可能下降。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从世界模型（如Genie）中借鉴潜在动作概念，重新用于位姿任务。

en.tldr: LA-Pose leverages inverse-dynamics self-supervised pretraining to learn latent action representations, then fine-tunes a pose estimator with limited 3D annotations, achieving SOTA on driving benchmarks.
en.motivation: Existing pose estimation methods require large amounts of 3D annotations; self-supervised pretraining can reduce annotation cost.
en.method: Uses inverse- and forward-dynamics models to learn latent action features from large-scale driving videos, then feeds them into a pose estimator fine-tuned on a small set of high-quality 3D annotations.
en.result: Outperforms feed-forward methods by over 10% pose accuracy on Waymo and PandaSet, using orders of magnitude less labeled data.
en.help_to_user: Provides a low-annotation-cost pose estimation solution suitable for autonomous driving and similar domains.

idea_spark.idea: Combine inverse-dynamics pretraining with pose estimation, using action features instead of traditional geometric or visual features.
idea_spark.risk: Relies on large-scale driving videos; generalization may degrade under domain shift.
idea_spark.inspiration: Borrows the concept of latent actions from world models (e.g., Genie) and repurposes them for pose estimation.

papers.title: Policy-Governed LLM Routing with Intent Matching for Instrument Laboratories
papers.summary: AI tutoring systems in engineering labs face a tension between providing sufficient assistance and preserving learning opportunities. Existing systems typically offer instructors limited control over assistance timing, content, or cost. This paper describes a routing and governance system for LLM-based lab assistance comprising two components: Routiium, an OpenAI-compatible gateway that manages multiple LLM backends with configurable prompt modifications and usage logging, and EduRouter, a policy-aware routing service that enforces per-lab budgets, approval workflows, and embedding-based question matching. We evaluated the system using trace-driven simulation calibrated from two engineering labs (LED characterization, RC circuit analysis) and a 100-query replay through live models. In simulations, governed policies (P1/P2) increased challenge-alignment index from 0.90 to 0.98 and overlay-adherence score from 0.69 to 0.87 compared to ungoverned operation (P0). The productive-struggle window metric increased from 1.4 to 3.6 simulated turns before high-scaffold hints appeared. In the 100-query replay, EduRouter routed 75% of queries to a local model, reducing token costs by 66% ($0.087 vs. $0.26 for all-premium routing) while maintaining canonical hit rate of 1.0 for the curated 89-intent question bank. We release Routiium, EduRouter, canonical-task tooling, and simulator configurations to support replication and future classroom studies.

ai.tldr: 提出一个由策略驱动的LLM路由与意图匹配系统，用于工程实验室的AI辅导，平衡帮助提供与学习机会。
ai.motivation: 现有AI辅导系统在工程实验室中难以平衡充分帮助与保留学习机会，且教师对帮助时机、内容和成本的控制有限。
ai.method: 设计Routiium网关和EduRouter路由服务，支持多LLM后端、可配置提示修改、预算管理、审批流程和基于嵌入的问题匹配。
ai.result: 模拟显示策略治理将挑战对齐指数从0.90提升至0.98，覆盖遵循度从0.69提升至0.87；100次查询回放中75%路由至本地模型，成本降低66%。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助教师或系统设计者理解如何通过策略和意图匹配控制LLM辅助的时机、内容和成本。

idea_spark.idea: 将意图匹配与预算策略结合，实现动态的LLM路由选择，以优化学习效果和资源消耗。
idea_spark.risk: 策略可能过于严格，限制学生获取必要帮助；意图匹配依赖预定义问题库，可能无法覆盖所有查询。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受工程实验室中教师对辅导控制需求的启发，将策略治理引入LLM路由系统。

en.tldr: A policy-governed LLM routing and intent matching system for AI tutoring in engineering labs, balancing assistance and learning opportunities.
en.motivation: Existing AI tutoring systems in engineering labs struggle to balance sufficient assistance with preserving learning opportunities, and offer instructors limited control over timing, content, or cost.
en.method: Design of Routiium gateway and EduRouter service supporting multiple LLM backends, configurable prompt modifications, budget management, approval workflows, and embedding-based question matching.

en.help_to_user: Helps instructors or system designers understand how to control LLM assistance timing, content, and cost via policy and intent matching.

idea_spark.idea: Combine intent matching with budget policies for dynamic LLM routing to optimize learning outcomes and resource consumption.
idea_spark.risk: Policies may be too restrictive, limiting student access to necessary help; intent matching relies on predefined question banks, potentially missing novel queries.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the need for instructor control over tutoring in engineering labs, introducing policy governance into LLM routing systems.

papers.title: SpecVQA: A Benchmark for Spectral Understanding and Visual Question Answering in Scientific Images
papers.summary: Spectra are a prevalent yet highly information-dense form of scientific imagery, presenting substantial challenges to multimodal large language models (MLLMs) due to their unstructured and domain-specific characteristics. Here we introduce SpecVQA, a professional scientific-image benchmark for evaluating multimodal models on scientific spectral understanding, covering 7 representative spectrum types with expert-annotated question-answer pairs. The aim comprises two aspects: spectra scientific QA evaluation and corresponding underlying task evaluation. SpecVQA contains 620 figures and 3100 QA pairs curated from peer-reviewed literature, targeting both direct information extraction and domain-specific reasoning. To effectively reduce token length while preserving essential curve characteristics, we propose a spectral data sampling and interpolation reconstruction approach. Ablation studies further confirm that the approach achieves substantial performance improvements on the proposed benchmark. We test the capability of prominent MLLMs in scientific spectral understanding on our benchmark and present a leaderboard. This work represents an essential step toward enhancing spectral understanding in multimodal large models and suggests promising directions for extending visual-language models to broader scientific research and data analysis.

ai.tldr: 提出 SpecVQA 基准，用于评估多模态大模型在科学光谱图像上的理解与问答能力，包含 7 种光谱类型、620 张图和 3100 个问答对，并设计了一种光谱数据采样与插值重建方法以提升性能。
ai.motivation: 光谱图像信息密集且非结构化，现有多模态大模型难以有效处理，缺乏专业评估基准。
ai.method: 从同行评审文献中构建包含 7 种光谱类型的 620 张图和 3100 个问答对；提出光谱数据采样与插值重建方法减少 token 长度同时保留曲线特征。
ai.result: 所提方法在基准上取得显著性能提升，并建立了主流多模态大模型在光谱理解上的排行榜。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户了解如何评估和提升多模态大模型在科学光谱图像上的理解与推理能力。

idea_spark.idea: 将光谱问答与具体科学任务（如材料识别、化学结构解析）结合，构建端到端科学分析助手。
idea_spark.risk: 基准覆盖的光谱类型有限，可能无法全面反映真实科学场景的多样性；插值方法可能丢失细微特征。
idea_spark.inspiration: 借鉴 SpecVQA 的问答对构建方式，为其他科学领域（如天文光谱、医学影像）设计类似基准。

zh.motivation: 光谱图像信息密集且非结构化，现有多模态大模型难以有效处理，缺乏专业评估基准。

zh.result: 所提方法在基准上取得显著性能提升，并建立了主流多模态大模型在光谱理解上的排行榜。
zh.help_to_user: 帮助用户了解如何评估和提升多模态大模型在科学光谱图像上的理解与推理能力。

idea_spark.idea: 将光谱问答与具体科学任务（如材料识别、化学结构解析）结合，构建端到端科学分析助手。
idea_spark.risk: 基准覆盖的光谱类型有限，可能无法全面反映真实科学场景的多样性；插值方法可能丢失细微特征。
idea_spark.inspiration: 借鉴 SpecVQA 的问答对构建方式，为其他科学领域（如天文光谱、医学影像）设计类似基准。

en.tldr: Introduces SpecVQA, a benchmark for evaluating multimodal large language models on scientific spectral understanding and visual question answering, covering 7 spectrum types with 620 figures and 3100 QA pairs, along with a spectral data sampling and interpolation method that improves performance.
en.motivation: Spectra are information-dense and unstructured, posing challenges to MLLMs; no dedicated benchmark existed for spectral understanding.
en.method: Curated 620 figures and 3100 QA pairs from peer-reviewed literature across 7 spectrum types; proposed a spectral data sampling and interpolation reconstruction approach to reduce token length while preserving curve characteristics.
en.result: The proposed method yields substantial performance improvements on the benchmark; established a leaderboard for prominent MLLMs.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how to evaluate and improve MLLMs on scientific spectral understanding and reasoning.

idea_spark.idea: Combine spectral QA with specific scientific tasks (e.g., material identification, chemical structure elucidation) to build an end-to-end scientific analysis assistant.
idea_spark.risk: Limited spectrum types may not fully represent real-world scientific diversity; interpolation may lose subtle features.
idea_spark.inspiration: Follow SpecVQA's QA pair construction approach to design similar benchmarks for other scientific domains (e.g., astronomical spectra, medical imaging).

papers.title: Stein's square function associated with the Bochner-Riesz means on Métivier groups and its applications
papers.summary: In this paper, we study the $L^p$-boundedness of Stein's square function $\mathfrak{S}^α(\mathcal{L})$ associated with the sub-Laplacian $\mathcal{L}$ on Métivier group $G$. A key aspect of our result is that the smoothness condition is expressed in terms of the topological dimension $d$ of the underlying Métivier group $G$. Consequently, we also present several applications of the $L^p$-boundedness of $\mathfrak{S}^α(\mathcal{L})$. First, we provide an alternate proof of the sharp $L^p$-boundedness result for spectral multipliers on Métivier groups, recently obtained by Niedorf [Niedorf, Studia Math., 2025]. Next we prove $L^p$-boundedness of maximal spectral multipliers and consequently establish sharp $L^p$-boundedness result for the maximal Bochner-Riesz operator on Métivier groups, which also yields pointwise almost everywhere convergence of Bochner-Riesz means with smoothness parameter given in terms of the topological dimension of $G$. In case of Métivier groups our result improves upon the existing works of Mauceri-Meda [Mauceri, Meda, Rev. Mat. Iberoam., 1990] and Horwich-Martini [Horwich, Martini, J. Lond. Math. Soc., 2021]. Our result further imply the mixed norm regularity estimates for the solution of fractional Schrödinger equation on Métivier groups, where the regularity index is again expressed in terms of the topological dimension of $G$. Finally, we study the $L^{p_1}(G) \times L^{p_2}(G)$ to $L^p(G)$ boundedness of the bilinear Bochner-Riesz means and its maximal version, associated with the sub-Laplacian on Métivier group $G$. Our result improves upon the recent work of the author with Bagchi and Molla [Bagchi, Molla, Singh, J. Funct. Anal., 2026] in the range $2\leq p_1, p_2 <\infty$. In the same range, ......

ai.tldr: 本文研究了Métivier群上子拉普拉斯算子相关的Stein平方函数的L^p有界性，并给出了谱乘子、极大Bochner-Riesz算子、分数阶薛定谔方程正则性以及双线性Bochner-Riesz均值等应用。
ai.motivation: 将Stein平方函数理论从欧几里得空间推广到更一般的Métivier群，并利用其L^p有界性改进和统一现有结果。
ai.method: 利用Métivier群的拓扑维数d表达光滑性条件，通过调和分析技术证明平方函数的有界性，并推导谱乘子和极大算子的相应结果。
ai.result: 得到了Stein平方函数L^p有界性的最优光滑性条件，改进了Mauceri-Meda和Horwich-Martini等人的工作，并应用于分数阶薛定谔方程和双线性Bochner-Riesz均值。
ai.help_to_user: 为Métivier群上的调和分析提供了新的工具，有助于理解非交换群上的函数空间和算子理论。

idea_spark.idea: 将Stein平方函数与分数阶薛定谔方程的正则性估计结合，可能导出新的Sobolev型不等式。
idea_spark.risk: 双线性Bochner-Riesz均值的L^p有界性范围可能受限于群的结构，推广到更一般的幂零群需要额外条件。
idea_spark.inspiration: 考虑在更一般的齐次群上定义类似的平方函数，并探索其在色散方程和调和分析中的应用。

en.tldr: This paper studies the L^p-boundedness of Stein's square function associated with the sub-Laplacian on Métivier groups, with applications to spectral multipliers, maximal Bochner-Riesz operators, regularity of fractional Schrödinger equations, and bilinear Bochner-Riesz means.
en.motivation: To extend Stein's square function theory to Métivier groups and improve existing results via the topological dimension as a smoothness parameter.
en.method: The smoothness condition is expressed in terms of the topological dimension d of the Métivier group, and harmonic analysis techniques are used to prove boundedness and derive applications.
en.result: Sharp L^p-boundedness results for Stein's square function and related operators, improving upon works of Mauceri-Meda and Horwich-Martini, and yielding mixed norm estimates for fractional Schrödinger equations.
en.help_to_user: Provides new tools for harmonic analysis on Métivier groups, useful for understanding function spaces and operator theory on noncommutative groups.

idea_spark.idea: Combine Stein's square function with regularity estimates for fractional Schrödinger equations to derive new Sobolev-type inequalities.
idea_spark.risk: The L^p boundedness range for bilinear Bochner-Riesz means may be limited by the group structure; generalization to more general nilpotent groups may require additional conditions.
idea_spark.inspiration: Consider defining similar square functions on more general homogeneous groups and explore their applications in dispersive equations and harmonic analysis.

papers.title: A Collective Variational Principle Unifying Bayesian Inference, Game Theory, and Thermodynamics
papers.summary: Collective intelligence emerges across biological, physical, and artificial systems without central coordination, yet a unifying principle governing such behaviour remains elusive. The Free Energy Principle explains how individual agents adapt through variational inference, while game theory formalises strategic interactions. Here we introduce the Game-Theoretic Free Energy Principle, a unified framework showing that multi-agent systems performing local free-energy minimisation implicitly implement a stochastic game. We prove that, under bounded rationality and local information constraints, stationary points of collective free energy correspond to approximate Nash equilibria of an induced game. Conversely, a broad class of cooperative games admits a variational representation in which equilibria arise as Gibbs distributions over coalitions, establishing a bridge between Bayesian inference and strategic interaction. To characterise higher-order effects, we introduce a free-energy formulation of the Harsanyi dividend, isolating irreducible multi-agent synergy. This yields a predictive theory of cooperation, including a falsifiable non-monotonic relationship between sensory precision and agent influence. We validate this prediction across neural, biological, and artificial multi-agent systems. These results identify a common variational principle underlying inference, thermodynamics, and game-theoretic equilibrium.

ai.tldr: 提出博弈论自由能原理，统一贝叶斯推理、博弈论和热力学，证明多智能体局部自由能最小化隐式实现随机博弈，并预测合作中感官精度与影响力的非单调关系。
ai.motivation: 生物、物理和人工系统中集体智能涌现缺乏统一原理，现有自由能原理和博弈论分别解释个体适应和策略互动，需要桥梁。
ai.method: 引入博弈论自由能原理，证明在有限理性和局部信息约束下，集体自由能驻点对应诱导博弈的近似纳什均衡；通过吉布斯分布建立变分表示；引入Harsanyi红利的自由能形式刻画高阶效应。
ai.result: 统一框架下，合作博弈的均衡可表示为联盟上的吉布斯分布；感官精度与智能体影响力呈非单调关系，并在神经、生物和人工多智能体系统中验证。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解多智能体系统中推理、热力学和博弈均衡的共同变分基础，提供可检验的合作预测。

idea_spark.idea: 利用Harsanyi红利分解多智能体协同中的不可约高阶效应，设计新的合作指标或控制策略。
idea_spark.risk: 非单调关系可能依赖特定参数假设，实际系统验证需谨慎。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将自由能最小化与博弈均衡结合，启发设计自组织、去中心化的智能系统。

papers.title: Adjoint Inversion Reveals Holographic Superposition and Destructive Interference in CNN Classifiers
papers.summary: A foundational assumption in CNN interpretability -- that deep encoders suppress background pixels while classifiers merely select from a cleaned feature pool (the Spatial Funnel Hypothesis) -- remains untested due to spatial hallucinations in existing visualization tools. We address this by introducing a hallucination-free inversion framework built on magnitude-phase decoupling and Local Adjoint Correctors. Our method mathematically guarantees that the spatial gradient support of every reconstruction stems strictly from genuinely active channels.   Using this framework as a geometric probe, we uncover the first pixel-level evidence of strong superposition in vision encoders. We show that per-channel inversions are uniformly holographic: positive and negative weight reconstructions are visually and energetically indistinguishable. However, their algebraic sum sharply concentrates on the foreground. This proves classification operates via destructive interference -- classifier weights cancel a shared background direction in pixel space and constructively assemble class-discriminative residuals, directly falsifying the Spatial Funnel Hypothesis.   This interference model identifies the volume of the admissible interference subspace as the geometric quantity governing channel requirements. We prove this volume is dual to the GAP covariance determinant, yielding a covariance-volume channel selection algorithm with a $(1-1/e)$ approximation guarantee. This algorithm mathematically reveals out-of-distribution (OOD) failure as a measurable collapse of the covariance volume essential for interference-based classification. Our framework extends seamlessly to attention-based heads without retraining.

ai.tldr: 提出无幻觉反演框架，揭示CNN分类器中的全息叠加与相消干涉，推翻空间漏斗假说。
ai.motivation: 现有可视化工具存在空间幻觉，无法检验CNN编码器是否抑制背景像素（空间漏斗假说）。
ai.method: 基于幅度-相位解耦和局部伴随校正器构建无幻觉反演框架，保证重建梯度支持严格来自活跃通道。
ai.result: 发现每个通道的反演是全息的，正负权重重建不可区分，但代数和集中在前景，证明分类通过相消干涉运作，推翻空间漏斗假说。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种数学保证无幻觉的CNN解释方法，并揭示分类的干涉机制，有助于理解模型行为。

idea_spark.idea: 利用协方差体积作为几何量指导通道选择，并检测OOD失败。
idea_spark.risk: 方法依赖精确的梯度计算，可能受数值稳定性影响。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将分类视为干涉过程，启发设计更高效的通道选择与OOD检测算法。

en.motivation: Existing visualization tools suffer from spatial hallucinations, leaving untested the assumption that deep encoders suppress background pixels (Spatial Funnel Hypothesis).
en.method: A hallucination-free inversion framework built on magnitude-phase decoupling and Local Adjoint Correctors, mathematically ensuring that reconstruction gradient support stems strictly from active channels.

idea_spark.inspiration: Viewing classification as an interference process inspires more efficient channel selection and OOD detection algorithms.

papers.title: Spectral Dynamic Attention Network for Hyperspectral Image Super-Resolution
papers.summary: Hyperspectral image super-resolution is essential for enhancing the spatial fidelity of HSI data, yet existing deep learning methods often struggle with substantial spectral redundancy and the limited non-linear modeling capacity of standard feed-forward networks (FFNs). To address these challenges, we propose Spectral Dynamic Attention Network (SDANet), a framework designed to adaptively suppress redundant spectral interactions. SDANet integrates two key components: 1) Dynamic Channel Sparse Attention (DCSA) module that computes channel-wise correlations and selectively preserves the most informative attention responses through dynamic and data-dependent sparsification. 2) Frequency-Enhanced Feed-Forward Network (FE-FFN) that jointly models spatial and frequency-domain representations to enhance non-linear expressiveness. Extensive experiments on two benchmark datasets demonstrate that SDANet achieves state-of-the-art HISR performance while maintaining competitive efficiency. The code will be made publicly available at https://github.com/oucailab/SDANet.

ai.tldr: 提出光谱动态注意力网络（SDANet），通过动态通道稀疏注意力和频率增强前馈网络，有效抑制光谱冗余并提升高光谱图像超分辨率性能。
ai.motivation: 现有深度学习方法难以处理高光谱数据中的大量光谱冗余，且标准前馈网络非线性建模能力有限。
ai.method: SDANet包含动态通道稀疏注意力模块（DCSA）和频率增强前馈网络（FE-FFN），前者通过动态稀疏化保留最有信息的注意力响应，后者联合建模空间和频域表示。
ai.result: 在两个基准数据集上达到最先进的高光谱图像超分辨率性能，同时保持竞争效率。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何通过注意力机制和频域增强来提升高光谱图像的空间分辨率。

idea_spark.idea: 将频域增强与通道稀疏注意力结合，在抑制冗余的同时增强非线性表达。
idea_spark.risk: 动态稀疏化可能在某些数据分布下丢失关键信息，需验证泛化性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受光谱冗余和频域建模启发，可探索其他变换域（如小波）与注意力的融合。

en.tldr: Proposes Spectral Dynamic Attention Network (SDANet) with Dynamic Channel Sparse Attention and Frequency-Enhanced Feed-Forward Network to suppress spectral redundancy and improve hyperspectral image super-resolution.
en.motivation: Existing deep learning methods struggle with substantial spectral redundancy and limited non-linear modeling capacity of standard feed-forward networks.
en.method: SDANet integrates Dynamic Channel Sparse Attention (DCSA) for selective attention response preservation and Frequency-Enhanced Feed-Forward Network (FE-FFN) for joint spatial-frequency modeling.
en.result: Achieves state-of-the-art hyperspectral image super-resolution performance on two benchmark datasets while maintaining competitive efficiency.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how attention mechanisms and frequency enhancement can improve spatial resolution in hyperspectral images.

idea_spark.idea: Combine frequency enhancement with channel sparse attention to suppress redundancy while enhancing non-linear expressiveness.
idea_spark.risk: Dynamic sparsification may lose critical information in certain data distributions; generalization needs verification.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by spectral redundancy and frequency-domain modeling, explore fusion of other transform domains (e.g., wavelet) with attention.

papers.title: BUT System Description for CHiME-9 MCoRec Challenge
papers.summary: Multi-talker automatic speech recognition (ASR) in conversational recordings remains an open problem, particularly in scenarios with large portion of overlapping speech where identifying and transcribing a target speaker is difficult from audio alone. Visual cues can help resolve speaker ambiguity, yet their integration into long-context audio-visual (AV) ASR systems has been limited. The CHiME-9 MCoRec task addresses this challenge by requiring transcription of audio-visual recordings of heavily-overlapped parallel conversations, followed by clustering the participants into conversational groups. In this work, we present the BUT system based on a long-context target-speaker AV-ASR model capable of processing long-form recordings in a single decoding pass. Our architecture conditions a pre-trained NVIDIA Parakeet-v2 ASR model on visual representations from a pre-trained AV-HuBERT model. To cluster participants into conversation groups, we employ Qwen3.5-122B LLM to estimate transcript topic similarity followed by hierarchical agglomerative clustering. On the MCoRec development set, the proposed system achieves 33.7% WER and a clustering F1 score of 0.97, improving over the official baseline by 16.2% WER and 0.15 F1 absolute. On the eval set, our team ranked second, being 0.16% WER and 0.5% F1 worse than the best system.

ai.tldr: 提出基于长上下文目标说话人音视频ASR模型和LLM聚类的方法，在CHiME-9 MCoRec任务上取得第二名成绩。
ai.motivation: 多说话人重叠语音场景下，仅靠音频难以识别目标说话人，视觉线索可辅助解决歧义，但现有系统缺乏长上下文音视频集成。
ai.method: 使用预训练Parakeet-v2 ASR模型和AV-HuBERT视觉表示，构建单次解码的长上下文目标说话人AV-ASR模型；利用Qwen3.5-122B LLM估计转录主题相似度，进行层次凝聚聚类。
ai.result: 开发集上WER 33.7%、聚类F1 0.97，比基线分别提升16.2%和0.15；评估集排名第二，WER和F1仅比最佳系统差0.16%和0.5%。
ai.help_to_user: 展示了如何将视觉信息与长上下文ASR结合，并利用LLM进行对话分组，适用于会议记录等复杂场景。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将视觉特征与说话人嵌入更紧密融合，或使用端到端聚类替代两阶段方法。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖预训练模型可能引入领域偏差，LLM聚类计算成本高，实时性受限。
idea_spark.inspiration: 借鉴LLM在语义理解上的优势，可启发将大模型用于语音场景的语义分割和角色识别。

zh.tldr: 提出基于长上下文目标说话人音视频ASR模型和LLM聚类的方法，在CHiME-9 MCoRec任务上取得第二名成绩。
zh.motivation: 多说话人重叠语音场景下，仅靠音频难以识别目标说话人，视觉线索可辅助解决歧义，但现有系统缺乏长上下文音视频集成。
zh.method: 使用预训练Parakeet-v2 ASR模型和AV-HuBERT视觉表示，构建单次解码的长上下文目标说话人AV-ASR模型；利用Qwen3.5-122B LLM估计转录主题相似度，进行层次凝聚聚类。
zh.result: 开发集上WER 33.7%、聚类F1 0.97，比基线分别提升16.2%和0.15；评估集排名第二，WER和F1仅比最佳系统差0.16%和0.5%。
zh.help_to_user: 展示了如何将视觉信息与长上下文ASR结合，并利用LLM进行对话分组，适用于会议记录等复杂场景。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将视觉特征与说话人嵌入更紧密融合，或使用端到端聚类替代两阶段方法。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖预训练模型可能引入领域偏差，LLM聚类计算成本高，实时性受限。
idea_spark.inspiration: 借鉴LLM在语义理解上的优势，可启发将大模型用于语音场景的语义分割和角色识别。

en.tldr: Proposes a long-context target-speaker AV-ASR model with LLM-based clustering, achieving 2nd place in CHiME-9 MCoRec.
en.motivation: In multi-talker overlapping speech, audio alone struggles to identify target speakers; visual cues help but long-context AV integration is limited.
en.method: Conditions pre-trained Parakeet-v2 ASR on AV-HuBERT visual features for single-pass decoding; uses Qwen3.5-122B LLM for topic similarity estimation and hierarchical agglomerative clustering.
en.result: Dev set: 33.7% WER, 0.97 clustering F1, improving baseline by 16.2% WER and 0.15 F1; eval set: 2nd place, 0.16% WER and 0.5% F1 behind best.
en.help_to_user: Demonstrates effective integration of visual cues into long-context ASR and LLM-based conversation grouping, useful for meeting transcription.

idea_spark.idea: Explore tighter fusion of visual features with speaker embeddings, or end-to-end clustering to replace the two-stage pipeline.
idea_spark.risk: Dependence on pre-trained models may introduce domain bias; LLM clustering is computationally expensive and less real-time.
idea_spark.inspiration: Leveraging LLM semantic understanding inspires using large models for semantic segmentation and role recognition in speech scenes.

papers.title: EdgeFM: Efficient Edge Inference for Vision-Language Models
papers.summary: Vision-language models (VLMs) have demonstrated strong applicability in edge industrial applications, yet their deployment remains severely constrained by requirements for deterministic low latency and stable execution under resource limitations. Existing frameworks either rely on bloated general-purpose designs or force developers into opaque, hardware-specific closed-source ecosystems, leading to hardware lock-in limitation and poor cross-platform adaptability. Observing that modern AI agents can efficiently search and tune configurations to generate highly optimized low-level kernels for standard LLM operators, we propose EdgeFM, a lightweight, agent-driven VLM/LLM inference framework tailored for cross-platform industrial edge deployment. EdgeFM removes non-essential features to reduce single-request latency, and encapsulates agent-tuned kernel optimizations as a modular library of reusable skills. By allowing direct invocation of these skills rather than waiting for closed-source implementations, it effectively closes the performance gap long dominated by proprietary toolchains. The framework natively supports mainstream platforms including x86 and NVIDIA Orin SoCs, and represents the first end-to-end VLA deployment on the domestic Horizon Journey platform, enhancing cross-platform portability. In most cases, it yields clearly better inference performance than conventional vendor-specific toolchains, achieving up to 1.49 times speedup over TensorRT-Edge-LLM on the NVIDIA Orin platform. Experimental results show that EdgeFM delivers favorable end-to-end inference performance, providing an open-source, production-grade solution for diverse edge industrial scenarios.

ai.tldr: 提出EdgeFM，一个轻量级、智能体驱动的视觉-语言模型推理框架，专为跨平台工业边缘部署设计，通过移除非必要功能和封装智能体调优内核，实现低延迟和高性能。
ai.motivation: 现有VLM部署框架要么臃肿通用，要么依赖封闭硬件生态，导致延迟高、跨平台适应性差。
ai.method: 去除非必要功能降低单次请求延迟；将智能体调优的内核优化封装为可复用技能库，直接调用而非等待闭源实现。
ai.result: 在NVIDIA Orin平台上相比TensorRT-Edge-LLM最高提速1.49倍，首次在国产地平线Journey平台实现端到端VLA部署。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户在资源受限的边缘设备上高效部署VLM/LLM，避免硬件锁定，提升跨平台可移植性。

idea_spark.idea: 将大模型推理中的算子优化过程自动化，并作为可复用模块积累，形成开放生态。
idea_spark.risk: 智能体调优可能引入额外开销，且技能库的通用性需在更多硬件上验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 借鉴现代AI agent自动搜索和调优配置的思路，打破闭源工具链的性能垄断。

en.tldr: Proposes EdgeFM, a lightweight agent-driven inference framework for vision-language models tailored to cross-platform industrial edge deployment, achieving low latency and high performance by removing non-essential features and encapsulating agent-tuned kernel optimizations.
en.motivation: Existing VLM deployment frameworks are either bloated general-purpose designs or rely on closed hardware ecosystems, leading to high latency and poor cross-platform adaptability.
en.method: Removes non-essential features to reduce per-request latency; encapsulates agent-tuned kernel optimizations as a reusable skill library for direct invocation instead of waiting for closed-source implementations.
en.result: Achieves up to 1.49x speedup over TensorRT-Edge-LLM on NVIDIA Orin, and is the first end-to-end VLA deployment on the domestic Horizon Journey platform.
en.help_to_user: Helps users efficiently deploy VLMs/LLMs on resource-constrained edge devices, avoiding hardware lock-in and improving cross-platform portability.

idea_spark.idea: Automate operator optimization in large model inference and accumulate them as reusable modules to form an open ecosystem.
idea_spark.risk: Agent tuning may introduce overhead, and the generality of the skill library needs validation on more hardware.
idea_spark.inspiration: Leverage the idea of modern AI agents automatically searching and tuning configurations to break the performance monopoly of closed-source toolchains.

papers.title: Judge, Then Drive: A Critic-Centric Vision Language Action Framework for Autonomous Driving
papers.summary: Recent advances in vision language action (VLA) models have shown remarkable potential for autonomous driving by directly mapping multimodal inputs to control signals. However, previous VLA-based methods have not explicitly exploited the critic capability of VLAs to refine driving decisions, even though such capability has been well demonstrated in other LLM-based domains, thereby limiting their performance in complex closed-loop scenarios. In this work, we present a theoretically inspired two-stage framework, CriticVLA, which extends the role of VLAs from acting to judging. CriticVLA first generates a rough trajectory and then refines it through multimodal evaluation and single-step optimization guided by a VLA-based critic, yielding higher-quality driving behaviors. To support this process, we construct a large-scale synthetic dataset of 12.9 million annotated trajectories covering diverse driving scenarios, which enhances the critic's reasoning and refinement abilities. Extensive closed-loop experiments on the Bench2Drive benchmark show that CriticVLA significantly surpasses state-of-the-art baselines, achieving a 73.33% total success rate and delivering about 30% improvement in challenging scenarios.

ai.tldr: 提出CriticVLA框架，利用VLA模型的评判能力先粗生成轨迹再精炼，在Bench2Drive上实现73.33%成功率。
ai.motivation: 现有VLA方法未显式利用其评判能力来优化驾驶决策，限制了复杂闭环场景性能。
ai.method: 两阶段框架：第一阶段生成粗略轨迹，第二阶段通过多模态评估和单步优化精炼轨迹。
ai.result: 在Bench2Drive上总成功率73.33%，挑战场景提升约30%。
ai.help_to_user: 为自动驾驶决策提供一种利用VLA评判能力进行轨迹优化的新思路。

idea_spark.idea: 将VLA的评判能力显式用于轨迹优化，而非仅作为动作生成器。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖大规模合成数据集，可能引入仿真与真实环境的分布偏移。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受LLM领域使用评判模型改进生成质量的启发，将类似思想引入自动驾驶。

zh.tldr: 提出CriticVLA框架，利用VLA模型的评判能力先粗生成轨迹再精炼，在Bench2Drive上实现73.33%成功率。
zh.motivation: 现有VLA方法未显式利用其评判能力来优化驾驶决策，限制了复杂闭环场景性能。

zh.help_to_user: 为自动驾驶决策提供一种利用VLA评判能力进行轨迹优化的新思路。

idea_spark.inspiration: 受LLM领域使用评判模型改进生成质量的启发，将类似思想引入自动驾驶。

en.tldr: Proposes CriticVLA, a two-stage framework that leverages VLA's critic capability to first generate a rough trajectory then refine it, achieving 73.33% success rate on Bench2Drive.
en.motivation: Previous VLA methods do not explicitly exploit the critic capability to refine driving decisions, limiting performance in complex closed-loop scenarios.
en.method: Two-stage framework: first generate a coarse trajectory, then refine it via multimodal evaluation and single-step optimization guided by a VLA-based critic.
en.result: 73.33% total success rate on Bench2Drive, with about 30% improvement in challenging scenarios.
en.help_to_user: Provides a new approach for autonomous driving decision-making by explicitly using VLA's critic capability for trajectory refinement.

idea_spark.idea: Explicitly use VLA's critic capability for trajectory optimization rather than only as an action generator.
idea_spark.risk: Relies on large-scale synthetic datasets, which may introduce distribution shift between simulation and real world.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the use of critic models to improve generation quality in LLM domains, applying similar ideas to autonomous driving.

papers.title: CoAX: Cognitive-Oriented Attribution eXplanation User Model of Human Understanding of AI Explanations
papers.summary: Explainable AI (XAI) aims to improve user understanding and decisions when using AI models. However, despite innovations in XAI, recent user evaluations reveal that this goal remains elusive. Understanding human cognition can help explain why users struggle to effectively use AI explanations. Focusing on reasoning on structured (tabular) data, we examined various reasoning strategies for different XAI methods (none, feature importance, feature attribution) in the decision task of anticipating AI decisions (i.e., forward simulation). We i) elicited reasoning strategies from a formative user study, and ii) collected decisions from a summative user study. Using cognitive modeling, we implemented the processes underlying each reasoning strategy and evaluated their alignment with human decision-making. We found that our models better fit human decisions than baseline machine learning proxies, providing insights into which reasoning strategies are (in)effective. We then demonstrate how the fitted model can be used to form hypotheses and investigate research questions that are costly to study with real human participants. This work contributes to debugging human understanding of XAI, informing the future development of more usable and interpretable AI explanations.

ai.tldr: 提出一种认知导向的归因解释用户模型，通过认知建模分析人类对AI解释的理解过程。
ai.motivation: 现有XAI方法虽多，但用户评估显示其未能有效提升用户理解与决策，需从人类认知角度探究原因。
ai.method: 通过形成性研究提取推理策略，在总结性研究中收集决策数据，并用认知模型实现各策略过程，评估其与人类决策的匹配度。
ai.result: 认知模型比基线机器学习代理更好地拟合人类决策，揭示了有效与无效的推理策略。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解XAI解释为何有时无效，并为设计更可用的AI解释提供认知依据。

idea_spark.idea: 利用拟合的认知模型生成假设，替代昂贵的人机实验来探索XAI设计问题。
idea_spark.risk: 模型可能过度简化真实认知过程，需谨慎推广至复杂任务。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将认知科学中的推理策略分类引入XAI评估，为解释设计提供理论支撑。

zh.tldr: 提出一种认知导向的归因解释用户模型，通过认知建模分析人类对AI解释的理解过程。
zh.motivation: 现有XAI方法虽多，但用户评估显示其未能有效提升用户理解与决策，需从人类认知角度探究原因。

zh.result: 认知模型比基线机器学习代理更好地拟合人类决策，揭示了有效与无效的推理策略。
zh.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解XAI解释为何有时无效，并为设计更可用的AI解释提供认知依据。

idea_spark.idea: 利用拟合的认知模型生成假设，替代昂贵的人机实验来探索XAI设计问题。
idea_spark.risk: 模型可能过度简化真实认知过程，需谨慎推广至复杂任务。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将认知科学中的推理策略分类引入XAI评估，为解释设计提供理论支撑。

en.tldr: Proposes a cognitive-oriented attribution explanation user model that uses cognitive modeling to analyze how humans understand AI explanations.
en.motivation: Despite many XAI methods, user evaluations show they fail to effectively improve understanding and decisions, necessitating a cognitive perspective.
en.method: Elicited reasoning strategies via a formative study, collected decisions in a summative study, and implemented each strategy as a cognitive model to evaluate alignment with human decisions.
en.result: Cognitive models fit human decisions better than baseline ML proxies, revealing effective and ineffective reasoning strategies.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand why XAI explanations sometimes fail and provides cognitive insights for designing more usable AI explanations.

idea_spark.idea: Use fitted cognitive models to generate hypotheses and replace costly human experiments for exploring XAI design questions.
idea_spark.risk: Models may oversimplify real cognitive processes; caution is needed when generalizing to complex tasks.
idea_spark.inspiration: Introducing reasoning strategy taxonomies from cognitive science into XAI evaluation provides theoretical support for explanation design.

papers.title: LLM as Clinical Graph Structure Refiner: Enhancing Representation Learning in EEG Seizure Diagnosis
papers.summary: Electroencephalogram (EEG) signals are vital for automated seizure detection, but their inherent noise makes robust representation learning challenging. Existing graph construction methods, whether correlation-based or learning-based, often generate redundant or irrelevant edges due to the noisy nature of EEG data. This significantly impairs the quality of graph representation and limits downstream task performance. Motivated by the remarkable reasoning and contextual understanding capabilities of large language models (LLMs), we explore the idea of using LLMs as graph edge refiners. Specifically, we propose a two-stage framework: we first verify that LLM-based edge refinement can effectively identify and remove redundant connections, leading to significant improvements in seizure detection accuracy and more meaningful graph structures. Building on this insight, we further develop a robust solution where the initial graph is constructed using a Transformer-based edge predictor and multilayer perceptron, assigning probability scores to potential edges and applying a threshold to determine their existence. The LLM then acts as an edge set refiner, making informed decisions based on both textual and statistical features of node pairs to validate the remaining connections. Extensive experiments on TUSZ dataset demonstrate that our LLM-refined graph learning framework not only enhances task performance but also yields cleaner and more interpretable graph representations.

ai.tldr: 提出利用大语言模型作为图边精炼器，去除EEG信号中的冗余连接，提升癫痫检测准确率和图表示质量。
ai.motivation: EEG信号噪声大，现有图构建方法易产生冗余或无关边，损害图表示质量。
ai.method: 两阶段框架：先用Transformer和MLP构建初始图并赋予边概率，再用LLM基于文本和统计特征精炼边集。
ai.result: 在TUSZ数据集上，LLM精炼后的图学习框架提升了任务性能，生成了更干净、可解释的图表示。
ai.help_to_user: 展示了如何将LLM的推理能力用于图结构优化，为噪声信号下的图学习提供新思路。

idea_spark.idea: 利用LLM对节点对的语义和统计特征进行联合判断，替代传统硬阈值或简单相关性。
idea_spark.risk: LLM推理可能引入计算开销和延迟，且对文本特征设计敏感。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将LLM作为图结构的后处理精炼器，而非端到端生成器，平衡了灵活性与效率。

zh.tldr: 提出利用大语言模型作为图边精炼器，去除EEG信号中的冗余连接，提升癫痫检测准确率和图表示质量。

idea_spark.inspiration: 将LLM作为图结构的后处理精炼器，而非端到端生成器，平衡了灵活性与效率。

en.tldr: Proposes using LLMs as graph edge refiners to remove redundant connections in EEG signals, improving seizure detection accuracy and graph representation quality.
en.motivation: EEG signals are noisy; existing graph construction methods often generate redundant or irrelevant edges, impairing graph representation quality.
en.method: Two-stage framework: first build an initial graph with Transformer and MLP assigning edge probabilities, then use LLM to refine the edge set based on textual and statistical features.
en.result: On TUSZ dataset, the LLM-refined graph learning framework enhances task performance and yields cleaner, more interpretable graph representations.
en.help_to_user: Demonstrates how to leverage LLM reasoning for graph structure optimization, offering a new approach for graph learning on noisy signals.

idea_spark.idea: Use LLM to jointly judge node pairs based on semantic and statistical features, replacing traditional hard thresholds or simple correlations.
idea_spark.risk: LLM inference may introduce computational overhead and latency, and is sensitive to textual feature design.
idea_spark.inspiration: Using LLM as a post-processing graph refiner rather than an end-to-end generator balances flexibility and efficiency.

papers.title: Beyond the Mean: Within-Model Reliable Change Detection for LLM Evaluation
papers.summary: We adapted the Reliable Change Index (RCI; Jacobson and Truax, 1991) from clinical psychology to item-level LLM version comparison on 2,000 MMLU-Pro items (K=10 samples at T=0.7). Two within-family pairs were tested: Llama 3 to 3.1 (+1.6 points) and Qwen 2.5 to 3 (+2.8 points). On the full benchmark, most items showed no reliable change (79% and 72%). However, over half the items were floor/ceiling. Among analysable items, change was bidirectional with large effect sizes: 34% improved and 28% deteriorated for Llama; 47% improved and 39% deteriorated for Qwen (median |delta p| = 0.50 and 0.90). Churn was asymmetric by difficulty: low-accuracy items improved, high-accuracy items deteriorated. Domain-level decomposition revealed family-specific reversals: Llama lost physics while Qwen lost law. Greedy single-shot evaluation missed 42% of reliably changed items and falsely flagged 25% of unchanged items. The aggregate accuracy gain is the net residual of opposing item-level movements. We recommend reporting churn rate alongside aggregate accuracy.

ai.tldr: 将临床心理学中的可靠变化指数（RCI）引入大语言模型版本比较，发现多数项目无可靠变化，但可分析项目存在双向大幅变化，聚合准确率提升是项目级变化的净残差。
ai.motivation: 传统聚合准确率指标掩盖了模型版本间项目级的变化方向与幅度，无法反映真实的行为差异。
ai.method: 在2000个MMLU-Pro项目上（K=10样本，T=0.7）采用RCI进行项目级可靠变化检测，比较Llama 3→3.1和Qwen 2.5→3两对模型。
ai.result: 全基准中79%和72%的项目无可靠变化；可分析项目中，Llama有34%改善、28%退化，Qwen有47%改善、39%退化；低准确率项目改善，高准确率项目退化；领域分解显示模型特定反转；贪婪单次评估漏检42%可靠变化项目并误报25%未变项目。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解聚合准确率提升可能来自大量项目级双向变化，建议在报告准确率时同时报告变化率。

idea_spark.idea: 将RCI与项目难度分层结合，构建模型版本变化的“变化热图”，直观展示不同难度区间和领域的变化方向与幅度。
idea_spark.risk: RCI依赖正态假设和样本量，在项目数少或分布偏态时可能失效；需注意多重比较校正。
idea_spark.inspiration: 临床心理学中的个体变化检测方法为NLP模型评估提供了新视角，启发我们关注模型行为的变化而非仅平均性能。

zh.tldr: 将临床心理学中的可靠变化指数（RCI）引入大语言模型版本比较，发现多数项目无可靠变化，但可分析项目存在双向大幅变化，聚合准确率提升是项目级变化的净残差。
zh.motivation: 传统聚合准确率指标掩盖了模型版本间项目级的变化方向与幅度，无法反映真实的行为差异。
zh.method: 在2000个MMLU-Pro项目上（K=10样本，T=0.7）采用RCI进行项目级可靠变化检测，比较Llama 3→3.1和Qwen 2.5→3两对模型。
zh.result: 全基准中79%和72%的项目无可靠变化；可分析项目中，Llama有34%改善、28%退化，Qwen有47%改善、39%退化；低准确率项目改善，高准确率项目退化；领域分解显示模型特定反转；贪婪单次评估漏检42%可靠变化项目并误报25%未变项目。
zh.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解聚合准确率提升可能来自大量项目级双向变化，建议在报告准确率时同时报告变化率。

idea_spark.idea: 将RCI与项目难度分层结合，构建模型版本变化的“变化热图”，直观展示不同难度区间和领域的变化方向与幅度。
idea_spark.risk: RCI依赖正态假设和样本量，在项目数少或分布偏态时可能失效；需注意多重比较校正。
idea_spark.inspiration: 临床心理学中的个体变化检测方法为NLP模型评估提供了新视角，启发我们关注模型行为的变化而非仅平均性能。

en.tldr: Adapted the Reliable Change Index from clinical psychology to item-level LLM version comparison, finding most items unchanged but analysable items showing bidirectional large changes; aggregate accuracy gain is the net residual of opposing item-level movements.
en.motivation: Aggregate accuracy metrics mask the direction and magnitude of item-level changes between model versions, failing to reflect true behavioral differences.
en.method: Applied the Reliable Change Index (RCI) to item-level comparison on 2,000 MMLU-Pro items (K=10 samples, T=0.7) for two model pairs: Llama 3→3.1 and Qwen 2.5→3.
en.result: 79% and 72% of items showed no reliable change; among analysable items, 34% improved and 28% deteriorated for Llama, 47% improved and 39% deteriorated for Qwen; low-accuracy items improved, high-accuracy items deteriorated; domain decomposition revealed model-specific reversals; greedy single-shot evaluation missed 42% of reliably changed items and falsely flagged 25% of unchanged items.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand that aggregate accuracy gains may arise from substantial item-level bidirectional changes; recommends reporting churn rate alongside aggregate accuracy.

idea_spark.idea: Combine RCI with item difficulty stratification to build a 'change heatmap' of model version changes, visualizing direction and magnitude across difficulty bins and domains.
idea_spark.risk: RCI relies on normality assumptions and sample size; may fail with few items or skewed distributions; multiple comparison correction is needed.
idea_spark.inspiration: Individual-level change detection from clinical psychology offers a new perspective for NLP model evaluation, inspiring focus on behavioral changes rather than average performance.

papers.title: Debiasing Reward Models via Causally Motivated Inference-Time Intervention
papers.summary: Reward models (RMs) play a central role in aligning large language models (LLMs) with human preferences. However, RMs are often sensitive to spurious features such as response length. Existing inference-time approaches for mitigating these biases typically focus exclusively on response length, resulting in performance trade-offs. In this paper, we propose causally motivated intervention for mitigating multiple types of biases in RMs at inference time. Our method first identifies neurons whose activations are strongly correlated with predefined bias attributes, and applies neuron-level intervention that suppresses these signals. We evaluate our method on RM benchmarks and observe reductions in sensitivity to spurious features across diverse bias types, without inducing performance trade-offs. Moreover, when used for preference annotation, small RMs (2B and 7B) with our method, which edits less than 2% of all the neurons in RMs, enable LLMs to improve alignment, achieving performance comparable to that of a state-of-the-art 70B RM on AlpacaEval and MT-Bench. Further analysis reveals that bias signals are primarily encoded by neurons in early layers, shedding light on the internal mechanisms of bias exploitation in RMs.

ai.tldr: 提出一种因果动机的推理时干预方法，通过抑制与偏见属性相关的神经元激活，减少奖励模型对多种虚假特征的敏感度，且不牺牲性能。
ai.motivation: 奖励模型在对齐大语言模型时易受虚假特征（如回答长度）影响，现有推理时方法仅针对单一偏见且存在性能权衡。
ai.method: 识别与预定义偏见属性强相关的神经元，在推理时对这些神经元进行激活抑制，编辑少于2%的神经元。
ai.result: 在多个基准上降低对多种虚假特征的敏感度，无性能权衡；小模型（2B/7B）经此方法后对齐效果媲美70B模型。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何在不重新训练的情况下，通过轻量级神经元干预提升奖励模型的公平性和对齐质量。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将神经元级因果干预与对抗训练结合，或动态调整干预强度以适应不同偏见类型。
idea_spark.risk: 过度抑制可能削弱模型对真实相关特征的捕捉能力，需谨慎选择偏见属性和干预阈值。
idea_spark.inspiration: 早期层神经元编码偏见信号这一发现，启发设计更高效的偏见检测与修正机制。

zh.tldr: 提出一种因果动机的推理时干预方法，通过抑制与偏见属性相关的神经元激活，减少奖励模型对多种虚假特征的敏感度，且不牺牲性能。

idea_spark.inspiration: 早期层神经元编码偏见信号这一发现，启发设计更高效的偏见检测与修正机制。

en.tldr: Proposes a causally motivated inference-time intervention that suppresses neuron activations correlated with bias attributes, reducing reward model sensitivity to multiple spurious features without performance trade-offs.
en.motivation: Reward models are sensitive to spurious features like response length; existing inference-time methods focus on single bias and suffer trade-offs.
en.method: Identifies neurons strongly correlated with predefined bias attributes and suppresses their activations at inference time, editing less than 2% of neurons.
en.result: Reduces sensitivity to multiple spurious features on benchmarks without trade-offs; small RMs (2B/7B) with this method achieve alignment comparable to a 70B RM.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how to improve reward model fairness and alignment quality via lightweight neuron intervention without retraining.

idea_spark.idea: Explore combining neuron-level causal intervention with adversarial training, or dynamically adjusting intervention strength for different bias types.
idea_spark.risk: Over-suppression may weaken the model's ability to capture truly relevant features; careful selection of bias attributes and intervention thresholds is needed.
idea_spark.inspiration: The finding that bias signals are primarily encoded in early-layer neurons inspires more efficient bias detection and correction mechanisms.

papers.title: Iterative Definition Refinement for Zero-Shot Classification via LLM-Based Semantic Prototype Optimization
papers.summary: Web filtering systems rely on accurate web content classification to block cyber threats, prevent data exfiltration, and ensure compliance. However, classification is increasingly difficult due to the dynamic and rapidly evolving nature of the modern web. Embedding-based zero-shot approaches map content and category descriptions into a shared semantic space, enabling label assignment without labeled training data, but remain highly sensitive to definition quality. Poorly specified or ambiguous definitions create semantic overlap in the embedding space, leading to systematic misclassification.   In this paper, we propose a training-free, adaptive iterative definition refinement framework that improves zero-shot web content classification by progressively optimizing category definitions rather than updating model parameters. Using LLMs as feedback-driven definition optimizers, we investigate three refinement strategies namely example-guided, confusion-aware, and history-aware, each refining class descriptions using structured signals from misclassified instances. Furthermore, we introduce a human-labeled benchmark of 10 URL categories with 1,000 samples per class and evaluate across 13 state-of-the-art embedding foundation models. Results demonstrate that iterative definition refinement consistently improves classification performance across diverse architectures, establishing definition quality as a critical and underexplored factor in embedding-based systems. The dataset is available at https://github.com/naeemrehmat/B2MWT-10C.

ai.tldr: 提出一种无需训练的迭代定义精炼框架，通过LLM优化类别定义来提升零样本网页内容分类性能。
ai.motivation: 基于嵌入的零样本分类对类别定义质量高度敏感，模糊定义导致语义重叠和系统性误分类。
ai.method: 利用LLM作为反馈驱动的定义优化器，采用示例引导、混淆感知和历史感知三种策略，根据误分类实例的结构化信号逐步精炼类别描述。
ai.result: 在13个嵌入模型和10类URL基准上，迭代定义精炼一致提升分类性能，证明定义质量是关键但被忽视的因素。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户在不重新训练模型的情况下，通过优化类别描述来改善零样本分类的准确性。

idea_spark.idea: 结合主动学习，让LLM自动生成最具区分性的类别定义示例，减少人工标注成本。
idea_spark.risk: LLM可能引入偏见或过度拟合误分类样本，导致定义偏离真实类别边界。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受人类通过错误反馈修正概念定义的启发，将LLM作为定义优化器模拟这一过程。

idea_spark.idea: 结合主动学习，让LLM自动生成最具区分性的类别定义示例，减少人工标注成本。
idea_spark.risk: LLM可能引入偏见或过度拟合误分类样本，导致定义偏离真实类别边界。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受人类通过错误反馈修正概念定义的启发，将LLM作为定义优化器模拟这一过程。

en.tldr: Proposes a training-free iterative definition refinement framework that uses LLMs to optimize category definitions, improving zero-shot web content classification.
en.motivation: Embedding-based zero-shot classification is highly sensitive to definition quality; ambiguous definitions cause semantic overlap and systematic misclassification.
en.method: Uses LLMs as feedback-driven definition optimizers with three strategies: example-guided, confusion-aware, and history-aware, refining class descriptions using structured signals from misclassified instances.
en.result: Consistent improvement across 13 embedding models and a 10-category URL benchmark, establishing definition quality as a critical yet underexplored factor.
en.help_to_user: Helps users improve zero-shot classification accuracy by optimizing category definitions without retraining models.

idea_spark.idea: Combine with active learning to let LLMs automatically generate the most discriminative definition examples, reducing manual annotation cost.
idea_spark.risk: LLMs may introduce bias or overfit to misclassified samples, causing definitions to deviate from true category boundaries.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by how humans refine concept definitions through error feedback, using LLMs as definition optimizers to simulate this process.

papers.title: In-Context Examples Suppress Scientific Knowledge Recall in LLMs
papers.summary: Scientific reasoning rarely stops at what is directly observable; it often requires uncovering hidden structure from data. From estimating reaction constants in chemistry to inferring demand elasticities in economics, this latent structure recovery is what distinguishes scientific reasoning from curve fitting. Large language models (LLMs) can often recall and apply relevant scientific formulas, but we show that this ability is surprisingly easy to suppress. We show that adding in-context examples makes models rely less on pretrained domain knowledge, even when those examples are generated by the very same formula. Rather than reinforcing knowledge-driven derivation, examples shift computation toward empirical pattern fitting. We document this knowledge displacement on 60 latent structure recovery tasks across five scientific domains, 6,000 trials, and four models. This displacement is consistent across domains, but its accuracy consequences depend on how the displaced strategy compares to the one that replaces it: the same shift can lower accuracy, leave it unchanged, or appear to improve it. In all cases, however, the model shifts away from knowledge-driven reasoning. For practitioners deploying LLMs on scientific tasks, the message is cautionary: in-context examples may displace, rather than reinforce, the knowledge they are intended to support.

ai.tldr: 研究发现，在上下文中添加示例会抑制大型语言模型对预训练科学知识的回忆，使其转向经验模式拟合。
ai.motivation: 科学推理需要从数据中恢复隐藏结构，而大型语言模型通常能回忆并应用科学公式，但上下文示例可能削弱这一能力。
ai.method: 在60个潜在结构恢复任务、6000次试验和四个模型上，通过添加上下文示例（即使由同一公式生成）观察模型行为变化。
ai.result: 上下文示例使模型减少对预训练领域知识的依赖，转向经验模式拟合，这种知识位移在不同领域一致，但准确性影响因替代策略而异。
ai.help_to_user: 提醒用户在科学任务中使用大型语言模型时，上下文示例可能抑制而非增强其知识推理能力。

idea_spark.idea: 设计一种机制，在上下文示例中显式标记知识来源，以减轻知识位移。
idea_spark.risk: 过度依赖上下文示例可能导致模型忽略关键领域知识，降低推理可靠性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受人类学习中“示例干扰”现象启发，探索如何平衡示例与知识回忆。

zh.tldr: 研究发现，在上下文中添加示例会抑制大型语言模型对预训练科学知识的回忆，使其转向经验模式拟合。

idea_spark.risk: 过度依赖上下文示例可能导致模型忽略关键领域知识，降低推理可靠性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受人类学习中“示例干扰”现象启发，探索如何平衡示例与知识回忆。

en.tldr: Adding in-context examples suppresses LLMs' recall of pretrained scientific knowledge, shifting them toward empirical pattern fitting.
en.motivation: Scientific reasoning requires recovering hidden structure from data; LLMs can recall formulas, but in-context examples may undermine this ability.
en.method: Tested on 60 latent structure recovery tasks, 6,000 trials, and four models by adding in-context examples (even from the same formula) and observing behavior.
en.result: In-context examples reduce reliance on pretrained domain knowledge, shifting toward empirical pattern fitting; this displacement is consistent across domains, with accuracy effects varying by replacement strategy.
en.help_to_user: Cautions practitioners that in-context examples may displace rather than reinforce the knowledge they intend to support in scientific tasks.

idea_spark.idea: Design a mechanism to explicitly annotate knowledge sources in in-context examples to mitigate knowledge displacement.
idea_spark.risk: Over-reliance on in-context examples may cause models to ignore critical domain knowledge, reducing reasoning reliability.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the 'example interference' phenomenon in human learning, exploring how to balance examples and knowledge recall.

papers.title: On the Proper Treatment of Units in Surprisal Theory
papers.summary: Surprisal theory links human processing effort to the predictability of an upcoming linguistic unit, but empirical work often leaves the notion of a unit underspecified. In practice, experimental stimuli are segmented into linguistically motivated units (e.g., words), while pretrained language models assign probability mass to a fixed token alphabet that typically does not align with those units. As a result, surprisal-based predictors depend implicitly on ad hoc procedures that conflate two distinct modeling choices: the definition of the unit of analysis and the choice of regions of interest over which predictions are evaluated. In this paper, we disentangle these choices and give a unified framework for reasoning about surprisal over arbitrary unit inventories. We argue that surprisal-based analyses should make these choices explicit and treat tokenization as an implementation detail rather than a scientific primitive.

ai.tldr: 本文指出惊奇理论中“单位”概念常被模糊处理，实验刺激按语言学单位切分，而语言模型按固定词表分配概率，导致预测依赖临时程序。作者提出统一框架，明确区分分析单位和感兴趣区域，主张将分词视为实现细节而非科学原语。
ai.motivation: 现有惊奇理论实证研究中，语言单位定义不明确，分词与语言学单位不一致，导致预测结果混杂了两种建模选择。
ai.method: 通过理论分析，将分析单位定义与预测评估区域的选择明确分离，构建一个适用于任意单位清单的惊奇度统一推理框架。
ai.result: 提出应显式声明单位选择，并将分词视为实现细节，从而消除临时程序带来的混淆。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助研究者更严谨地设计惊奇度实验，避免因单位定义模糊而影响结论的可重复性和解释性。

idea_spark.idea: 开发一个开源工具库，允许用户自定义分析单位（如词、短语、音素），并自动计算不同单位下的惊奇度，同时记录分词与单位映射关系。
idea_spark.risk: 不同单位定义可能导致结果差异，需谨慎解释；工具可能增加实验设计的复杂度。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从计量语言学中“单位”的哲学讨论获得启发，将分词从科学原语降级为可配置参数。

idea_spark.inspiration: 从计量语言学中“单位”的哲学讨论获得启发，将分词从科学原语降级为可配置参数。

en.tldr: This paper points out that the notion of 'unit' in surprisal theory is often underspecified: experimental stimuli are segmented into linguistic units while language models assign probability to a fixed token alphabet, leading to ad hoc procedures. The authors propose a unified framework that explicitly separates the definition of the unit of analysis from the choice of regions of interest, treating tokenization as an implementation detail rather than a scientific primitive.
en.motivation: Empirical work on surprisal theory often conflates two distinct modeling choices: the definition of the linguistic unit and the selection of regions of interest, due to misalignment between experimental units and language model tokens.
en.method: Through theoretical analysis, the paper disentangles these choices and provides a unified framework for reasoning about surprisal over arbitrary unit inventories.
en.result: The framework makes unit choices explicit and relegates tokenization to an implementation detail, eliminating confusion from ad hoc procedures.
en.help_to_user: Helps researchers design more rigorous surprisal experiments by clarifying the role of unit definition, improving reproducibility and interpretability.

idea_spark.idea: Develop an open-source library that allows users to define custom analysis units (e.g., words, phrases, phonemes) and automatically compute surprisal under different unit inventories while recording token-to-unit mappings.
idea_spark.risk: Different unit definitions may yield divergent results, requiring careful interpretation; the tool may increase experimental design complexity.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by philosophical discussions of 'units' in quantitative linguistics, treating tokenization as a configurable parameter rather than a scientific primitive.

papers.title: Universal statistical laws governing culinary design
papers.summary: Cooking is a cultural expression of human creativity that transcends geography and time through the orchestration of ingredients and techniques, much like languages do through words and syntax. Yet, beneath the apparent diversity of culinary traditions, whether recipes obey statistical laws comparable to those of other symbolic systems remains unknown. Here we analyze a large corpus of traditional recipes spanning global cuisines, annotated using a state-of-the-art named entity recognition algorithm into ingredients, cooking techniques, utensils, and other culinary attributes. We find that ingredient usage exhibits Zipf-like rank-frequency scaling, that culinary diversity grows sublinearly with corpus size in accordance with Heaps' law, and that recipe complexity follows Menzerath-Altmann-type relations between the number and average information of constituent units. Consistent with observations in packaged foods, macronutrient concentrations across recipes also display a log-normal signature. Minimal generative models based on preferential reuse, constrained sampling, and incremental modification recapitulate these regularities, suggesting generic processes that shape recipe architecture across cultures. Together, these findings establish recipes as a compositional symbolic system in which complex structure emerges from simple, constrained generative processes.

ai.tldr: 通过分析全球传统食谱，发现其遵循Zipf定律、Heaps定律和Menzerath-Altmann关系等统计规律，表明烹饪是一种组合符号系统。
ai.motivation: 探索食谱是否像语言等其他符号系统一样，服从普遍的统计规律。
ai.method: 使用命名实体识别算法对大量传统食谱进行标注，分析成分、烹饪技术、器具等属性，并构建最小生成模型。
ai.result: 成分使用呈Zipf标度；烹饪多样性随语料库规模亚线性增长（Heaps定律）；食谱复杂度符合Menzerath-Altmann关系；宏量营养素浓度呈对数正态分布。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解烹饪设计的底层统计规律，可用于食谱推荐或生成。

idea_spark.idea: 利用生成模型自动设计符合统计规律的新食谱。
idea_spark.risk: 模型可能忽略文化特异性，导致生成的食谱缺乏真实感。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从语言统计规律出发，探索其他人类创造系统的通用结构。

en.tldr: Analysis of global traditional recipes reveals statistical laws (Zipf, Heaps, Menzerath-Altmann) similar to language, establishing cooking as a compositional symbolic system.
en.motivation: To investigate whether recipes obey universal statistical laws like other symbolic systems (e.g., language).
en.method: Applied named entity recognition to a large corpus of traditional recipes, extracting ingredients, techniques, utensils, etc., and built minimal generative models.
en.result: Ingredient usage shows Zipf-like scaling; culinary diversity grows sublinearly (Heaps' law); recipe complexity follows Menzerath-Altmann relations; macronutrient concentrations are log-normal.
en.help_to_user: Provides insights into the statistical structure of culinary design, useful for recipe recommendation or generation.

idea_spark.idea: Use generative models to automatically design new recipes that adhere to observed statistical laws.
idea_spark.risk: Models may overlook cultural specificity, leading to unrealistic recipes.
idea_spark.inspiration: Explore universal structures in other human creative systems inspired by linguistic statistics.

papers.title: Stable Behavior, Limited Variation: Persona Validity in LLM Agents for Urban Sentiment Perception
papers.summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly used as proxies for human perception in urban analysis, yet it remains unclear whether persona prompting produces meaningful and reproducible behavioral diversity. We investigate whether distinct personas influence urban sentiment judgments generated by multimodal LLMs. Using a factorial set of personas spanning gender, economic status, political orientation, and personality, we instantiate multiple agents per persona to evaluate urban scene images from the PerceptSent dataset and assess both within-persona consistency and cross-persona variation. Results show strong convergence among agents sharing a persona, indicating stable and reproducible behavior. However, cross-persona differentiation is limited: economic status and personality induce statistically detectable but practically modest variation, while gender shows no measurable effect and political orientation only negligible impact. Agents also exhibit an extremity bias, collapsing intermediate sentiment categories common in human annotations. As a result, performance remains strong on coarse-grained polarity tasks but degrades as sentiment resolution increases, suggesting that simple label-based persona prompting does not capture fine-grained perceptual judgments. To isolate the contribution of persona conditioning, we additionally evaluate the same model without personas. Surprisingly, the no-persona model sometimes matches or exceeds persona-conditioned agreement with human labels across all task variants, suggesting that simple label-based persona prompting may add limited annotation value in this setting.

ai.tldr: 研究显示，LLM代理在相同人格提示下行为稳定，但不同人格间的感知差异有限，且无人格模型有时表现更优。
ai.motivation: 探究人格提示能否使LLM代理产生有意义的、可复现的行为多样性，以用于城市情感感知。
ai.method: 使用多模态LLM，基于性别、经济地位、政治倾向和人格构建因子化人格集，对城市场景图像进行情感判断，评估人格内一致性和人格间差异。
ai.result: 同人格代理行为稳定，但人格间差异微弱；经济地位和人格有统计显著但实际微小的效应，性别无效应，政治倾向影响可忽略；代理存在极端化偏差，在粗粒度极性任务上表现好，细粒度情感分辨率下降；无人格模型有时匹配或超越人格提示模型。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解人格提示在LLM代理中的实际有效性，提示简单标签式人格提示可能无法捕捉细粒度感知判断。

idea_spark.idea: 探索更丰富的人格描述（如叙事背景、行为模式）或动态人格调整，以增强代理行为多样性。
idea_spark.risk: 过度复杂的人格设计可能引入噪声，且难以验证其真实性；无人格基线可能已足够。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受无人格模型表现启发，可研究LLM内在的默认感知偏好，或结合少量真实人类标注进行微调。

en.tldr: LLM agents show stable behavior under same persona but limited cross-persona variation; no-persona model sometimes matches or outperforms persona-conditioned models.
en.motivation: To investigate whether persona prompting yields meaningful and reproducible behavioral diversity in LLM agents for urban sentiment perception.
en.method: Using multimodal LLMs with a factorial set of personas (gender, economic status, political orientation, personality), agents evaluate urban scene images from PerceptSent dataset; within-persona consistency and cross-persona variation are assessed.
en.result: Strong within-persona convergence but limited cross-persona differentiation; economic status and personality show statistically detectable but practically modest effects; gender and political orientation have negligible impact; agents exhibit extremity bias; performance strong on coarse polarity but degrades with finer sentiment resolution; no-persona model sometimes matches or exceeds persona-conditioned agreement.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand the practical effectiveness of persona prompting in LLM agents, suggesting simple label-based personas may not capture fine-grained perceptual judgments.

idea_spark.idea: Explore richer persona descriptions (e.g., narrative context, behavioral patterns) or dynamic persona adjustment to enhance behavioral diversity.
idea_spark.risk: Overly complex persona designs may introduce noise and be hard to validate; no-persona baseline may already suffice.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the no-persona model's performance, investigate LLMs' inherent default perceptual biases or fine-tune with small amounts of human annotations.

papers.title: Optimal Stop-Loss and Take-Profit Parameterization for Autonomous Trading Agent Swarm
papers.summary: Autonomous crypto trading systems often spend most of their design effort on finding entries, while exits are left to fixed rules that are rarely tested in a systematic way. This paper examines whether better stop-loss and take-profit settings can improve the performance of an autonomous trading agent swarm. Using more than 900 historical trades, we replay each trade under many alternative exit policies and compare results against the existing production setup. The study finds that exit design matters meaningfully: stronger configurations improve risk-adjusted performance and generally favor tighter loss limits, earlier profit capture, and closer trailing protection. The paper also discusses a key evaluation challenge: a purely chronological split was initially used, but the newest trades fell into an unusual war-driven market period that sharply distorted test results. To reduce the influence of that single episode, the main comparison was run on randomized data, with the drawbacks of doing so acknowledged explicitly. Overall, the paper presents a practical framework for tuning exit logic in a more disciplined and transparent way.

ai.tldr: 本文研究了自主交易代理群中止损和止盈参数的最优设置，通过重放900多笔历史交易，发现更优的退出策略能显著提升风险调整后收益，并倾向于更紧的止损、更早的止盈和更近的追踪保护。
ai.motivation: 现有自主加密交易系统大多专注于入场策略，而退出策略常采用未经系统测试的固定规则，缺乏对退出参数优化的研究。
ai.method: 基于900多笔历史交易，对每笔交易在多种替代退出策略下进行重放，并与现有生产设置对比；同时讨论了纯时间分割和随机化数据分割的评估挑战。
ai.result: 退出设计对性能有显著影响；更优配置倾向于更紧的止损、更早的止盈和更近的追踪保护，并改善了风险调整后收益。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一个系统化、透明的退出逻辑调优框架，帮助交易系统开发者更科学地优化止损止盈参数。

idea_spark.idea: 结合强化学习或贝叶斯优化，自动搜索最优退出参数组合，并引入市场状态分类器以动态调整策略。
idea_spark.risk: 过度优化可能导致过拟合；随机化数据分割虽减少了特定市场事件的影响，但可能低估真实时序依赖性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受启发于交易系统退出策略的忽视，可推广至其他AI系统中“决策后评估”环节的优化，例如自动驾驶的紧急制动策略或推荐系统的退出时机。

en.tldr: This paper investigates optimal stop-loss and take-profit settings for autonomous trading agent swarms by replaying over 900 historical trades under alternative exit policies, finding that stronger configurations improve risk-adjusted performance and favor tighter loss limits, earlier profit capture, and closer trailing protection.
en.motivation: Existing autonomous crypto trading systems focus heavily on entry strategies while exits are left to fixed, rarely tested rules, lacking systematic optimization of exit parameters.
en.method: Replayed each of over 900 historical trades under many alternative exit policies and compared results against the production setup; discussed evaluation challenges of chronological vs. randomized data splits.
en.result: Exit design significantly impacts performance; stronger configurations favor tighter stop-loss, earlier take-profit, and closer trailing protection, improving risk-adjusted returns.
en.help_to_user: Provides a disciplined and transparent framework for tuning exit logic, helping trading system developers optimize stop-loss and take-profit parameters more systematically.

idea_spark.idea: Combine reinforcement learning or Bayesian optimization to automatically search for optimal exit parameter combinations, and incorporate market state classifiers for dynamic adjustment.
idea_spark.risk: Over-optimization may lead to overfitting; randomized data splits reduce the influence of specific market events but may underestimate true temporal dependencies.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the neglect of exit strategies in trading systems, this idea can generalize to optimizing 'post-decision evaluation' in other AI systems, such as emergency braking in autonomous driving or exit timing in recommendation systems.

papers.title: Detecting Clinical Discrepancies in Health Coaching Agents: A Dual-Stream Memory and Reconciliation Architecture
papers.summary: As Large Language Model (LLM) agents transition from single-session tools to persistent systems managing longitudinal healthcare journeys, their memory architectures face a critical challenge: reconciling two imperfect sources of truth. The patient's evolving self-report is current but prone to recall bias, while the Electronic Health Record (EHR) is medically validated but frequently stale. General-purpose agent memory systems optimize for coherence by overwriting older facts with the user's latest statement, a pattern that risks safety failures when applied to clinical data. We introduce a Dual-Stream Memory Architecture that strictly separates the patient narrative from the structured clinical record (FHIR), governed by a dedicated Reconciliation Engine that evaluates every extracted memory against the patient's FHIR profile and classifies discrepancies by type, severity, and the specific FHIR resources involved. We evaluate this architecture on 26 patients across 675 longitudinal wellness coaching sessions, using a hybrid dataset that interleaves real provider-patient transcripts with synthetic, FHIR-grounded clinical scenarios. In isolated testing, the engine detects 84.4% of designed clinical discrepancies with 86.7% safety-critical recall. By coupling extraction and reconciliation evaluation on the same data, we directly quantify a 13.6% error cascade, tracing the degradation to clinical details lost during memory extraction from unstructured conversation rather than to downstream classification errors. These findings establish that validating patient-reported memories against clinical records is both feasible and necessary for safe deployment of longitudinal health agents.

ai.tldr: 提出双流记忆架构，分离患者自述与电子健康记录，通过协调引擎检测临床不一致，在675次健康辅导会话中实现84.4%的检测率。
ai.motivation: 长期健康管理代理依赖患者自述和电子健康记录两种信息源，但两者各有缺陷（自述有回忆偏差，记录可能过时），现有记忆系统覆盖旧信息导致安全风险。
ai.method: 设计双流记忆架构，严格分离患者叙事与结构化临床记录（FHIR），并由协调引擎对每条记忆进行分类、严重性评估和资源关联。
ai.result: 在26名患者675次会话中，引擎检测到84.4%的设计不一致，安全关键召回率86.7%，并量化了13.6%的错误级联。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解如何构建安全的长期健康代理，避免因记忆覆盖导致的临床错误。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将协调引擎扩展为主动询问机制，当检测到不一致时自动生成澄清问题，减少对被动记忆的依赖。
idea_spark.risk: 协调引擎可能过度依赖FHIR数据，忽略患者自述中的新信息，导致误判或延迟更新。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受临床诊断中双重核查流程启发，将类似原则应用于AI记忆管理。
